title: Characterizing Opinion Evolution of Networked LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly interact with one another in multi-agent systems, from simulations of human discourse to influence operations and fully LLM-driven social platforms. These interactions give rise to new regimes of opinion propagation that are not yet well understood. We investigate whether classical opinion dynamics models, which have long been used to explain how interactions shape collective beliefs in human societies, can capture the behavior of LLM networks. We find that, while naive averaging-style models fail to track LLMs' opinion dynamics, simple modifications yield substantial gains in modeling fidelity. In particular, bias, an innate opinion toward which agents regress, emerges as a significant driver of LLM opinion dynamics, with its inclusion reducing cumulative estimated mean opinion error by up to 88%. We additionally find that these conclusions generalize across model families, discussion topics, and networks.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型(LLM)在多智能体系统中交互时的意见动态行为，检验经典舆论动态模型是否能准确预测LLM网络中的观点演变。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在多智能体系统中的应用日益增多(如人类话语模拟、舆论操作和LLM驱动的社交平台)，理解这些交互如何形成集体信念变得至关重要，但目前对LLM的新兴舆论传播机制理解不足。
AI.method: 将经典舆论动态模型应用于LLM网络，通过实验测试朴素平均模型的预测能力，并探索加入修正因素后的建模效果。
AI.result: 朴素平均模型无法准确追踪LLM的意见动态，但简单修改可显著提升保真度。偏差(bias)作为智能体内在回归倾向被发现是关键驱动因素，包含偏差后累计平均观点误差降低高达88%，该结论可跨模型家族、讨论主题和网络泛化。
AI.conclusion: 经典舆论动态模型经过适当修正可应用于LLM网络，偏差是影响LLM意见动态的核心因素，这一发现对理解和预测多智能体LLM系统中的观点演变具有重要意义。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Large Language Models (LLMs) and opinion dynamics in multi-agent systems - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, skeleton-based motion representation, and diffusion models for visual content. While both fields involve "models" and "networks," they are entirely different application domains with zero overlap. The paper addresses LLM opinion evolution, not computer graphics, motion generation, or video synthesis.

title: PersonalPlan: Planning Multi-Agent Systems for Personalized Programming Learning
summary: Effective programming education requires personalized instruction adapted to diverse learner backgrounds. However, while LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) excel at complex planning, existing planners often lack profile-grounding and pedagogical scaffolding, thereby undermining personalized programming learning. To fill in the gap, we first introduce \textbf{MAP-PPL} (\textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{A}gent \textbf{P}lans for \textbf{P}ersonalized \textbf{P}rogramming \textbf{L}earning), a profile-conditioned multi-agent planning dataset with 3{,}043 query--profile--plan instances from 1{,}730 Stack Overflow question groups and 2{,}738 learner profiles. Each plan specifies agents, subtasks, executable steps, and prerequisite dependencies. Then, we propose \textbf{PersonalPlan}, a two-stage MAS planner that first performs hierarchical SFT with separate LoRA adapters for profile-aware task decomposition and step dependency planning, then applies a Reward-Adaptive GRPO to encourage the model to generate executable, personalized, and pedagogically scaffolded plans. Extensive experiments on MAP-PPL comparing PersonalPlan against frontier LLMs, generic MAS frameworks, and agentic planners demonstrate its superiority. With only 8B and 32B variants, PersonalPlan achieves state-of-the-art plan executability, personalization, and pedagogical quality, effectively orchestrating MAS for agent-student interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAP-PPL数据集和PersonalPlan双阶段多智能体规划器，用于个性化编程学习。通过分层SFT和奖励自适应GRPO实现具有教学支架的个性化计划生成。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统缺乏学习者画像理解和教学支架能力，难以实现真正的个性化编程教育。现有规划器无法根据学习者背景调整教学内容和方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段MAS规划器：第一阶段使用分层SFT配合独立LoRA适配器进行画像感知任务分解和步骤依赖规划；第二阶段应用奖励自适应GRPO鼓励模型生成可执行、个性化且具有教学支架的计划。
AI.result: 在MAP-PPL数据集上，PersonalPlan仅用8B和32B参数模型即可达到最先进的计划可执行性、个性化程度和教学支架质量，有效协调多智能体系统实现智能体-学习者交互。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合画像条件化和教学支架设计，PersonalPlan成功实现了LLM多智能体系统在个性化编程教育中的应用突破。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based multi-agent systems for personalized programming learning (educational technology), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has no connection to video generation, 3D motion synthesis, diffusion models for video/motion, skeleton-based motion representation, or any of the methods/pain points mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different - education/learning systems vs computer graphics/motion generation.

title: Gender Bias in LLM Hiring Decisions: Evidence from a Japanese Context and Evaluation of Mitigation Strategies
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in hiring workflows, yet most research on gender bias in LLM hiring decisions has focused on English-language, Western-format resumes. This study examines whether pro-female gender bias extends to a Japanese corporate context and evaluates two practical mitigation strategies. Using a counterfactual resume design with 60 Japanese rirekisho-format resumes, 12 name pairs selected on linguistically grounded gender-signal criteria, and five state-of-the-art LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-4o, DeepSeek-V3, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Llama 3.3 70B), we conducted 43,200 API calls across baseline, prompt instruction, and privacy filter conditions. A crossed random-effects linear mixed model confirms a significant pro-female bias across all five models, replicating Western findings in a non-Western context. A prompt-level gender-neutrality instruction produces no meaningful reduction in bias. A name-reliance analysis formally identifies the candidate name as the primary gender channel: removing the name from the prompt reduces the female effect by nearly its full magnitude. An unexpected incompatibility between the privacy filter and GPT-4o's content safety filter, resulting in a 42% refusal rate, highlights a practical deployment challenge for name anonymization in LLM-assisted recruitment pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该研究检验了LLM在日本企业招聘环境中的性别偏见，发现所有5个模型都存在显著的女性偏好偏见，但现有的两种缓解策略（提示词指令和隐私过滤器）均无法有效消除这种偏见，且隐私过滤器与GPT-4o的内容安全过滤器存在不兼容问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注英语语境和西方格式简历的性别偏见，缺乏对非西方招聘情境的研究。日本作为重要的非西方经济体，其招聘文档格式（力石书）与西方简历有显著差异，因此有必要验证西方研究发现是否适用于日本企业语境，并探索实际可行的缓解策略。
AI.method: 采用反事实简历设计，使用60份日文力石书格式简历，12对基于语言学性别信号标准选取的姓名配对，对5个主流LLM（Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-4o、DeepSeek-V3、 Gemini 2.5 Flash、Llama 3.3 70B）进行43,200次API调用，涵盖基线、提示词指令和隐私过滤器三种条件，采用交叉随机效应线性混合模型进行分析。
AI.result: 所有5个模型均确认存在显著的女性偏好偏见，成功复制了西方研究在非西方情境中的发现。提示词层面的性别中立指令未能产生有意义的偏见减少。姓名依赖分析正式确定候选人姓名是主要性别通道，移除姓名后女性效应几乎完全消失。隐私过滤器与GPT-4o内容安全过滤器存在意外不兼容，导致42%的拒绝率。
AI.conclusion: LLM招聘决策中的女性偏好偏见延伸至日本企业情境。当前缓解策略无效：提示词指令无法消除偏见，而隐私过滤器存在实际部署挑战。研究者建议未来应关注匿名化技术的兼容性以及更有效的去偏方法。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about gender bias in LLM hiring decisions in a Japanese context (NLP/AI ethics domain), while the research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation, video generation, and temporal animation synthesis. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with resume screening and hiring fairness, the other deals with generating realistic 3D human motion and animations. Even though the paper mentions some LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude), these are used for entirely different purposes (analyzing gender bias in resumes) compared to the VLM methods in the research profile (quality assessment for generated graphics content).

title: EARS: Explanatory Abstention for Reliable Sub-Agent Modeling in Large-scale Multi-Agent Systems
summary: In large-scale enterprise settings, centralized multi-agent systems (MAS) are increasingly adopted, in which a coordinator delegates user requests to lightweight, domain-specialized sub-agents. While this architecture improves modularity, scalability, and cost efficiency, its reliability depends not only on accurate routing but also on sub-agents' ability to calibrate their responses to capability constraints. In particular, sub-agents built on smaller fine-tuned models often struggle with such calibration, leading them to over-answer ambiguous, underspecified, misrouted, or unsupported requests and produce hallucinated outputs instead of actionable feedback. To address this challenge, we present EARS (Explanatory Abstention for Reliable Sub-Agent Modeling), a production-oriented framework that reframes sub-agent abstention as an inter-agent communication protocol: a sub-agent does not merely abstain, but exposes an actionable failure state to the coordinator. EARS curates human-agent interaction data using an ensemble of calibrated LLM-as-a-Judge models, producing structured abstention labels and rationales under a taxonomy of sub-agent failure modes. These data are used to fine-tune sub-agents to detect failure conditions and return rationales for coordinator-level clarification, rerouting, or fallback. We evaluate EARS in a large-scale production e-commerce assistant supporting enterprise business intelligence workflows. EARS improves the overall response pass rate from 68.5% to 78.9%, demonstrating that sub-agent-side explanatory abstention improves MAS reliability.

AI.tldr: EARS是一个生产级框架，通过将子代理的拒绝行为重新定义为代理间通信协议，使用LLM-as-a-Judge模型生成的标注数据微调子代理检测失败条件并返回解释，从而提升大型多代理系统的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在集中式多代理系统中，子代理常因能力限制而无法正确校准响应，导致对模糊、不支持或错误路由的请求过度回答，产生幻觉输出而非可操作的反馈。
AI.method: 使用校准的LLM-as-a-Judge模型集合生成人类-代理交互数据，构建子代理失败模式的结构化拒绝标签和理由 taxonomy，然后微调子代理检测失败条件并向协调器返回解释。
AI.result: 在大型电商业务智能助手中评估，EARS将整体响应通过率从68.5%提升至78.9%。
AI.conclusion: 子代理端可解释的拒绝行为能显著提升多代理系统的可靠性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about multi-agent LLM systems for e-commerce business assistants, not Computer Graphics or video/motion generation. It addresses agent failure detection and refusal behavior in multi-agent coordination - a software engineering/AI systems problem. There is zero match with the research profile's application domain (Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video-generated motion priors), methods (diffusion models, VLM for visual quality assessment, skeleton-based motion), or pain points. The mention of "LLM-as-a-Judge" is not comparable to "Visual Language Models for quality assessment" in the graphics context.

title: Denoising Distances in Metric Measure Spaces
summary: Recent work studied the problem of finding clusters and denoising pairwise distances from noisy distances of points sampled on a manifold. We study the same problems in more general metric measure spaces under \lowerphiregularity{}. We give an algorithm that extracts large localized clusters around every sampled point and uses them to denoise distances to any fixed accuracy, with near-linear running time in the dense fixed-accuracy regime. We also show how to achieve much higher accuracy with a non-efficient algorithm. This suggests that unlike the Riemannian case, denoising to higher accuracy in more general metric spaces has a statistical-computational gap.

AI.tldr: 研究在更一般的度量测度空间中从噪声距离中提取聚类和去噪的问题，提出了一种算法可以在任何固定精度下去噪距离，且运行时间接近线性，同时表明高精度的去噪存在统计-计算间隙。
AI.motivation: 先前工作仅研究流形上采样点的聚类发现和距离去噪问题，作者希望将问题推广到更一般的度量测度空间中，并探索在更一般条件下的计算复杂性。
AI.method: 提出一种算法，提取每个采样点周围的大规模局部聚类，并利用这些聚类对距离进行去噪；在密集固定精度制度下实现接近线性运行时间；对于更高精度采用非高效算法。
AI.result: 算法可以在任何固定精度下对距离进行去噪，运行时间接近线性；表明在更一般的度量空间中，高精度去噪需要更多的计算资源，存在统计-计算间隙。
AI.conclusion: 与黎曼流形情况不同，在更一般的度量空间中，高精度去噪存在统计-计算间隙，这揭示了更一般度量空间的固有计算复杂性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about denoising distances in metric measure spaces for clustering analysis - a theoretical computer science/computational geometry topic. title: Budget-Aware Adaptive Adversarial Patches for Black-Box Object Detection
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2026)
summary: Adversarial patches pose a practical threat to modern object detectors. Prior work shows vulnerability, but three gaps limit actionable insight: (i) few \emph{score-based black-box} attacks \emph{jointly} optimize patch \emph{location, texture, and size} under tight query budgets; (ii) success is rarely tied to the patch's \emph{visual footprint}; and (iii) evaluations often conflate EOT robustness with plain-view suppression. We present \method{}, a query-efficient, budget-adaptive black-box attack that couples a lightweight \emph{Contextual Thompson-Sampling} placer with NES-style pixel updates, growing the patch only when progress stalls. Reporting is anchored by a \emph{strict plain-image} suppression test; EOT is audited but never used as a substitute for success, and optional appearance/printability weights expose strength--visibility trade-offs. Across YOLOv5, Faster R-CNN, and YOLOS, \method{} achieves strong suppression on CNN-based detectors and substantial suppression on the transformer-based detector, using compact patches and exposing clear query--footprint trade-offs relative to fixed-size and heuristic baselines. A print--capture pilot further shows transfer across unseen physical objects and viewpoints.

AI.tldr: 提出一种查询高效、预算自适应的黑盒对抗攻击方法ContextTS-NES，用于生成对抗补丁以抑制目标检测器的检测能力
AI.motivation: 解决现有对抗补丁研究中的三个关键空白：缺乏联合优化补丁位置、纹理和尺寸的黑盒攻击；未将成功与补丁的视觉足迹关联；混淆了EOT鲁棒性与纯视图抑制
AI.method: 提出Contextual Thompson-Sampling放置器结合NES风格像素更新的攻击方法，仅在进展停滞时增长补丁，采用严格的纯图像抑制测试
AI.result: 在YOLOv5、Faster R-CNN和YOLOS上实现强抑制，使用紧凑补丁暴露了查询-足迹权衡，print-transfer实验显示跨物理对象和视角的迁移能力
AI.conclusion: 该方法在CNN和Transformer检测器上均有效，揭示了对抗补丁的视觉足迹与攻击效果之间的权衡关系

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial attacks on object detection systems (computer vision security), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation, diffusion-based video generation, and temporal motion modeling. Although both deal with visual content, the application domains are fundamentally different: the profile aims to synthesize realistic 3D animations and motion from video, while this paper focuses on attacking/fooling object detectors. The methods (Thompson sampling, NES for adversarial optimization) are also unrelated to the specified methods (diffusion models, VLM, skeleton-based motion representation).

title: NAVI-Orbital: First In-Orbit Demonstration of a Zero-Shot Vision-Language Model for Autonomous Earth Observation
summary: As Earth Observation data generation outpaces downlink bandwidth and human-in-the-loop processing, a widening gap has emerged between onboard collection and actionable ground intelligence. This paper presents NAVI-Orbital, a software system deployed on a Low Earth Orbit (LEO) spacecraft. On April 16, 2026, NAVI-Orbital achieved what is, to the authors' knowledge, the first in-orbit demonstration of a vision-language model performing autonomous multi-modal inference entirely onboard. NAVI-Orbital uses a local vision-language model (Gemma 3) to classify each captured scene, produce a text description of its content and the relationships between its features, and respond to operator follow-up via natural-language dialogue. The system is re-tasked through plain-English prompts in place of conventional command sequences, and is orchestrated by a graph-based state machine (LangGraph) coordinating dedicated agents for detection and dialogue. Results across ground benchmarking (88.16% accuracy on the 7,960-image curated AID benchmark), Flatsat validation, and live in-orbit captures of newly acquired, previously unseen Earth imagery (including uncorrected YAM-9 imagery, processed onboard with hardware-accelerated GPU inference and no fine-tuning for the flight instrument) demonstrate the feasibility of running foundation models on satellite-class edge computers to invert the conventional acquire-then-downlink-everything bandwidth profile through semantic compression of Earth observations in-orbit.

AI.tldr: NAVI-Orbital是首个在低轨卫星上实现完全在轨运行的多模态视觉-语言模型(Gemma 3)自主推理系统，通过LangGraph图状态机协调实现场景分类、自然语言对话和语义压缩，减少对下行带宽的依赖。
AI.motivation: 地球观测数据生成速度超过下行带宽和人工处理能力，导致星上采集与地面情报之间出现越来越大的差距，传统"采集-下传-处理"模式面临带宽瓶颈。
AI.method: 使用Gemma 3视觉-语言模型进行场景分类和文本描述生成，通过LangGraph图状态机协调检测和对话代理，支持纯英文提示重任务调度，采用硬件加速GPU推理，无需针对飞行仪器进行微调。
AI.result: 在AID基准测试集(7960张图像)上达到88.16%准确率，完成Flatsat验证和实时在轨新采集地球图像(包括未校正的YAM-9图像)处理，证明了在卫星级边缘计算机上运行基础模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过在轨语义压缩地球观测实现了传统"采集-下传一切"带宽配置的反转，验证了卫星上运行基础模型进行自主多模态推理的可行性，为未来天基智能处理开辟了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about satellite-based Earth observation using vision-language models for autonomous remote sensing. While it uses a VLM (Gemma 3), this is completely different from the research profile's application domain of Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation. The paper addresses satellite image classification and bandwidth issues, not video-generated motion priors, 3D motion synthesis, or skeleton-based motion representation. It uses no diffusion models, no motion generation methods, and addresses completely different pain points (satellite downlink bandwidth vs. temporal motion consistency). The application domain mismatch is fundamental - remote sensing/space computing vs. computer graphics animation.

title: Skill-MAS: Evolving Meta-Skill for Automatic Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based automatic Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) generation has become a crucial frontier for tackling complex tasks. However, existing methods face a dilemma between model capability and experience retention. Inference-time MAS leverages frozen frontier LLMs but repeats identical searches without learning from past experience. Conversely, Training-time MAS internalizes experience via gradient updates but is constrained by the low capability ceiling of smaller models, and is hard to scale to large frontier LLMs. To bridge this gap, we propose Skill-MAS, a novel third path that decouples experience retention from parametric updates by conceptualizing the high-level orchestration capability as an evolvable Meta-Skill. Skill-MAS refines this architectural knowledge through a closed optimization loop: (1) Multi-Trajectory Rollout samples a behavioral distribution for each task under the current Meta-Skill; and (2) Selective Reflection adaptively selects priority tasks and applies hierarchical contrastive analysis to distill systemic experience into generalizable, strategy-level principles. Extensive experiments across four complex benchmarks and four distinct LLMs demonstrate that Skill-MAS not only achieves remarkable performance gains but also maintains a favorable cost-performance trade-off. Further analysis reveals that the evolved Meta-Skills are highly robust and exhibit strong transferability across unseen tasks and different LLMs.

AI.tldr: Skill-MAS提出了一种新的第三路径来构建基于LLM的多智能体系统，通过将高级编排能力概念化为可进化的"元技能"，在保留经验和保持模型能力之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有方法面临两难困境：推理时MAS利用冻结的前沿LLM但无法从过去经验中学习；训练时MAS通过梯度更新内化经验但受限于较小模型的能力上限，且难以扩展到大型LLM。
AI.method: Skill-MAS通过闭合优化循环 refining 架构知识：(1)多轨迹 rollout 在当前元技能下为每个任务采样行为分布；(2)选择性反思自适应地选择优先任务并应用层次对比分析将系统经验提炼为可泛化的策略级原则。
AI.result: 在四个复杂基准和四个不同LLM上的广泛实验表明，Skill-MAS不仅实现了显著的性能提升，而且保持了良好的成本-性能权衡。进一步分析显示，进化的元技能具有高度鲁棒性，并在未见过的任务和不同LLM之间表现出强大的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: Skill-MAS代表了一种新的LLM-MAS构建范式，成功地在经验保留和模型能力之间取得了平衡，为复杂任务处理提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based multi-agent systems (Skill-MAS), which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile specifically targets video-generated motion priors, diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion generation, and visual quality assessment in graphics. This paper addresses none of those areas - it's about meta-skill evolution for LLM agents, not about computer graphics, motion synthesis, or any related methods. The application domain is entirely different (AI agents vs computer graphics).

title: Repair Entropy in Dynamic Geometric Nearest-Neighbour Structures
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables; code and dataset provided as ancillary files
summary: We study dynamic geometric data structures for exact nearest-neighbour maintenance under small motions. For each point we store a certificate consisting of its nearest neighbour and the two smallest neighbour distances, with clearance $c_i=d^i_2-d^i_1$. A triangle-inequality argument gives a sharp validity radius: after a step of maximum displacement $\varepsilon$, every certificate with $c_i>4\varepsilon$ remains valid, so all possible failures are confined to a repair frontier $F_t$. We introduce repair-frontier entropy $H(F_t)$, the normalized Shannon entropy of failed certificates over index cells, as a workload descriptor for choosing between event-driven repair, batched repair, and full rebuild. The resulting maintenance rule repairs only the frontier in $O(|F_t|\log N)$ time under bounded cell occupancy, while a full rebuild costs $Θ(N)$; moreover, entropy lower-bounds the number of frontier cells touched by event-driven repair and shifts the empirical repair-rebuild crossover. We evaluate ten motion families in $d\in{2,3}$, with $N$ up to $16,000$, using an exact tiled GPU oracle and a GPU grid rebuild as ground truth and competitor. Across $2400$ labelled transitions, the validity rule misses no invalid certificate, low-pressure frontiers are usually cheaper to repair incrementally, and diffuse frontiers of the same size are more expensive for event-driven repair but not for batched repair. The released dataset records frontier geometry, certificate audits, per-strategy times, and best-strategy labels.

AI.tldr: 研究动态几何数据结构，实现小运动下的精确最近邻维护。通过存储包含最近邻和两个最小邻居距离的证书（间隙ci=d2-d1），利用三角形不等式给出清晰的有效性半径：位移ε后，ci>4ε的证书保持有效。引入修复前沿熵H(Ft)作为工作负载描述符，在事件驱动修复、批量修复和完全重建之间选择。修复规则仅修复前沿，时间复杂度O(|Ft|log N)，完全重建需Θ(N)。在d∈{2,3}、N达16000的10种运动族上评估，2400个标记转换中有效性规则无误报，低压前沿通常更便宜，弥散前沿对事件驱动修复更贵。
AI.motivation: 实现小运动下精确最近邻的高效动态维护，避免每次更新都进行完全重建，提高动态最近邻查询的效率。
AI.method: 证书方法：每个点存储最近邻和两个最小邻居距离，间隙ci=d2-d1；基于三角形不等式确定有效性半径ci>4ε；引入修复前沿熵H(Ft)作为选择修复策略的工作负载描述符；修复规则仅处理前沿在O(|Ft|log N)时间内完成。
AI.result: 有效性规则在2400个标记转换中无误报；低压前沿通常更适合增量修复；相同大小的弥散前沿对事件驱动修复更贵但对批量修复不然；完全重建需Θ(N)时间。
AI.conclusion: 修复前沿熵H(Ft)下界事件驱动修复触及的前沿单元数量，改变修复-重建交叉点经验值；该方法在动态最近邻维护中有效平衡了效率与准确性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about dynamic geometric nearest-neighbor data structures (computational geometry), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on video-generated motion priors and 3D motion generation using diffusion models. While nearest-neighbor concepts could be tangentially related to spatial proximity in graphics, the paper does not address any of the pain points: it doesn't deal with video generation, motion priors, visual guidance features, quality assessment, or temporal consistency in synthesized animations. The application domain is completely different - this is a theoretical data structures paper for geometric queries, not a computer graphics/motion generation paper.

title: CAOA -- Completion-Assisted Object-CAD Alignment
summary: Accurately aligning CAD models to their corresponding objects in indoor RGB-D scans is a central challenge in 3D semantic reconstruction. The task requires estimating a 9-Degree-of-Freedom (DoF) pose-position, rotation, and scale along three axes-but is hindered by noisy and incomplete scans, as well as segmentation errors that cause geometric distortions. We present Completion-Assisted Object-CAD Alignment (CAOA), a method that integrates a semantically and contextually aware point cloud completion module with a symmetry-aware relative pose estimation algorithm, enabling precise alignment of CAD models to scanned objects. Existing completion methods are typically trained and evaluated on synthetic datasets, which often fail to generalize to real-world scans. To bridge this gap, we introduce a synthetic data generation strategy tailored to indoor scenes, significantly reducing the synthetic-to-real domain gap-validated through quantitative comparisons with widely used completion datasets. In addition, we release S2C-Completion, an expert-annotated dataset of over 8,500 object-CAD pairs from Scan2CAD, created for real-world indoor single-object completion and intended as a new benchmark for this task. For object-CAD alignment, we incorporate symmetry information via a symmetry-aware loss, improving robustness to symmetric ambiguities. On the Scan2CAD benchmark, CAOA achieves a 17% accuracy improvement over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAOA方法，将点云补全模块与对称性感知的相对姿态估计相结合，实现CAD模型与室内RGB-D扫描中物体的精确对齐，并引入针对室内场景的合成数据生成策略及S2C-Completion数据集。
AI.motivation: 室内RGB-D扫描存在噪声、不完整以及分割错误导致的的几何畸变，使得9自由度姿态估计（位置、旋转、尺度）面临挑战，现有补全方法在合成数据集上训练难以泛化到真实扫描。
AI.method: 提出Completion-Assisted Object-CAD Alignment (CAOA)方法，整合语义和上下文感知的点云补全模块与对称性感知的相对姿态估计算法；引入针对室内场景的合成数据生成策略以缩小域差距；构建包含8500+物体-CAD对的S2C-Completion数据集；设计对称性感知损失函数处理对称模糊性。
AI.result: 在Scan2CAD基准测试中，CAOA相比现有最优方法实现17%的精度提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过补全模块与对称性感知相结合的策略，CAOA有效提升了CAD模型与真实扫描物体的对齐精度，为室内场景的3D语义重建提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors and 3D motion synthesis from video (temporal animation), while this paper addresses CAD-to-RGB-D scan alignment and point cloud completion for object pose estimation (static spatial positioning). Although both involve 3D, they are in fundamentally different subfields - motion generation vs. object alignment. The CAOA paper does not address any of the pain points: video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, visual guidance features, or diffusion-based video generation.

title: CaVe-VLM-CoT: An Interpretable Vision-Language Model Framework
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remain prone to hallucinations, producing fluent but visually unfaithful outputs. Existing chain-of-thought and retrieval-augmented methods only partially address this, as they neither enforce step-level citation grounding nor route verification failures back to retrieval for correction. We present CaVe-VLM-CoT, a modular reflection-based agentic-RAG framework that enforces evidence-grounded reasoning through a five-stage closed-loop pipeline: Extractor, Retriever, Solver, Citation Injector, and Verifier, in which detected ungrounded claims trigger structured feedback to the Extractor for targeted re-retrieval. Since no existing framework jointly measures retrieval quality, step-wise citation faithfulness, and cross-modal grounding, we propose a suite of 23 component-wise metrics across all stages, anchored by CaVeScore, a composite metric weighting accuracy, citation precision and recall, attribution, and evidence grounding. Without any architectural or prompt modifications, CaVe-VLM-CoT achieves 87.1\% accuracy and 56.6\% CaVeScore on ScienceQA , and 55.2\% accuracy and 35.7\% CaVeScore on MMMU (30 subjects).

AI.tldr: CaVe-VLM-CoT是一种基于反思的模块化代理RAG框架，通过五阶段闭环管道解决视觉语言模型的幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型(VLM)容易产生幻觉，生成流畅但视觉上不忠实的内容。现有方法无法强制执行逐步引用的 grounded 验证，也无法将验证失败反馈回检索进行修正
AI.method: 提出五阶段闭环管道:Extractor(提取器)、Retriever(检索器)、Solver(求解器)、Citation Injector(引用注入器)和Verifier(验证器)。检测到无grounded声明时触发结构化反馈给Extractor进行重新检索。提出23个组件指标和综合指标CaVeScore
AI.result: 在ScienceQA上达到87.1%准确率和56.6% CaVeScore；在MMMU(30科目)上达到55.2%准确率和35.7% CaVeScore
AI.conclusion: 无需任何架构或提示修改，CaVe-VLM-CoT通过证据grounded推理和闭环反馈机制有效减少VLM幻觉

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile is about Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from video (video-generated motion priors, temporal animation consistency, skeleton-based motion). The paper is about Vision-Language Models for hallucination reduction in question answering tasks (ScienceQA, MMMU). While both mention "VLM," the goals are entirely different: the profile needs VLM for quality assessment of generated animations, while the paper uses VLM to reduce hallucinations in factual QA. There is no match in methods (no diffusion models, video generation, 3D motion generation, skeleton-based representation) and the pain points are unrelated.

title: A Technical Taxonomy of LLM Agent Communication Protocols
summary: As large language models (LLMs) advance and multi-agent systems aim to overcome the limits of standalone agents, robust communication protocols are becoming essential infrastructure for distributed agent networks. Nonetheless, the fragmented protocol landscape presents a significant interoperability challenge. This study develops a technical taxonomy to classify and analyze LLM agent communication protocols. Following an established iterative method, we defined the taxonomy's purpose, meta-characteristic, and ending conditions, then performed five iterations, three empirical-to-conceptual and two conceptual-to-empirical, on nine actively maintained open-source protocols with demonstrable adoption. The taxonomy comprises five dimensions: counterparty, payload, interaction state, discovery mechanism, and schema flexibility. Classification reveals recurring architectural patterns: all sampled agent-to-agent protocols combine hybrid payloads with session-state persistence; most protocols support multiple predefined schemas, and two negotiate schemas at runtime, indicating a trend toward schema flexibility; decentralized discovery remains rare. Analysis suggests short-term convergence pressure toward protocols unifying agent-to-agent and agent-to-context (tool and data) communication. Long-term, however, no single protocol is likely to maximize versatility, efficiency, and portability simultaneously. The field will more likely evolve toward a federated, layered protocol stack. The framework guides protocol selection and highlights open research gaps such as privacy and policy enforcement.}

AI.tldr: 本研�构建了一个技术分类体系来对LLM智能体通信协议进行分类和分析，涵盖五个维度：对等方、有效载荷、交互状态、发现机制和模式灵活性。该分类体系通过分析9个开源协议揭示了架构模式并预测了发展趋势。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型的发展和多智能体系统克服单一智能体局限的需求增加，强大的通信协议成为分布式智能体网络的重要基础设施。然而，协议景观的碎片化带来了显著的互操作性挑战，需要系统性的分类框架来指导协议选择和研究。
AI.method: 采用established迭代方法，定义了分类体系的目的、元特征和结束条件，进行了五轮迭代（三轮经验到概念，两轮概念到经验），分析了9个具有显著采用量的活跃维护的开源协议。
AI.result: 分类体系包含五个维度：counterparty、payload、interaction state、discovery mechanism和schema flexibility。分类结果显示：所有采样的智能体间协议结合混合payload与session-state持久化；大多数协议支持多个预定义模式；两个协议在运行时协商模式，表明向模式灵活性发展的趋势；去中心化发现仍然罕见。分析预测短期收敛压力将推动协议统一智能体到智能体和智能体到上下文（工具和数据）通信。
AI.conclusion: 长期而言，没有单一协议可能同时最大化多功能性、效率和可移植性，该领域更可能演化为 federated layered protocol stack。该框架指导协议选择并突出了隐私和政策执法等开放研究空白。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM Agent Communication Protocols - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It discusses taxonomy of multi-agent communication protocols, distributed agent networks, and protocol interoperability. There is no connection to video generation, motion generation, diffusion models, visual guidance features, 3D motion representation, or any other computer graphics domain. The application domain is entirely different (LLM agents/networking vs computer graphics/motion synthesis).

title: Tangent Spheres and Integer Distances
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. To appear at the Canadian Conference on Computational Geometry (CCCG 2026)
summary: The Erdős-Anning theorem states that any point set for which all distances are integers, in a Euclidean space of any dimension, must be either finite or collinear. We prove the same result in hyperbolic space of any dimension. A quantitative form of our result also extends for the first time to Euclidean spaces of dimension greater than two: if a set of points with integer distances in $\mathbb{E}^D$ or $\mathbb{H}^D$ has a subset of $D+1$ points in general position whose diameter is $d$, then the whole set has size $O(D(d+1)^D)$. To prove these results we formulate a lemma that, if the graph of external tangencies of a system of spheres in Euclidean or hyperbolic space contains a $K_{a,b}$ subgraph for $a,b\ge 3$, then the sets of spheres on each side of this biclique have centers that lie on a hyperplane. This lemma also implies that, in multilateration (determining a position from differences of distances to known landmarks), $D+1$ non-coplanar landmarks always suffice to limit the position to two possibilities.

AI.tldr: The Erdős-Anning theorem states that any infinite set of points with integer distances in Euclidean space must be collinear. This paper extends the theorem to hyperbolic space of any dimension and provides quantitative bounds for both Euclidean and hyperbolic spaces. A key lemma about the external tangencies of sphere systems is also applied to multilateration problems.
AI.motivation: The original Erdős-Anning theorem only applies to Euclidean spaces. The researchers aimed to: (1) prove the same result holds in hyperbolic space, (2) provide quantitative bounds for point sets with integer distances in higher dimensions, and (3) develop a lemma that can be applied to multilateration problems.
AI.method: The researchers formulated a lemma concerning the graph of external tangencies of a system of spheres in Euclidean or hyperbolic space. They proved that if this graph contains a K_{a,b} subgraph (complete bipartite graph with a,b ≥ 3), then the sets of spheres on each side have centers lying on a hyperplane. This geometric lemma was then used to establish the integer distance results and multilateration bounds.
AI.result: The main results include: (1) proving the Erdős-Anning theorem in hyperbolic space of any dimension, (2) establishing a quantitative bound: if a set of points with integer distances in E^D or H^D has a subset of D+1 points in general position with diameter d, then the whole set has size O(D(d+1)^D), and (3) showing that in multilateration, D+1 non-coplanar landmarks always suffice to limit the position to two possibilities.
AI.conclusion: This work extends the classical Erdős-Anning theorem from Euclidean to hyperbolic spaces, provides the first quantitative bounds for higher-dimensional Euclidean spaces, and demonstrates the practical applicability of the sphere tangency lemma to multilateration problems. The theorem ensures that infinite integer-distance sets remain collinear even in hyperbolic geometry.

relevance_reason: This is a pure mathematics paper about the Erdős-Anning theorem and integer distances in Euclidean/hyperbolic space. The application domain is pure geometry/discrete mathematics, not Computer Graphics. It has no relevance to video-generated motion priors, diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion generation, visual language models, or any of the methods and pain points in the research profile. This is entirely different field - pure math vs computer graphics/animation.

title: RegimeVGGT: Layer-Wise Spatially Preserving Redundancy Removal for Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. Jinhao You, Shuo Lyu, Zhuohang Lyu, Tanxuan Li, and Zibo Zhao contributed equally. Shuo Lyu is the corresponding author
summary: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) recovers dense 3D scene structure from multi-view images in one forward pass, but quadratic cross-frame attention limits its scalability. Existing training-free accelerators reduce computation uniformly along one axis, missing layer heterogeneity. Our spectral, probing, and causal analyses reveal three regimes: shallow layers lack cross-view structure, middle layers drive cross-view alignment, and deep layers are redundant for dense geometry yet their cross-frame attention remains essential for pose. RegimeVGGT applies layer-wise U-shaped compression along two axes: Saliency-Guided Banded Merging protects geometry- and edge-salient tokens, while Selectively Protected K/V Downsampling preserves cross-frame spatial coverage and the pose-critical path through a phase-shifted spatial grid, a reference-frame anchor, and uncompressed camera/register tokens. Training-free, RegimeVGGT achieves a 6.7x speedup over VGGT* at matched reconstruction quality.

AI.tldr: RegimeVGGT是一种针对VGGT的训练无需加速方法，通过分析Transformer层的三种不同 regime（浅层、中层、深层），采用双轴U形压缩策略，在保护几何显著token和姿态关键路径的同时，实现6.7倍加速。
AI.motivation: VGGT虽能从多视图图像一次性恢复密集3D场景结构，但其二次方跨帧注意力限制了可扩展性。现有训练无需加速器沿单一轴均匀减少计算，未能利用层的异质性。
AI.method: 通过频谱、探测和因果分析揭示三层regime：浅层缺乏跨视图结构，中层驱动跨视图对齐，深层对密集几何冗余但其跨帧注意力对姿态至关重要。RegimeVGGT采用双轴U形压缩：1）显著性导向的带状合并保护几何和边缘显著token；2）选择性保护的K/V下采样保留跨帧空间覆盖和姿态关键路径（相位偏移空间网格、参考帧锚点、未压缩相机/寄存器token）。
AI.result: 训练无需的RegimeVGGT在匹配重建质量下实现相对VGGT*的6.7倍加速。
AI.conclusion: 通过识别Transformer不同层的功能差异并采用针对性压缩策略，可在保持重建质量的同时显著提升效率，为3D场景重建的实时应用提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses an entirely different application domain. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors, 3D motion synthesis from video, and temporal motion modeling using diffusion models. In contrast, this paper (RegimeVGGT) is about multi-view 3D scene reconstruction - extracting geometric structure from multiple images. While both are in Computer Graphics, this is geometry reconstruction, NOT motion generation. The methods are also completely different: the profile uses diffusion-based video generation and skeleton-based motion representation, while this paper uses transformer-based geometry processing with regime analysis and compression. There is no alignment with the pain points (motion quality, temporal consistency, semantic gap between 2D/3D) or the methods specified in the profile.

title: Searching for Synergy in Shared Workspace Human-AI Collaboration
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Human-AI Co-Creativity. 13 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
summary: Automated AI agents are increasingly capable, yet many scientific and professional tasks require human judgment and contextual expertise. We study shared-workspace human-AI teams, where AI agents and human collaborators must coordinate responsibilities before submitting a final answer. Using the Collaborative Gym environment with DiscoveryBench tasks, we examine when adding simulated human collaborators improves performance and when process loss turns additional collaborators into coordination overhead. Across 1,482 sessions, adding relevant collaborators can lower performance when teams lack structure to coordinate their contributions. We then evaluate scaffolding that combines shared group memory with simulated human-in-the-loop (HITL) gates, where selected actions require approval from a designated simulated participant. This scaffolding yields higher mean performance, most clearly in three-person teams, with clearer responsibility signals and stronger routing of expertise to team actions. Overall, how human-AI teams coordinate and integrate expertise matters as much as the capability available to them.

AI.tldr: 研究共享工作空间中人类-AI团队的协作问题，探讨何时添加人类协作方能提升性能，以及协调结构如何影响团队表现。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理能力增强，许多科学和专业任务仍需要人类判断和情境专业知识，需要研究人类-AI团队如何有效协调职责。
AI.method: 使用Collaborative Gym环境和DiscoveryBench任务，分析1482个会话，测试添加模拟人类协作方的效果，并评估结合共享群体记忆和模拟人-在-环(HITL)门的脚手架方案。
AI.result: 当团队缺乏协调结构时添加相关协作方会降低性能；这种脚手架方案提高了平均性能，在三人团队中效果最明显，并产生更清晰的责任信号和更强的专业知识路由。
AI.conclusion: 人类-AI团队如何协调和整合专业知识与其所具备的能力同样重要。

relevance_reason: This paper is about human-AI team collaboration and coordination in shared workspaces, focusing on organizational behavior and task allocation between humans and AI agents. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D motion generation, diffusion models, skeleton-based motion representation, or any visual/motion synthesis tasks. The application domain is completely different - it's in the field of Human-Computer Interaction and AI coordination, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: Data Intelligence Agents: Interpreting, Modeling, and Querying Enterprise Data via Autonomous Coding Agents
summary: Production data integration is bottlenecked by repeated, lossy handoffs between data owners, engineers, and analysts who must collaboratively discover, structure, and query enterprise data. We present Data Intelligence Agents (DIA), a system of three agents (Data Interpreter, Schema Creator, and Query Generator) that compresses this workflow by treating autonomous coding agents (ACAs) as a first-class abstraction: rather than emitting text, the agents generate, execute, validate, and repair concrete artifacts, draw on a shared memory for experience reuse, and surface each for review by domain experts. DIA is deployed in production for enterprise customers. We study the Query Generator in depth and evaluate it in fully autonomous mode across seven SQL benchmarks spanning four task categories and four dialects. It matches or surpasses the best published results on all seven, demonstrating that an architecture grounded in execution, built on ACAs and a shared memory, generalizes across the data intelligence workload with adaptation confined to natural-language instructions.

AI.tldr: Data Intelligence Agents (DIA)是一个企业数据智能系统，包含三个代理（Data Interpreter、Schema Creator和Query Generator），通过自主编码 agents (ACAs) 作为核心抽象，将数据生产流程中的重复、有损耗的交接压缩简化。该系统已投入企业生产使用，重点研究了Query Generator，并在七个SQL基准测试上取得最先进结果。
AI.motivation: 企业数据整合工作面临瓶颈：数据所有者、工程师和分析师之间需要反复交接数据，这一过程存在信息损耗且效率低下。生产数据整合被限制在重复的、有损耗的交接流程中，各方需要协作发现、构建和查询企业数据。
AI.method: DIA系统采用三个专用代理架构：Data Interpreter负责数据发现和解释，Schema Creator负责模式构建，Query Generator负责SQL查询生成。这些代理不是输出文本，而是生成、执行、验证和修复具体的代码制品，并从共享内存中获取经验进行复用，同时为领域专家提供审查界面。
AI.result: Query Generator在七个SQL基准测试（涵盖四个任务类别和四种SQL方言）上进行评估，在完全自主模式下运行，结果匹配或超越所有已发布的最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 基于执行、构建在ACAs和共享内存之上的架构，能够适应自然语言指令的调整，泛化到整个数据智能工作负载。这是一个有前景的企业数据智能解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about enterprise data management and SQL query generation using autonomous coding agents, which has NO relevance to Computer Graphics. The application domain is completely different - it's about data engineering and database queries, not video generation, motion synthesis, or 3D animation. The methods (autonomous coding agents, SQL generation) are entirely unrelated to diffusion-based video generation, visual language models for quality assessment, or skeleton-based motion representation. This addresses none of the pain points in the research profile.

title: A Neural Network Framework for Geodesic-Like Curve Computation on Parametric Surfaces
summary: The concept of geodesic-like curves was introduced by Chen in 2010 as a method for estimating shortest paths (geodesics) on parametric surfaces, with its convergence established theoretically. However, an efficient numerical computational framework has not yet been developed. In this paper, we propose an elegant and efficient approach for computing geodesic-like curves by leveraging deep learning and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs). Under the proposed framework, not only can single parametric surfaces be handled efficiently, but a broad class of complex parametric surfaces including multi-surface systems with $C^0$ or higher continuity and surfaces of revolution can also be robustly addressed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于深度学习和物理信息神经网络（PINN）的计算参数曲面上测地线类曲线的高效方法，可处理单参数曲面和多曲面系统。
AI.motivation: 2010年陈提出了测地线类曲线的概念用于估计参数曲面上的最短路径，但缺乏有效的数值计算框架。
AI.method: 利用深度学习和物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架计算测地线类曲线。
AI.result: 能够高效处理单参数曲面以及具有C^0或更高连续性的多曲面系统和旋转曲面。
AI.conclusion: 为各类参数曲面上的测地线类曲线计算提供了一种优雅高效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses geodesic curve computation on parametric surfaces using PINN, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile. While both are technically in computer graphics, this paper focuses on computational geometry for shortest path estimation, not video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, or temporal animation synthesis. The pain points, methods (PINN vs diffusion models), and applications are entirely different - this paper deals with geometric curve computation, not the video-to-3D-motion synthesis that the research profile addresses.

title: Reasoning as Intersection: Consensus-Frame Alignment for Visual Focus in Video-MLLMs
summary: Reinforcement learning has improved the reasoning ability of large language models, but applying outcome-only rewards to video multimodal large language models (Video-MLLMs) provides limited guidance on which visual evidence should support the answer. Inspired by multisensory integration, where consistent cues can enhance the salience and reliability of perceptual estimates, we introduce Consensus Frame GRPO (CF-GRPO), a temporal-annotation-free process-level reward framework for evidence-aware video reasoning. CF-GRPO constructs a consensus frame prior from intrinsic video cues, including temporal coverage, scene-transition cues, and query-conditioned visual relevance. It then computes a model-side frame-use score from visual and response representations and optimizes their agreement through the Consensus Frame Reward (CFR). With salience-aware sparse aggregation and distribution sharpening, CFR provides a high-contrast reward signal without requiring human temporal annotations. Experiments show that VideoCFR achieves competitive performance across complex video reasoning benchmarks and improves several metrics over representative Video-MLLM and RL baselines, while the consensus prior provides an interpretable view of the evidence frames emphasized during training. The implementation is available at https://github.com/1Pansy/VideoCFR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CF-GRPO（共识帧GRPO）框架，无需人工时间标注即可增强视频多模态大模型的证据感知推理能力。该方法通过构建共识帧先验，结合视频内在线索（时序覆盖、场景转换、查询条件视觉相关性）来识别关键证据帧，并利用共识帧奖励（CFR）优化模型对视觉证据的利用。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习虽能提升大语言模型的推理能力，但对视频多模态大模型（Video-MLLMs）仅使用结果奖励，难以指导模型理解哪些视觉证据应支持答案。受多感官整合启发——一致性线索可增强感知估计的显著性和可靠性——作者认为需要一种能够识别和利用关键证据帧的奖励机制。
AI.method: CF-GRPO分三步构建：1）从视频内在线索（时序覆盖、场景转换、查询条件视觉相关性）构建共识帧先验；2）从视觉和响应表示中计算模型侧帧使用分数；3）通过共识帧奖励（CFR）优化两者一致性，配合显著性感知稀疏聚合和分布锐化，无需人工时间标注即可提供高对比度奖励信号。
AI.result: VideoCFR在复杂视频推理基准上达到竞争性能，多项指标优于代表性的Video-MLLM和RL基线方法，共识先验还提供了训练中强调的证据帧的可解释视图。
AI.conclusion: CF-GRPO成功实现了无人工时间标注的过程级奖励框架，通过共识机制引导视频多模态模型聚焦关键视觉证据，为证据感知视频推理提供了一种有效且可解释的训练范式。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation/animation synthesis from video using diffusion models. The paper is about Video-MLLMs for video understanding and visual reasoning (VQA tasks). No overlap in methods: this paper uses reinforcement learning (GRPO) for evidence identification in video QA, not motion generation, diffusion models, skeleton-based representation, or quality assessment for generated content. The VLM here is used for video understanding, not for quality assessment of generated animations. These are fundamentally different research directions despite both dealing with video.

title: CEO-Bench: Can Agents Play the Long Game?
summary: Language model agents are becoming proficient executors at isolated, short-horizon tasks such as software engineering and customer service. Yet real-world challenges require a combination of sophisticated skills that remain largely untested in agents: (1) navigating long horizons amid uncertainty; (2) acquiring information in noisy environments; (3) adapting to a changing world; (4) orchestrating multiple moving parts toward a coherent goal. We introduce CEO-Bench, which evaluates these capabilities together by simulating a representative real-world task: operating a startup for 500 days. An agent manages pricing, marketing, budgeting, and many other aspects of a fictional company through a programmable Python interface, operating in the same environment and facing the same challenges as a human CEO. Success demands analyzing noisy, interconnected business databases, translating signals into sound strategy, and coordinating many decisions with programming. The strongest agents write sophisticated code that simulates customer cohorts to forecast future cash and mines negotiation history to uncover hidden customer preferences. Even so, most state-of-the-art models struggle in this environment. Only Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 finish above the $1M starting balance, and neither consistently turns a profit. CEO-Bench takes a first step toward measuring the intelligence required to drive sustained, adaptive progress over time.

AI.tldr: CEO-Bench是一个评估语言模型在模拟商业环境中运营公司500天的能力的基准测试，评估代理在长期不确定性、嘈杂信息获取、适应变化和协调多部分任务方面的技能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的挑战需要多种复杂技能的结合：穿越长期不确定性、在嘈杂环境中获取信息、适应变化的世界、协调多个移动部分。但这些能力在现有代理中基本未被测试。
AI.method: 通过Python接口模拟运营创业公司500天，代理管理定价、营销、预算等公司运营的各个方面，面对与人类CEO相同的环境和挑战。
AI.result: 最强代理能编写复杂代码模拟客户队列预测未来现金流，挖掘谈判历史发现隐藏客户偏好。但大多数先进模型在此环境中表现不佳，仅Claude Opus 4.8和GPT-5.5超过100万美元起始余额，无一能持续盈利。
AI.conclusion: CEO-Bench为评估AI在推动长期、适应性进展所需的智能方面迈出了第一步。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating language models in a business simulation environment (CEO-Bench), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has no connection to video generation, motion priors, 3D motion generation, skeleton-based representations, or any of the visual/motion synthesis methods mentioned in the research profile. This is a pure LLM/agent benchmark paper in a completely different application domain.

title: Decoupling Search from Reasoning: A Vendor-Agnostic Grounding Architecture for LLM Agents
summary: Production LLM agents increasingly depend on real-time search, yet native search grounding bundles retrieval policy, provider choice, evidence injection, cost, latency, and generation behavior behind a single model-provider boundary. This coupling makes grounding hard to inspect, tune, reuse, or port, and can trigger Search-Induced Verbosity that breaks strict output contracts. We present Decoupled Search Grounding (DSG), a vendor-agnostic boundary that moves grounding outside the reasoning model through an MCP-compatible gateway, exposing provider routing, source-aware context rendering, configured fallback, retrieval-depth control, and exact plus semantic caching as first-class controls. Across five frontier models on SimpleQA, FreshQA, and HotpotQA, native search leads on recency-sensitive FreshQA, but DSG exposes a stronger frontier when control matters: on SimpleQA it nearly matches native accuracy (86.1% vs. 87.7%) at 91% lower search cost, preserves concise answer contracts, and reaches a 99.4% warm-cache hit rate with 68% lower latency. Deployed as a shared production grounding layer for large-scale agentic workloads with interchangeable models, DSG matches or slightly exceeds native-search accuracy on an e-commerce query-understanding (QIU) workload while cutting search cost by over 98%. Real-time grounding is best treated as an optimizable interface boundary, not a fixed model feature.

AI.tldr: 提出了Decoupled Search Grounding (DSG)框架，将实时搜索 grounding从推理模型中解耦出来，作为可优化的接口边界，而非固定的模型功能。
AI.motivation: 原生搜索在时间敏感的 FreshQA 上领先，但 DSG 在需要控制时展现出更强优势：在 SimpleQA 上几乎匹配原生准确率（86.1% vs 87.7%），搜索成本降低 91%，保持简洁答案契约，暖缓存命中率达 99.4%，延迟降低 68%。在电商查询理解工作负载上，DSG 匹配或略超原生搜索准确率，搜索成本降低超过 98%。
AI.method: 通过MCP兼容的网关实现解耦搜索 grounding，暴露提供商路由、源感知上下文渲染、配置回退、检索深度控制以及精确和语义缓存作为一等控制。在 SimpleQA、FreshQA 和 HotpotQA 三个数据集上评估了五个前沿模型。
AI.result: DSG 在 SimpleQA 上几乎匹配原生准确率（86.1% vs 87.7%），搜索成本降低 91%，保持简洁答案契约，暖缓存命中率达 99.4%，延迟降低 68%。在电商查询理解工作负载上匹配或略超原生搜索准确率，搜索成本降低超过 98%。
AI.conclusion: 实时 grounding 应被视为可优化的接口边界，而非固定的模型功能。DSG 作为大规模 Agent 工作负载的共享生产 grounding 层，实现了模型的互换性。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The research profile is in Computer Graphics (video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, diffusion-based visual synthesis), while this paper is about LLM agent architectures and search grounding - an entirely different field in AI/NLP systems. No connection to computer graphics, motion generation, video synthesis, or any visual content generation methods.

title: Domain Generalizable Adaptation of 3D Vision-Language Models via Regularized Fine-Tuning
comment: Accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
summary: Domain adaptation remains a central challenge in 3D vision, especially for multimodal foundation models that align 3D point clouds with visual and textual data. While these models demonstrate strong general capabilities, adapting them to downstream domains with limited data often leads to overfitting and catastrophic forgetting. To address this, we introduce ReFine3D, a regularized fine-tuning framework designed for domain-generalizable tuning of 3D large multimodal models (LMMs). ReFine3D combines selective layer tuning with two targeted regularization strategies: multi-view consistency across augmented point clouds and text diversity through synonym-based prompts generated by large language models. Additionally, we incorporate point-rendered vision supervision and a test-time augmentation mechanism with confidence-based aggregation to further enhance robustness. Extensive experiments across different 3D domain generalization benchmarks show that ReFine3D improves base-to-novel class generalization by 1.36%, cross-dataset transfer by 2.43%, robustness to corruption by 1.80%, and few-shot accuracy by up to 3.11%, outperforming prior state-of-the-art methods with minimal added computational overhead.

AI.tldr: ReFine3D是一种用于3D大型多模态模型(LMMs)的域自适应微调框架,通过选择性层调优、多视图一致性、文本多样性、点渲染视觉监督和测试时增强等正则化策略,在有限数据下实现域泛化微调。
AI.motivation: 3D视觉中的域适应是核心挑战,尤其是将3D点云与视觉和文本数据对齐的多模态基础模型。虽然这些模型展现出强大的通用能力,但在有限数据条件下将其适配到下游领域常导致过拟合和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: ReFine3D框架结合了:(1)选择性层调优;(2)多视图一致性(跨增强点云);(3)文本多样性(通过大型语言模型生成的同义词提示);(4)点渲染视觉监督;(5)测试时增强机制与置信度聚合。
AI.result: 在不同3D域泛化基准测试中,ReFine3D将基类到新类泛化提升1.36%,跨数据集迁移提升2.43%,抗腐蚀鲁棒性提升1.80%,少样本精度提升最高3.11%,以最小计算开销超越先前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ReFine3D通过多正则化策略有效解决了3D LMMs在有限数据域适应中的过拟合和灾难性遗忘问题,在多个基准测试中取得显著性能提升,为3D视觉域泛化提供了一种高效实用的微调范式。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 3D Vision-Language Models for point cloud understanding (3D perception/segmentation), which is a computer vision task, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors, 3D animation synthesis, temporal motion modeling, and skeleton-based motion representation - all for graphics generation. While both deal with "3D", the application domains are completely different: this paper is about adapting 3D perception models, not about generating motion or animation. The methods are also misaligned - the profile uses diffusion-based video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), while the paper uses LMM fine-tuning for point cloud tasks. This is essentially a different field (3D vision vs computer graphics motion generation).

title: DeFAb: A Verifiable Benchmark for Defeasible Abduction in Foundation Models
comment: 33 pages, 14 figures, 23 tables. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/PatrickAllenCooper/DeFAb ; code and evaluation harness: https://github.com/PatrickAllenCooper/blanc
summary: A rule-based logic solver resolves every instance in our benchmark in under 50 microseconds with 100% accuracy; the best frontier language model reaches 65% at best and drops to 23.5% under rendering-robust evaluation (worst case over four surface renderings). We introduce DeFAb (Defeasible Abduction Benchmark), a dataset and generation pipeline that converts four decades of publicly funded knowledge bases into formally grounded instances for defeasible abduction: constructing hypotheses that explain anomalies by overriding defaults while preserving unrelated expectations. Because every hypothesis must pass polynomial-time checks for valid derivation, conservativity, and minimality, DeFAb makes logical rigor the instrument for measuring creativity and theoretical reasoning, scoring the disciplined construction of theory revisions rather than fluent but theory-destroying prose. The pipeline pairs taxonomic hierarchies (OpenCyc, YAGO, Wikidata) with behavioral property graphs (ConceptNet, UMLS) to produce 372,648+ instances across 33.75M materialized rules from 18 sources, in three levels with polynomial-time verifiable gold standards. Four frontier models do not reliably internalize defeasible reasoning: rendering-robust Level 2 accuracy is 7.8-23.5%; chain-of-thought variance (~36 pp) exceeds any inter-model gap; and a matched contamination control isolates a +19.4 pp Level 3 gap. We further release DeFAb-Hard (a 235-instance Level 3 difficulty variant; best model 53.3% vs 100% symbolic) and CONJURE (a kernel-verified transformative-creativity variant of 560 Lean 4/Mathlib instances whose gold answers are definitions the proof kernel did not previously contain, judge-free verifier; a pilot finds zero novel concepts). The same verifier doubles as an exact reward for preference optimization (DPO, RLVR/GRPO). Released under MIT at https://huggingface.co/datasets/PatrickAllenCooper/DeFAb.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeFAb（可废性推理基准），一个将四十年公共知识库转化为可废性推理评测任务的数据集和生成管道，用于评估语言模型的理论推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型评测缺乏对可废性推理（defeasible reasoning）的系统评估。可废性推理是指在保留无关期望的同时，通过覆盖默认规则来解释异常假设构建，这是理论创造力和严格逻辑推理的核心。
AI.method:
1) 结合分类层级(OpenCyc/YAGO/Wikidata)与行为属性图(ConceptNet/UMLS)生成372,648+实例 
2) 三个难度级别，均有 polynomial-time 可验证的金标准 
3) 规则-based 逻辑求解器作为完美baseline
4) 渲染鲁棒性评估测试模型泛化能力
AI.result:
1) 规则求解器：100%准确率，<50微秒 
2) 最佳前沿模型：Level 1达65%，渲染鲁棒评估仅23.5% 
3) Level 2渲染鲁棒准确率：7.8-23.5% 
4) 思维链方差(~36pp)超过模型间差距 
5) 污染控制隔离出+19.4pp Level 3差距 
6) DeFAb-Hard：最佳模型53.3% vs 100%符号求解器
AI.conclusion: 当前前沿语言模型无法可靠内化可废性推理能力，渲染鲁棒评估显示显著性能下降。DeFAb提供了严格的逻辑推理评测基准，可用于偏好优化(DPO/RLVR)的精确奖励信号。

relevance_reason: This paper is about defeasible reasoning in language models using knowledge bases (OpenCyc, YAGO, Wikidata, ConceptNet). It has NO relevance to the research profile which is in Computer Graphics focusing on diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion generation, skeleton-based motion representation, and temporal animation synthesis. The application domain is completely different - NLP/AI reasoning vs computer graphics/video-to-motion generation. The methods are also entirely unrelated - logical reasoning solvers vs diffusion models and visual guidance extraction.

title: Data-Forcing Distillation: Restoring Diversity and Fidelity in Few-Step Video Generation
summary: Recent progress has shown promise in distilling multi-step video diffusion models into efficient few-step students. Among them, Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) and its successor DMD2 achieved strong generation quality and fast convergence. However, due to the nature of the reverse Kullback--Leibler (KL) objective, these methods exhibit two persistent failure modes: a substantial drop in sample diversity, and visibly over-saturated outputs that deviate from real-video appearance. In this work, we propose Data-Forcing Distillation (DFD), a simple post-training framework that restores diversity and fidelity in DMD with only a single-line of code change. At its core is the teacher score discrepancy to guide the student toward the real-data distribution, pulling it to missing modes (mitigating mode collapse) and away from problematic modes absent in real data (avoiding over-saturation). We provide an in-depth theoretical analysis of our framework and validate our approach on text-to-video, image-to-video, and autoregressive video generation. With only 100--300 steps of finetuning, DFD effectively restores diversity and fidelity on both Wan2.1-1.3B and Cosmos-Predict2.5-2B model, resolving the over-saturation artifacts with significantly better video dynamics and appearance, and even outperforms the teacher model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Data-Forcing Distillation (DFD)框架，通过教师得分差异指导学生模型恢复真实数据分布，解决DMD方法中样本多样性下降和过度饱和问题，仅需100-300步微调即可在视频生成模型上取得优于教师模型的效果。
AI.motivation: DMD及其改进版DMD2在蒸馏多步视频扩散模型时存在两个持久性问题：1)样本多样性显著下降(模式崩溃)；2)输出过度饱和而偏离真实视频外观。现有方法未能有效解决这些缺陷。
AI.method: 提出DFD框架，通过教师得分差异引导学生模型向真实数据分布优化：1)引导学生向缺失模式移动以缓解模式崩溃；2)引导远离真实数据中不存在的异常模式以避免过度饱和。该方法仅需一行代码修改即可实现。
AI.result: 在Wan2.1-1.3B和Cosmos-Predict2.5-2B模型上验证，仅用100-300步微调即可有效恢复多样性和保真度，解决过度饱和伪影，显著提升视频动态和外观效果，甚至优于教师模型。
AI.conclusion: DFD是一个简单有效的后训练框架，通过教师信号差异引导成功解决了蒸馏过程中的模式崩溃和过度饱和问题，为高效视频生成模型的训练提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 2D VIDEO GENERATION (creating video content), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D MOTION GENERATION from video, skeleton-based motion representation, and semantic gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion. These are fundamentally different application domains. Although both use diffusion-based video generation models (Wanxiang mentioned), the paper's focus on model distillation to fix diversity/saturation issues in 2D video generation does not address the pain points of extracting visual guidance features for 3D motion synthesis or maintaining temporal consistency in 3D animations.

title: Optimizing Lithium Production Decisions under Geological, Demand, and Pricing Uncertainties: A POMDP Framework for Multi-Objective Decision Making
summary: Decision making in lithium production is challenging, whether from an investor's perspective or a strategic production standpoint. Determining which mines to open and when to open them involves not only geological and price uncertainties, but also complexities around the choice of extraction method, from direct lithium extraction to hard rock mining. Prior work explored models of this problem and different methods to optimize mining decisions; these models did not account for uncertainty in pricing, uncertainty in demand, or different mining technologies to extract lithium. Incorporating different pricing models and extraction technology into these models enables more robust strategies for determining not only when and where to open a mine, but also which method of production to pursue. We frame the problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and solve using belief state planning methods to get optimal decision making. In our study, we show that POMDP solvers outperform human inspired heuristics by dynamically adapting to shifting lithium price regimes (static, linear, exponential, and stochastic) through belief state planning and explicit uncertainty management. By optimally sequencing exploration, production, and technology choice, the framework achieves higher demand fulfillment and more balanced economic environmental outcomes over the projects lifetime in all different pricing and deposit scenarios.

AI.tldr: 研究锂矿开采决策优化问题，将地质、价格和需求不确定性以及不同提取技术纳入决策框架。
AI.motivation: 传统锂矿开采决策模型未考虑价格不确定性、需求不确定性及不同采矿技术（如直接锂提取与硬岩开采），需要更 robust 的决策方法来适应市场波动。
AI.method: 将问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(POMDP)，采用信念状态规划方法求解，以处理价格和需求的不确定性。
AI.result: POMDP求解器通过动态适应不同的价格机制（静态、线性、指数和随机）优于人类启发式方法，在所有价格和矿床场景下实现了更高的需求满足和更平衡的经济环境结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够优化勘探、生产和技术选择的排序，为锂矿投资和生产策略提供更优的决策支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about lithium mining production decisions using POMDP - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is operations research/resource management for the mining industry, not video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, or any visual/motion synthesis. There is no match in application domain, methods (diffusion models, VLM, skeleton-based motion), or research area. The only superficial connection is that both use some form of decision-making framework, but that's where the similarity ends.

title: Vines-DB: An RGB image dataset for multi-species ornamental vine segmentation
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure. Source data repository: OSF (DOI: 10.17605/OSF.IO/YJHCK)
summary: The Vines-DB dataset contains 1,218 original high-resolution RGB images of seven ornamental vine species collected under field conditions at the Utah Agricultural Experiment Station's Greenville Research Farm in Logan, Utah, USA. The dataset was generated from 168 individual vine plants that were transplanted in 2022 and photographed repeatedly across multiple months during the 2023 and 2024 growing seasons (July-October). Images were captured with an iPhone 16 Pro equipped with a 48 MP camera between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM under daylight. Vines were grown on 1.2m x 2.4m trellises and photographed from a distance of 1m against black or white Styrofoam backdrops to improve contrast and reduce background noise. The dataset includes Akebia quinata, Campsis radicans, Hydrangea anomala petiolaris, Lonicera x heckrottii, Campsis x tagliabuana 'Madame Galen', Parthenocissus quinquefolia, and Wisteria floribunda. All original images were manually annotated in Roboflow by trained annotators to produce polygon-based instance segmentation masks for eight classes, including seven species and background. After preprocessing and data augmentation, the working dataset was expanded to 2,307 images for model development and evaluation. The augmented dataset was divided into 2,019 training images, 192 validation images, and 96 test images using stratified sampling to maintain balanced representation. Vines-DB supports the development and evaluation of deep learning models for multi-class instance segmentation in precision horticulture and urban ecology. The dataset enables applications such as automated canopy cover estimation, species identification, and scalable field phenotyping. In addition, repeated monthly imaging of the plants captures temporal variation in canopy development and plant appearance, increasing the dataset's utility for segmentation benchmarking under realistic field conditions.

AI.tldr: Vines-DB是一个用于观赏藤本植物实例分割的数据集，包含1,218张原始高分辨率RGB图像（扩充后达2,307张），涵盖7种藤本植物物种，支持深度学习模型开发，用于精准园艺和城市生态学中的多类实例分割任务。
AI.motivation: 精准园艺和城市生态学需要自动化工具进行藤本植物物种识别、冠层覆盖估算和田间表型分析，但缺乏专门针对观赏藤本植物的高质量标注数据集，限制了深度学习模型在园艺领域的应用发展。
AI.method: 在犹他州立大学Greenville研究农场收集168株藤本植物图像，使用iPhone 16 Pro（48MP）在自然光下拍摄，经Roboflow平台手动标注生成多边形实例分割掩膜，进行数据增强后采用分层采样划分为2,019训练、192验证和96测试图像。

title: ForecastBench-Sim: A Simulated-World Forecasting Benchmark
comment: 15 pages, 5 main figures, 6 appendix figures. Spotlight presentation at Forecasting as a New Frontier of Intelligence / Workshop on AI Forecasting, ICML 2026
summary: Forecasting benchmarks for general-purpose AI systems usually inherit the constraints of the real world: outcomes resolve slowly, tail events are rare, and counterfactual questions are difficult to score. We introduce ForecastBench-Sim, a simulated-world forecasting benchmark built on game rollouts from Freeciv, a turn-based strategy game modelled on the Civilization series. Forecasters receive a fixed world report (a structured snapshot of the current game state) and answer questions about hidden future states; the benchmark then continues the simulation and scores forecasts. Because the world is simulated, the same setup can generate continuous or binary forecasting questions at arbitrary time horizons, paired intervention worlds for conditional or causal questions, and resolved examples of rare or disruptive outcomes. We describe the benchmark pipeline, question families, scoring protocol, and release artifacts, and report validation slices from model evaluations and an anonymized human pilot. ForecastBench-Sim is intended to complement real-world forecasting benchmarks by providing controlled, immediately resolvable tasks for studying probabilistic reasoning under dynamic world states.

AI.tldr: ForecastBench-Sim是一个基于Freeciv策略游戏rollout的模拟世界预测基准测试，旨在解决真实世界预测基准的局限性（如结果解决缓慢、尾事件罕见、反事实问题难以评分）。通过提供游戏状态的固定报告，让预测者回答关于隐藏未来状态的问题，然后继续模拟并评分。该基准可生成任意时间范围的连续/二元预测问题、成对干预世界用于因果问题，以及罕见或破坏性结果的resolved示例。
AI.motivation: 真实世界预测基准存在固有约束：结果解决缓慢、尾事件罕见、反事实问题难以评分。这些限制阻碍了对动态世界状态下概率推理的研究。作者旨在创建一个补充真实世界基准的模拟世界基准，提供受控的、可立即解决的任务。
AI.method: 利用Freeciv（类文明系列回合制策略游戏）构建模拟世界。预测者接收固定的世界报告（当前游戏状态的结构化快照），回答关于隐藏未来状态的问题。基准通过继续模拟来评分问题。可生成：1）任意时间范围的连续或二元预测问题；2）用于条件或因果问题的成对干预世界；3）罕见或破坏性结果的resolved示例。
AI.result: 描述了基准管道、问题家族、评分协议和发布 artifacts，并报告了模型评估和匿名人类 pilot 的验证切片。
AI.conclusion: ForecastBench-Sim 通过提供受控的、可立即解决的任务，为研究动态世界状态下的概率推理提供了有价值的补充工具，有望推动AI预测能力的发展。

title: Neural Phase Correlation
summary:
Correspondence is fundamentally relational: it seeks the unknown transformation between two observations of a common scene, not the content of either. Yet the dominant learning-based methods do not represent the transformation as a first-class object in the architecture. They encode each image independently and let a learned similarity function or a deep decoder discover the mapping implicitly. Phase correlation is the canonical exception, measuring the inter-image relationship directly in the Fourier domain, but the rigidity of its fixed basis confines it to global translation.
  We introduce a learned generalization of phase correlation that lifts this restriction by learning the basis on which the transformation decomposes. The same algebraic primitive extends to dense non-rigid deformations and to unitary dynamics. On the ACDC cardiac-MRI benchmark the framework matches or exceeds prior published baselines on both registration directions. On CAMUS echocardiography it matches state-of-the-art without auxiliary scoring or adaptive-smoothness mechanisms. Applied to time-evolved wavefunction pairs of the 1-D quantum harmonic oscillator, the same framework recovers the Hermite-function eigenstates and the quantized energy levels of the unknown Hamiltonian from observation pairs alone.

title: What Must Generalist Agents Remember?
summary: This paper develops a formal account of what generalist agents must store in memory in order to act near-optimally across multiple environments and goals. It shows that when two domains share an observational bottleneck but require incompatible optimal actions, any uniformly near-optimal policy must induce distinct memory distributions at that bottleneck. The result yields a separation theorem: sufficiently successful agents cannot rely only on current state observations, but must preserve domain-relevant information in memory. The paper further shows that if an agent's memory contains enough information to estimate values for related goals, then that memory can be used to approximately reconstruct the agent's local transition dynamics. Together, these results characterize memory as the substrate that supports domain disambiguation, transition-model reconstruction, and planning for generalist agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个形式化理论,说明通用智能体必须在记忆中存储什么才能在多个环境和目标中近乎最优地行动。
AI.motivation: 通用智能体需要在不同环境中保持有效性,但当前观测往往不足以区分需要不同行动策略的环境,因此需要理解记忆在其中的作用。
AI.method: 通过分析两个领域共享观测瓶颈但需要不兼容最优行动的情况,证明任何近乎最优的策略必须在该瓶颈处诱导不同的记忆分布。
AI.result: 提出分离定理:足够成功的智能体不能仅依赖当前状态观测,必须在记忆中保留领域相关信息;并证明如果记忆包含足够信息估计相关目标的价值,则可近似重建局部转移动力学。
AI.conclusion: 记忆是支持领域消歧、转移模型重建和通用智能体规划的基础 substrate(基质)。

The application domain is completely different - this is AI/RL theory, not graphics or animation.

title: Architectural Bias in Face Presentation Attack Detection: A Comparative Study of Vision Transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks
summary: Face Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) systems constitute a critical security layer in biometric authentication; however, existing approaches exhibit systematic performance disparities across demographic groups, disproportionately affecting individuals with darker skin tones. This paper presents a comparative empirical investigation of whether Vision Transformer architectures reduce demographic bias in face PAD systems relative to convolutional baselines. Experiments are conducted on the CASIA-SURF Cross-Ethnicity Face Anti-Spoofing (CeFA) dataset. Three architectures are evaluated: a Multimodal ViT-Tiny trained from scratch, a ResNet18 CNN baseline, and a pretrained DeiT-S fine-tuned on CeFA across African, East Asian, and zero-shot Central Asian demographic groups. DeiT-S achieves the highest overall accuracy of 97.27% and the lowest EER of 0.86%, outperforming ResNet18 at 90.15% accuracy. In terms of fairness, DeiT-S reduces the inter-ethnic ACER gap between African and East Asian subjects to 0.13%, compared to 0.75% reported in an LBP-based work [6], representing an 83% reduction. Most notably, while ResNet18 records a BPCER of 10.44% on zero-shot Central Asian subjects, DeiT-S maintains 2.89% on the same unseen group, demonstrating a 3.6x generalization advantage. These results suggest that pretrained Vision Transformers achieve superior PAD accuracy, produce smaller demographic performance gaps, and generalize more equitably across unseen demographic groups, indicating that cross-demographic fairness in PAD may partly be influenced by architectural design.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了Vision Transformer架构与CNN基线模型在人脸呈现攻击检测(PAD)系统中的 demographic bias 差异。在CeFA数据集上的实验表明，预训练的DeiT-S模型达到97.27%准确率和0.86%的EER，在保持更高准确率的同时，将非裔与东亚人群的ACER差距降低83%，并在零样本中亚人群上展现3.6倍的泛化优势。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸PAD系统存在明显的性能差异，深色皮肤人群的识别准确率显著低于浅色皮肤人群，这种技术偏见可能导致生物识别认证系统对特定人群产生不公平待遇，需要寻找更公平的架构设计方案。
AI.method: 在CASIA-SURF CeFA数据集上比较三种架构：从零开始训练的Multimodal ViT-Tiny、ResNet18 CNN基线、以及在CeFA上微调的预训练DeiT-S，针对非洲、东亚和零样本中亚三个人群进行评估。
AI.result: DeiT-S达到最高97.27%准确率和最低0.86%EER，显著优于ResNet18的90.15%。在公平性方面，DeiT-S将非裔与东亚人群的ACER差距降至0.13%，相比LBP方法的0.75%降低83%。更重要的是，ResNet18在中亚人群的BPCER为10.44%，而DeiT-S仅2.89%，展现3.6倍泛化优势。
AI.conclusion: 预训练的Vision Transformer架构在人脸PAD任务中不仅实现更优的识别准确率，还能产生更小的demographic performance gaps，并在未见人群上展现更好的泛化能力，表明跨人群公平性部分受到架构设计的影响。

title: R2D-RL: A RoboCup 2D Soccer Environment for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Robot soccer is a challenging testbed for multi-agent reinforcement learning because it combines partial observability, cooperative and adversarial interaction, sparse rewards, and long-horizon tactical behavior. RoboCup 2D Soccer Simulation (RCSS2D) provides a mature robot-soccer platform, but its competition-oriented server-client architecture is difficult to use directly with modern Python-based MARL workflows. We introduce R2D-RL, a reinforcement learning environment that connects RCSS2D and HELIOS-based player clients to a Python MARL interface through shared-memory communication and cycle-level synchronization. R2D-RL supports full-field and scenario-based training with configurable opponents, Base discrete and Hybrid parameterized action spaces, action masks, expected possession value (EPV)-based reward shaping, and parallel execution. We provide front-goal scenarios and an 11-vs-11 full-field benchmark, together with baseline results.

AI.tldr: R2D-RL是一个连接RCSS2D机器人足球平台与Python多智能体强化学习接口的框架，支持全场景训练、混合动作空间和并行执行，并提供基准测试。
AI.motivation: Robot soccer是验证多智能体强化学习（MARL）的理想测试平台，但现有RCSS2D平台的服务器-客户端架构难以与现代Python工作流程集成，需要新的接口层。
AI.method: 通过共享内存通信和周期级同步实现RCSS2D/HELIOS客户端与Python MARL接口的连接，支持离散/混合动作空间、动作掩码、EPV奖励塑造和并行训练。
AI.result: 提供前锋场景和11对11全场景基准测试及基线结果。
AI.conclusion: R2D-RL填补了经典机器人足球平台与现代MARL研究之间的空白，为多智能体协作与对抗学习提供了标准化实验环境。

title: A Prototypical Signature Approach for Writer-Independent Offline Signature Verification
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at the International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026
summary: Offline handwritten signature verification aims to distinguish genuine from forged signatures using static images. Since real forgeries are rarely available, negative samples are usually randomly drawn from genuine signatures of other users to create training data. However, this random selection often lacks diversity, increases redundancy, and escalates computational cost, leading to inefficient training. We propose a data-driven strategy to generate diverse, informative negative samples using prototypical signatures, which are compact, non-identifiable summaries of genuine signature features. Based on the experiments results, we conclude that (i) prototypical signatures yield more informative negative samples, improving the detection of skilled forgeries; (ii) the proposed approach is backbone-agnostic, showing robustness across architectures; and (iii) when combined with a primal-form linear SVM, it serves as an alternative to RBF-based models while significantly improving scalability and computational efficiency. Implementation of the method is available at https://github.com/kdmoura/proto_hsv.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原型签名的数据驱动策略，用于离线手写签名验证中的负样本生成，以解决随机选择导致的冗余和效率低下问题。
AI.motivation: 该方法与线性SVM结合使用。
AI.method: 基于实验结果得出三个结论：(i)原型签名能生成信息更丰富的负样本，提高熟练伪造检测能力；(ii)该方法与主干网络无关，在不同架构中表现出鲁棒性；(iii)结合线性SVM可作为RBF基模型的替代方案，显著提高可扩展性和计算效率。
AI.result: 原型签名能生成信息更丰富的负样本，提高熟练伪造检测能力；该方法与主干网络无关，在不同架构中表现出鲁棒性；结合线性SVM可作为RBF基模型的替代方案，显著提高可扩展性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于原型签名的负样本生成策略能有效提高离线手写签名验证系统的性能，具有良好的可扩展性和计算效率。

title: ProfiLLM: Utility-Aligned Agentic User Profiling for Industrial Ride-Hailing Dispatch
summary: Bringing Large Language Models (LLMs) into industrial ride-hailing dispatch as semantic feature extractors over platform-scale behavioral logs is a compelling but under-explored data systems problem. Production matching pipelines remain dominated by structured numerical features, yet decisive behavioral signals (e.g., a driver's habitual aversion to certain regions) are inherently contextual and naturally expressible as LLM-generated user profiles. However, scaling such profiling to a live, millisecond-latency dispatcher faces three intertwined constraints rarely addressed together: on a platform with millions of daily orders, logs exceed any LLM's context window by orders of magnitude; most users are long-tail, with too few interactions for per-user profiling; and surface-fluent profiles do not necessarily improve downstream prediction utility. We present ProfiLLM, an agentic LLM data pipeline that operationalizes utility-aligned user profiling for production matching systems through two modules. (1) Tool-Augmented Global Knowledge Mining equips an LLM agent with 27 analytical tools to mine platform-scale data, producing reusable global knowledge, adaptive user clustering rules, and region-level supply-demand priors. (2) Utility-Aligned Profile Exploration generates multiple candidate profiles per cluster, evaluates them via a lightweight downstream utility proxy, iteratively refines the best candidates and constructs preference pairs for DPO fine-tuning. Deployed on DiDi's production dispatcher, ProfiLLM achieves up to +6.14% relative AUC improvement in outcome prediction, up to +4.35% GMV gain in dispatching simulation, and consistent improvements in a 14-day online A/B test including +0.47% GMV, +0.33% Completion Rate, and -0.82% Cancel-Before-Accept rate.

AI.tldr: ProfiLLM是一个将大语言模型应用于工业网约车调度系统的用户画像数据管道,通过工具增强的全局知识挖掘和效用对齐的画像探索两个模块,解决百万级订单日志超出LLM上下文窗口、长尾用户交互数据不足、表面流畅画像不改善下游预测等挑战。
AI.motivation: 工业网约车调度系统仍主要使用结构化数值特征,但决定性的行为信号(如司机对某些区域的惯常厌恶)是内在上下文性的,自然可以用LLM生成的用户画像表达。将LLM规模化到毫秒级延迟的实时调度系统面临三个约束:平台日订单数百万级,日志量超出任何LLM上下文窗口;大多数用户是长尾的,交互数据不足以进行用户级画像;表面流畅的画像不一定改善下游预测效用。
AI.method: 提出ProfiLLM系统,包含两个模块:(1)工具增强的全局知识挖掘:为LLM智能体配备27个分析工具来挖掘平台级数据,生成可复用的全局知识、自适应用户聚类规则和区域级供需先验。(2)效用对齐的画像探索:为每个聚类生成多个候选画像,通过轻量级下游效用代理进行评估,迭代优化最佳候选者并构建偏好对用于DPO微调。
AI.result: 在滴滴生产调度系统上部署,ProfiLLM在结果预测中实现最高+6.14%相对AUC提升,在调度模拟中实现最高+4.35%GMV增益,在14天在线A/B测试中实现持续改进,包括+0.47%GMV、+0.33%完单率和-0.82%接受前取消率。
AI.conclusion: ProfiLLM成功将LLM应用于工业级网约车调度系统,通过工具增强的知识挖掘和效用对齐的画像探索,有效解决了规模化挑战,在实际生产环境中取得了显著的效果提升。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Modal Retrieval for Knowledge-Grounded News Image Captioning
summary: Traditional image captioning methods often struggle to generate comprehensive, context-rich descriptions, especially for details not directly observable from visual cues. To overcome this, we propose a novel retrieval-augmented image captioning framework that generates captions with deeper insights, such as object attributes, event context, and underlying significance, by leveraging external knowledge. Our approach features a hierarchical multi-modal article retrieval mechanism that moves beyond monolithic text entities. This retrieval considers article structure-aware features, including weighted textual components (e.g., headlines, body sections) and visual placement patterns, alongside multi-faceted similarity computations (content--visual, visual--visual, and discourse positioning). A subsequent contextual relevance refinement stage further enhances the retrieved information. The retrieved articles then serve as the knowledge base for caption generation: first, a VLM generates a concise image description; second, we segment relevant information from the retrieved articles based on this description; and finally, an LLM utilizes both the description and extracted knowledge to generate a comprehensive, contextually detailed caption. We participated in the ACM Multimedia EVENTA 2025 Challenge and achieved 5th place with an overall score of 0.2824 on the private test set of the OpenEvent-V1 dataset. Source code is publicly released at https://github.com/mf0212/EVENTA-Challange.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种检索增强的图像标题生成框架，利用外部知识生成更深入、更全面的图像描述。
AI.motivation: 传统图像标题生成方法难以生成全面、上下文丰富的描述，特别是对于无法直接从视觉线索观察到的细节。
AI.method: 提出层次化多模态文章检索机制，考虑文章结构感知特征（标题、正文部分、视觉放置模式），计算多面相似度（内容-视觉、视觉-视觉、话语位置）；然后通过上下文相关性 refinement 阶段增强检索信息。生成采用三阶段：VLM 生成简洁图像描述→从检索文章中分割相关信息→LLM 生成全面上下文标题。
AI.result: 在ACM Multimedia EVENTA 2025挑战赛中获得第5名，在OpenEvent-V1数据集测试集上总体得分为0.2824。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过检索增强生成有效利用外部知识生成上下文详细的图像标题。

title: WorldLines: Benchmarking and Modeling Long-Horizon Stateful Embodied Agents
