Across 16 model-harness configurations, comprising 11 models and 4,800 trajectories, no system reliably recovered preclinical pharmacology decisions. The strongest configuration, Claude Opus 4.8 / Pi, passed 59.3\% of endpoint attempts (178/300; 95\% CI, 51.1-67.6), followed by GPT-5.5 / Pi at 55.3\% (166/300; 47.0-63.6).

AI.tldr: TxBench-PP是一个用于评估AI agents在临床前药理学领域决策能力的新benchmark，包含100个评估任务，测试模型能否从真实实验数据中得出准确结论而非记忆文献知识。
AI.motivation: AI agents有望加速药物发现，但实际部署需要可信的评估；现有基准测试不足，无法验证AI在真实临床前药理学决策中的能力。
AI.method: 构建包含100个评估任务的benchmark，覆盖MoA、PD、化合物-靶点相互作用、因果靶点验证、成药性/安全性及转化疗效等维度；AI agents接收真实工作流程数据并在编码环境中进行分析，返回结构化答案进行确定性评分。
AI.result: 在16种模型配置（11个模型，4800条轨迹）中，没有系统能可靠地恢复临床前药理学决策；最佳配置Claude Opus 4.8/Pi通过率为59.3%（178/300），其次GPT-5.5/Pi为55.3%（166/300）。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI模型在临床前药理学决策任务上表现有限，最高通过率仅约60%，表明该领域AI辅助药物发现仍需重大改进。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about preclinical pharmacology and drug discovery (AI agents for small-molecule pharmacology), which is entirely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The application area is biomedical/pharmaceutical AI, not video generation, motion generation, or 3D animation. While it may use some AI/ML methods, the domain is completely different - no connection to diffusion-based video generation, visual guidance features, skeleton-based motion, or any computer graphics techniques.

title: Moving Beyond Diversity: Visual Token Pruning as Subspace Reconstruction for Efficient VLMs
summary: Despite their remarkable performance, Vision Language Models (VLMs) incur substantial computational overhead due to the large number of visual tokens. While diversity maximization has become a dominant strategy for token reduction, existing methods rely on cosine-based normalized similarity that discards magnitude information, failing to faithfully approximate the original feature representation and leading to suboptimal performance, particularly on compositional multi-skill reasoning tasks. In this paper, we introduce SPARE, a subspace reconstruction method that reformulates token pruning as a column subset selection problem and explicitly minimizes reconstruction error. By iteratively selecting tokens with large projection residuals, SPARE performs reconstruction-driven pruning beyond angular diversity. Moreover, we reveal a counterintuitive anti-relevance phenomenon: tokens with lower image-text relevance score can better preserve contextual information. Based on this finding, we incorporate anti-relevance into SPARE as an additional selection criterion to promote context-aware token selection. Extensive experiments across multiple VLMs and benchmarks demonstrate that SPARE consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, with strong gains on compositional tasks. When applied to LLaVA, SPARE removes up to 94% of visual tokens while retaining 95% of the baseline performance, all in a fully training-free manner.

AI.tldr: SPARE是一种无需训练的子空间重建方法，通过将视觉token剪枝重新表述为列子集选择问题，最小化重建误差来减少VLM的计算开销，同时引入了反相关性现象来选择低相关性的token以更好地保留上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM因大量视觉token产生高计算成本，现有的多样性最大化方法使用基于余弦的归一化相似度，丢弃了幅值信息，无法忠实近似原始特征表示，在组合多技能推理任务上表现不佳。
AI.method: 将token剪枝重新表述为列子集选择问题，通过迭代选择具有大投影残差的token进行重建驱动的剪枝，并引入反相关性作为额外选择标准促进上下文感知的token选择。
AI.result: 在多个VLM和基准上实现最先进的性能，在组合任务上获得显著提升。应用于LLaVA时，可移除高达94%的视觉token同时保留95%的基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SPARE方法通过子空间重建和反相关性机制，为VLM的token剪枝提供了新的有效范式，无需训练即可实现高效推理。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about efficient Vision Language Models (VLMs) for reducing computational cost through token pruning - it's in the NLP/multimodal AI domain, not Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation, video-generated motion priors, and temporal animation synthesis. While both involve "visual" elements, the paper addresses token efficiency in VLMs for language tasks, not visual guidance feature extraction for 3D motion generation, skeleton-based motion representation, or diffusion-based video generation for animations. The pain points and methods are entirely mismatched.

title: X+Slides: Benchmarking Audience-Conditioned Slide Generation
summary: Automatically generating slide decks from source documents is an important application of large language models (LLMs). Existing benchmarks primarily assess slide completeness and technical depth, while overlooking the target audience as a critical real-world factor. For instance, specialists demand rigorous proofs, whereas decision-makers prioritize actionable conclusions. To bridge this gap, we introduce X+Slides, a benchmark specifically designed for audience-conditioned slide generation. Built on a diverse corpus spanning 113 topics and seven presentation scenes, X+Slides employs a dynamic evaluation framework constructed from 8,133 deduplicated, source-grounded probes. By assigning audience-specific utility weights to the same source-grounded probes, X+Slides reports four complementary metrics: Audience Coverage measures how much audience-essential information is conveyed, Domain-wise Coverage shows which information types are covered, Efficiency measures delivered utility per unit of attention cost, and Correctness verifies whether slide claims are supported by the source. Experiments on DeepPresenter, SlideTailor, and NotebookLM show that current systems can recover a substantial but still incomplete part of audience-essential information: at $τ_A=0.7$, DeepPresenter reaches a best Audience Coverage of 0.714, SlideTailor reaches 0.594, and the NotebookLM ablation reaches 0.853 while showing clear grounding differences. These results indicate that visual quality and broad topic coverage should not be treated as evidence support without source-grounded evaluation.

AI.tldr: X+Slides是一个针对受众条件化幻灯片生成的新基准，用于评估LLM从源文档生成幻灯片的质量，特别考虑受众差异（专家vs决策者）。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要评估幻灯片完整性和技术深度，忽略了目标受众这一关键现实因素。不受众群体需要不同类型的信息——专家需要严格证明，决策者需要可操作的结论。
AI.method: 基于113个主题和7个演示场景的多元语料库构建，使用8,133个去重、源引证的探针构建动态评估框架。通过为同一探针分配受众特定的效用权重，报告四个互补指标：受众覆盖率、领域覆盖率、效率和正确性。
AI.result: 在DeepPresenter、SlideTailor和NotebookLM上的实验表明，当前系统只能恢复部分受众-essential信息：在τ_A=0.7时，DeepPresenter达到0.714的最佳受众覆盖率，SlideTailor达0.594，NotebookLM消融达0.853，同时显示出明显的源引证差异。
AI.conclusion: 视觉质量和广泛主题覆盖不应被视为支持证据，必须进行源引证评估。当前系统能够恢复大量但仍不完整的受众-essential信息。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM-based slide generation from documents (NLP/AI field), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics with 3D motion generation using diffusion models, skeleton-based representations, and visual guidance features. The application domains are entirely different - document processing vs computer graphics/3D animation. No method overlap (LLMs for slides vs diffusion models for video motion generation), and the pain points are unrelated (audience-specific slide content vs 2D-to-3D motion semantic gaps).

title: Multi-Class Brain Tumor Classification Using Advanced Deep Learning Models: A Comparative Study
summary: Despite recent advancements in deep learning, accurately classifying brain tumors from MRI images continues to pose challenges. In this research, we present a comprehensive evaluation of five different convolutional neural networks (CNN) architectures, including a customized baseline model and four pre-trained models - for use in classifying multi-class brain tumors using a clinically-sourced dataset of approximately 10,000 MRI images. We have utilized five different architectures; VGG16, VGG19, DenseNet121, and EfficientNetB0, which were all tested and trained within an identical experimental framework. Performance was measured by both overall accuracy and tumor-wise recall as a means to measure the clinically-relevant performance of each architecture. We found that EfficientNetB0 had the best overall classification accuracy at 95%, when compared to the other architectures tested; specifically VGG16 (94.37%), VGG19 (92.29%), DenseNet121 (90.91%) and the customized CNN (78.00%). An especially important finding of our research was the considerable improvement in detecting meningiomas; specifically, while simple CNNs could detect meningiomas with a recall rate of approximately 20%, EfficientNetB0 was able to detect meningiomas with a recall rate of 89%. Meningiomas are often difficult to detect because they can appear very subtly on MRI images. Additionally, an interesting finding was that the deeper VGG19 performed worse than the shallower VGG16. This indicates that in many cases the architectural efficiency of a CNN model may be more important than its depth when working with medical images. Overall, EfficientNetB0 appears to provide the optimal trade-off between classification accuracy, number of parameters used in the model and clinically meaningful performance.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了五种CNN架构在脑肿瘤MRI图像分类中的性能，使用约10,000张临床来源的MRI图像数据集，发现EfficientNetB0以95%的准确率表现最佳，尤其在难以检测的脑膜瘤方面召回率高达89%。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习有所进展，但从MRI图像中准确分类脑肿瘤仍然面临挑战，需要寻找更有效的模型架构。
AI.method: 在统一的实验框架下测试和训练了五种CNN架构：定制的基线模型以及四个预训练模型（VGG16、VGG19、DenseNet121、EfficientNetB0），使用约10,000张MRI图像进行多分类任务，通过总体准确率和肿瘤特异性召回率评估性能。
AI.result: EfficientNetB0达到最高分类准确率95%，VGG16为94.37%，VGG19为92.29%，DenseNet121为90.91%，定制CNN为78%。关键发现是EfficientNetB0对脑膜瘤的检测召回率高达89%，而简单CNN仅约20%。此外，较深的VGG19反而比VGG16表现更差。
AI.conclusion: EfficientNetB0在分类准确率、模型参数量和临床意义性能之间提供了最佳平衡，表明对于医学图像任务，模型架构的效率可能比深度更重要。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image classification (brain tumor classification from MRI scans) using CNNs. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically diffusion-based video generation for 3D motion synthesis, temporal motion modeling, skeleton-based motion representation, and visual guidance feature extraction for video-generated motion priors. The application domain (medical imaging) and methodology (CNN image classification) are entirely different from the Computer Graphics field and motion generation methods specified in the research profile.

title: NeSyCat Torch: A Differentiable Tensor Implementation of Categorical Semantics for Neurosymbolic Learning
summary:
Neurosymbolic semantics is fragmented: classical, fuzzy, probabilistic and neural systems each define truth by their own inductive rules. NeSyCat, extending ULLER, subsumes them under a single inductive definition of truth, parametric in a strong monad and an aggregation structure on truth-values. NeSyCat has so far lacked an account of predicates and functions learned by neural networks.
  We provide NeSyCat Torch as the missing link and interpret computational symbols via neural networks, implementing the framework in probabilistic programming and tensor-based backends. We use the distribution monad for reference semantics and metric evaluation, and complement it by a monad for numerically stable, differentiable training: the lazy log-tensor monad over the log-semiring. For efficient training in batches, we furthermore employ a batch monad. The axioms are the source code: written once in monad-based do-notation, monadic bind performs marginalisation, lazily pruning unneeded branches.
  On MNIST addition, our HaskTorch, JAX, and PyTorch implementations outperform LTN and DeepProbLog in speed and accuracy, while achieving nearly the accuracy of DeepStochLog. However, unlike DeepStochLog, we stay in a uniform framework that applies to many first-order NeSy approaches. Namely, the construction is parametric in the monad; instantiating it with, e.g., the Giry monad extends the approach to continuous probability (working out a neural representation here is left for future work).

AI.tldr: NeSyCat Torch是一个结合神经网络的神经符号系统，通过单子(monad)框架统一不同的神经符号语义，为神经学习谓词和函数提供计算解释，在MNIST加法任务上超越现有方法性能。
AI.motivation: 神经符号语义碎片化：经典、模糊、概率和神经系统的真值定义各自独立。NeSyCat虽统一了这些方法，但缺乏对神经网络学习谓词和函数的处理能力，需要补充神经网络的计算符号解释。
AI.method: 使用概率编程和张量后端实现NeSyCat Torch：分布单子用于参考语义和度量评估；惰性log-张量单子(基于log-半环)实现数值稳定、可微训练；批处理单子实现高效批量训练。公理以单子do-notation编写，单子bind执行边际化并惰性剪枝。
AI.result: 在MNIST加法任务上，HaskTorch、JAX和PyTorch实现在速度和准确率上优于LTN和DeepProbLog，接近DeepStochLog准确率，且保持统一框架适用于多种一阶神经符号方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过单子参数化设计，可扩展至连续概率(如Giry单子)，为神经符号学习提供通用架构。

title: Spatially Stratified Distillation for Heterogeneous Radar Place Recognition
comment: IEEE ICRA Workshop on Open Challenges for Rigorous Robot Perception 2026
summary: Scalable, all-weather place recognition increasingly relies on heterogeneous radar place recognition to bridge diverse hardware platforms. A notable application is matching queries from cost-effective 4D automotive radars against high-fidelity reference maps built by dense spinning radars. This process is fundamentally limited by the extreme sparsity (and narrow field-of-view) of the 4D sensor, which captures only a fraction of the structural density present in the spinning radar database. Prior efforts address this issue by unifying different radar signals. That is, projecting both signals into a common representational space. Yet, they suffer performance degradation in multi-session environments. In this paper, we propose spatially-stratified distillation (SSD); a strategy that replaces standard uniform distillation with an asymmetric spatial alignment derived directly from physical radar returns. In regions where both radars exhibit overlapping returns, SSD enforces strong feature alignment. Crucially, in sparse regions where the 4D student lacks returns but the teacher contains valid structure within the shared field of view, SSD applies heavily discounted distillation weights. Extensive evaluations of the recent HeRCULES dataset demonstrate that SSD significantly outperforms prior place recognition methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on its challenging dynamic sequences.

AI.tldr: 针对异构雷达（4D汽车雷达vs旋转雷达）之间的地点识别难题，提出空间分层蒸馏(SSD)方法，通过非对称空间对齐处理稀疏性问题，在重叠区域强制特征对齐，在稀疏区域使用折扣蒸馏权重。
AI.motivation: 4D汽车雷达极度稀疏，只能捕获旋转雷达数据库中的小部分结构，导致跨异构平台的地点识别性能受限，现有方法在多会话环境中性能下降。
AI.method: 提出空间分层蒸馏(SSD)策略：替换标准均匀蒸馏为基于物理雷达返回的非对称空间对齐；在两个雷达都有重叠返回的区域强制强特征对齐；在4D学生缺少返回但教师在共享视场内有有效结构的稀疏区域应用大幅折扣的蒸馏权重。
AI.result: 在HeRCULES数据集上显著优于 prior place recognition方法，在具有挑战性的动态序列上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: SSD通过非对称空间对齐策略有效解决了异构雷达间的稀疏性匹配问题，为自动驾驶雷达地点识别提供了新的技术途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about radar place recognition for autonomous vehicles (4D automotive radar vs rotating radar), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is robotics/autonomous systems, not video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or animation. The methods (radar distillation) are in a entirely different field. This has no connection to diffusion-based video generation, visual guidance features, skeleton-based motion representation, or any computer graphics methods.

title: Rethinking Reward Supervision: Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation
summary: Post-training of reasoning language models is commonly driven by supervised distillation and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards. Distillation often relies on chain-of-thought annotations that are expensive to obtain and may themselves be noisy, incomplete, or partially incorrect; even when the final solution is correct, an imperfect rationale can interfere with learning. Reinforcement learning with verified rewards, on the other hand, typically compresses evaluative feedback into a scalar signal, obscuring which aspects of a response should be improved. We propose \textbf{Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation}, a framework that incorporates rubrics as structured, fine-grained feedback for on-policy self-distillation. Our method conditions the teacher model on criterion-level rubrics and uses it to provide token-level guidance on the student's own sampled trajectories. This design avoids treating a single reference rationale as the sole supervision target. Instead, rubrics specify what a strong response should satisfy, enabling more fine-grained credit assignment over the reasoning process than scalar reward optimization. We instantiate this framework with a two-stage pipeline that first learns to generate task-specific rubrics and then trains a rubric-guided reasoner. We evaluate on a diverse suite of science reasoning benchmarks and results show that rubric-conditioned self-distillation effectively converts rubric-level criteria into token-level guidance over the reasoning process, surpassing GRPO by 1.0 points and OPSD by 0.9 points on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation（RCSD）框架，将评分标准（rubrics）作为结构化、细粒度的反馈信号，用于推理语言模型的自我蒸馏，解决传统监督蒸馏标注昂贵且可能包含错误，以及强化学习将反馈压缩为标量信号导致credit assignment不精确的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有推理语言模型的后训练方法存在两个关键问题：1）监督蒸馏依赖的思维链注释成本高且可能包含噪声或不完整信息；2）带验证奖励的强化学习将评估反馈压缩为标量信号，掩盖了响应中需要改进的具体方面。
AI.method: 提出Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation框架，将rubrics作为结构化细粒度反馈。方法核心包括：1）将教师模型置于criterion-level rubrics条件下；2）使用教师模型为学生自身的采样轨迹提供token-level指导。采用两阶段流程：第一阶段学习生成任务特定的rubrics，第二阶段训练rubric引导的推理器。
AI.result: 在多种科学推理基准测试集上的实验表明，rubric-conditioned self-distillation有效将rubric级别的标准转换为推理过程的token级别指导，平均性能超越GRPO 1.0分，超越OPSD 0.9分。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了细粒度credit assignment问题，通过rubrics指定强响应应满足的条件，实现了比标量奖励优化更精细的推理过程监督，为推理语言模型的后训练提供了新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM training and self-distillation for reasoning language models (RCSD framework), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically focused on video-generated motion, 3D animation synthesis, and visual content generation. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with language model training, the other deals with computer graphics and motion generation. There is no overlap in methods, pain points, or research objectives.

title: UniTemp: Unlocking Video Generation in Any Temporal Order via Bidirectional Distillation
summary: Autoregressive video diffusion models have emerged as a promising approach for long video generation, achieving strong performance in streaming settings. However, existing methods are restricted to forward temporal generation, whereas practical video creation often requires flexible generation order, e.g., conditioning on future context to extend backward, or on both past and future context for inbetween generation. We bridge this gap by training an autoregressive model that supports generation in arbitrary temporal directions. A key technical challenge arises from the Causal 3D VAE widely used in video diffusion models, which encodes latents strictly conditioned on past context. While suited for forward generation, this causal structure causes inter-block discontinuities when generation proceeds backward. To address this, we introduce blockwise anchor latents, a set of auxiliary latents that restore the missing past context at block boundaries during backward generation. Built on this design, we propose UniTemp, a bidirectional distillation framework that trains a single autoregressive student model for any-direction video generation. At inference time, UniTemp conditions on arbitrary past and/or future frames, improving controllability for both bidirectional and inbetween generation. Experiments show that UniTemp maintains competitive performance on short and long video generation compared to forward-only methods, while enabling diverse workflows such as bidirectional video extension, inbetween generation, looping video generation, scene transition, and visual story generation. Project website: https://lzhangbj.github.io/projects/unitemp/

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniTemp框架，解决自回归视频扩散模型只能单向(从前到后)生成的问题，实现任意时间方向的视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散模型仅支持前向时间生成，但实际视频创作需要灵活的时间顺序(如后向扩展或双向插值生成)。
AI.method: 引入块锚点 latent (blockwise anchor latents)解决Causal 3D VAE导致的块间不连续问题，建立双向蒸馏框架训练单一自回归学生模型支持任意方向生成。
AI.result: UniTemp在短视频和长视频生成上保持与前向方法相当的性能，同时支持双向视频扩展、插值生成、循环视频生成、场景转换和视觉故事生成等多种工作流。
AI.conclusion: UniTemp是首个支持任意时间方向生成的自回归视频扩散模型，提高了视频生成的可控性和灵活性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about general video generation using diffusion models, not about 3D motion generation from video. The research profile specifically targets video-generated motion priors for 3D character animation with skeleton-based motion representation, while UniTemp focuses on bidirectional video content creation (short films, visual stories). Although both use diffusion models, they address completely different application domains - general video generation vs. skeleton-based 3D motion extraction. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points related to 2D-to-3D motion semantic gap, visual guidance feature extraction, or quality supervision for motion realism.

title: PEFT-MedSAM: Efficient Fine-Tuning of Medical Foundation Models for Explainable Skin Lesion Segmentation
summary: Automated segmentation of skin lesions using deep learning models for dermoscopic images can be very helpful in finding melanomas earlier than they would normally be detected. However, most deep learning methods available do not perform well. The aim of this paper is to present a parameter-efficient fine-tuning method called PEFT-MedSAM for adapting the Medical Segment Anything Model (MedSAM) to automatically segment dermoscopic skin lesions. The PEFT-MedSAM method uses only the lightweight mask decoder for training the model while keeping the pre-trained image encoder and prompt encoder frozen. The experiments performed on the ISIC 2018 benchmark dataset shows that PEFT-MedSAM obtains a dice coefficient of .9411 and an intersection over union value of .8918 when compared to both a fully trained U-Net baseline (.8715 dice coefficient) and zero-shot MedSAM inference (.8997 dice coefficient). The external validation of the model using PH2 dataset shows .9467 dice coefficient with +/- .0310 standard deviation. Supportive evidence for these claims include a p-value less than .0001 for Wilcoxon signed rank tests comparing the two datasets and bootstrap-estimated 95% confidence intervals of [.9364,.9447] that represent the estimated range of possible values for the average dice coefficient obtained by repeating the test. To increase clinical trustworthiness, we used Grad-CAM explainability along with a pointing game based evaluation methodology to evaluate the CNN baseline model on the validation set. The results showed that we had an accuracy rate of 98.27% on the validation set of 519 images and confirmed that the model classified regions containing skin lesions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种参数高效微调方法PEFT-MedSAM，用于将MedSAM模型适配到皮肤病变自动分割任务中，在ISIC 2018和PH2数据集上取得了优异的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 皮肤癌早筛对黑色素瘤的早期发现至关重要，但现有深度学习方法在皮肤病变分割上表现不佳，需要一种参数高效且高精度的分割方法。
AI.method: 提出PEFT-MedSAM参数高效微调方法，仅对MedSAM的mask decoder进行训练，保持image encoder和prompt encoder冻结，从而实现参数高效迁移学习。同时使用Grad-CAM和pointing game进行可解释性评估。
AI.result: 在ISIC 2018数据集上达到0.9411 Dice系数和0.8918 IoU，优于完全训练的U-Net基线(0.8715)和零样本MedSAM推理(0.8997)。在PH2数据集外部验证中达到0.9467 Dice系数(±0.0310标准差)，Wilcoxon检验p值<0.0001，95%置信区间[0.9364,0.9447]。可解释性评估在519张验证图像上达到98.27%准确率。
AI.conclusion: PEFT-MedSAM是一种有效的皮肤病变分割方法，仅通过微调少量参数即可实现高性能分割，具有良好的临床应用潜力和可解释性。

The paper is about medical image segmentation (skin lesion segmentation for cancer detection). Even though the paper uses foundation models and fine-tuning methods, this is medical imaging - not related to computer graphics, motion generation, or animation synthesis. The application domains are entirely different: medical diagnosis vs. motion synthesis.

title: Rethinking the Pointer Loss in Table Structure Recognition: Geometry-Aware Pointer Loss for Spatial Locality
summary: Table Structure Recognition (TSR) using a pointer network achieves impressive results by predicting HTML sequences while aligning tags to detected text (or cell) regions. However, our analysis reveals that when pointer networks fail, 79.6% of errors occur between spatially adjacent cells (Manhattan distance <= 2). Despite this, standard cross-entropy loss weights all negative candidates equally. In this work, we propose Geometry-Aware Pointer (GAP) Loss, which reweights the cross-entropy objective based on spatial proximity to ground truth. By applying inverse distance weighting, GAP focuses gradient flow where the model struggles most: immediate neighbors receive stronger gradients than distant cells. Our approach requires only a straightforward modification to the loss computation, maintaining the same model architecture with zero additional inference cost. Extensive experiments on PubTabNet and SynthTabNet demonstrate that GAP consistently reduces adjacent-cell errors, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Our findings suggest that incorporating geometric inductive biases at the loss level provides a simple yet effective approach to robust TSR. Our code is available at https://github.com/teamreboott/GAP

AI.tldr: 本文提出Geometry-Aware Pointer (GAP) Loss，通过逆距离加权重新加权交叉熵损失，使模型聚焦于相邻单元格错误，从而提升表格结构识别性能，在PubTabNet和SynthTabNet上达到新的最先进水平。
AI.motivation: -pointer网络在表格结构识别中失败案例的79.6%发生在空间相邻单元格（曼哈顿距离≤2），而标准交叉熵损失对所有负候选样本同等权重，无法有效处理这一局部错误集中问题。
AI.method: 提出GAP Loss：基于空间邻近度对交叉熵目标进行逆距离加权，使梯度流更集中在模型最困难的区域——相邻单元格，保持模型架构不变，仅修改损失计算，实现零额外推理成本。
AI.result: 在PubTabNet和SynthTabNet上大量实验表明，GAP Loss持续降低相邻单元格错误率达到新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 在损失层面引入几何归纳偏置是一种简单而有效的鲁棒表格结构识别方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about table structure recognition in document analysis, which is completely unrelated to the research profile in Computer Graphics focused on video-generated 3D motion synthesis. The application domains are entirely different: document parsing vs. video-to-motion generation. Methods used (pointer networks for table parsing) have no relevance to diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion generation, or skeleton-based motion representation. This paper addresses table cell localization errors in document understanding, not any of the pain points related to temporal motion realism, visual guidance extraction, or semantic 2D-to-3D conversion in computer graphics.

title: Clinically Aligned Geometry Constraints for Robust IVUS Vessel Boundary Segmentation
summary: Intravascular ultrasound (IVUS) lumen and external elastic membrane (EEM) segmentation is important for quantitative coronary plaque burden assessment. Errors in lumen or EEM delineation directly propagate to plaque area, plaque burden and geometric measurements. However, standard methods prioritising overlap scores often suffer from boundary drift and topology errors, leading to inaccurate clinical measurements. We present GeoCat, a geometry-consistent network that processes 5-frame IVUS clips using dual Cartesian-polar encoders with cross-domain attention and temporal fusion. A differentiable geometry consistency loss directly supervises clinically relevant descriptors including diameters, orientations, and cross-sectional areas. The model is trained on 12,242 annotated frames from 146 patients acquired with two commercial IVUS systems. We evaluate performance using both segmentation accuracy and plaque-relevant clinical metrics, including Dice/IoU, boundary measures(95HD (mm), ASSD), topology violation rate, and clinical geometry errors (dmax/dmin, angles, and areas). On our dataset, GeoCat achieves a Dice of 0.93, reduces 95HD to 0.14 mm, and lowers topology violations to 1.0%. Importantly, it significantly improves geometric fidelity, yielding diameter errors of 0.13-0.16 mm and angular errors of ~8 degrees, supporting reliable plaque burden quantification.

AI.tldr: GeoCat是一个几何一致性网络,用于5帧IVUS视频的双视角编码器分割,结合可微几何损失函数监督临床相关指标,在12,242帧数据上实现Dice 0.93,95HD 0.14mm,拓扑错误率1.0%的性能。
AI.motivation: IVUS管腔和外弹性膜(EEM)分割对冠状动脉斑块负荷定量评估至关重要,但传统方法优先考虑重叠分数导致边界漂移和拓扑错误,直接影响斑块面积、斑块负荷和几何测量的准确性。
AI.method: 提出GeoCat几何一致性网络,处理5帧IVUS切片,采用双笛卡尔-极坐标编码器结合跨域注意力机制和时序融合。可微几何一致性损失函数直接监督临床相关描述符,包括直径、方向和横截面积。
AI.result: 在146例患者12,242帧标注数据上训练评估:Dice达0.93,95HD降至0.14mm,拓扑违规率降至1.0%,直径误差0.13-0.16mm,角度误差约8度。
AI.conclusion: GeoCat显著提高几何保真度,支持可靠的斑块负荷量化,为IVUS临床定量分析提供准确的几何测量基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging (IVUS vessel segmentation for coronary artery disease diagnosis), not computer graphics or motion generation. The research profile focuses on diffusion-based video generation for 3D motion/animation synthesis with skeleton-based representations, while this paper addresses clinical medical segmentation. Despite being a well-written medical imaging paper with geometric constraints, it has zero relevance to the specified computer graphics research field dealing with video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, and temporal animation synthesis.

title: Toward Training-Free Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection in 3D Medical Images: A Batch-Based Approach Using 2D Foundation Models
summary: Zero-shot anomaly detection (ZSAD) is attractive for medical imaging because clinical systems must handle heterogeneous acquisition protocols, changing patient populations, and pathologies for which annotated training data may be unavailable. Most existing zero-shot anomaly detection methods are designed for 2D images, and their direct extension to 3D medical volumes is limited by the scarcity of large-scale volumetric foundation models or by the difficulty of utilizing volumetric context. We propose CS3F, a training-free batch-based framework for ZSAD in 3D medical images using 2D foundation models. Each volume is decomposed along multiple anatomical axes and encoded slice-wise by a 2D vision transformer. These are then converted into localized volumetric tokens by pooling neighboring slice features. Anomaly scores are obtained from cross-subject mutual similarity: tokens that lack close analogues in other subjects are assigned higher anomaly scores. To reduce the attenuation of focal lesion signals caused by depth pooling, we introduce a coarse-to-fine tokenization strategy that enables fine-resolution volumetric scoring without exhaustive matching. CS3F is evaluated on brain MRI across metastases, glioma, and stroke, as well as validated on lung CT to test generalizability beyond atlas-aligned brain MRI. The results show that frozen 2D foundation models can support anomaly localization in 3D medical images, and that the benefit of fine tokenization depends strongly on lesion contrast and imaging modality.

AI.tldr: CS3F是一个用于3D医学图像无监督异常检测的框架，利用2D预训练模型处理3D医学影像，通过多轴切片分解、体素化和交叉主体相似性实现异常评分。
AI.motivation: 临床医学影像面临患者群体异质性、标注数据稀缺等问题；现有零样本异常检测方法主要针对2D图像，难以直接扩展到3D医学体数据；缺乏大规模3D基础模型。
AI.method: 将3D体积沿多个解剖轴分解，用2D视觉Transformer逐片编码；通过相邻切片特征池化生成本地化体素标记；采用粗到细的标记策略实现细粒度异常定位；利用交叉主体相似性计算异常分数。
AI.result: 在脑MRI（转移瘤、胶质瘤、脑卒中）和肺CT上验证；证明冻结的2D基础模型可用于3D医学图像异常检测；细粒度标记的收益取决于病变对比度和成像模态。
AI.conclusion: CS3F成功实现训练自由的3D医学图像零样本异常检测，证明2D基础模型可迁移到3D医学影像任务，但细粒度评分的效果受影像特征影响。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D medical image anomaly detection, which is in the medical imaging domain - completely different from Computer Graphics and video-generated motion synthesis. While both deal with 3D volumes and 2D-to-3D processing, the application domains are entirely different. The research profile focuses on motion priors, 3D animation synthesis, and temporal consistency in generated content, whereas this paper focuses on clinical anomaly detection in medical scans. The methods (2D vision transformers for medical volumes vs diffusion models for motion generation) and goals (medical diagnosis vs graphics animation) are unrelated.

title: SMART: A Flexible, Interpretable, and Scalable Spatio-temporal Brain Atlas from High-Resolution Imaging Data
summary: We introduce SMART, a framework for learning a flexible, interpretable, and scalable spatio-temporal brain atlas from longitudinal high-resolution 3D medical images. Existing approaches to spatio-temporal atlas construction rely on black-box generative models that lack flexibility, limit interpretability, and struggle to scale to high-dimensional data. SMART addresses these challenges by learning a continuous disease-time atlas that decouples global group-wise disease dynamics from their patient-specific anatomical manifestation. Guided by anatomically inspired priors, SMART models interpretable global trajectories of regional progression along a shared disease timeline through region-specific differential equations. Global trajectories are further personalized to individual anatomies via dense diffeomorphic displacements parameterized by a flexible and scalable multi-scale Neural Cellular Automata. Evaluated on five longitudinal MRI datasets in Alzheimer's disease (ADNI-1/GO/2, OASIS-3, AIBL; > 1,300 subjects), SMART produces anatomically meaningful predictions of disease progression and achieves state-of-the-art forecasting accuracy and improved temporal consistency over adversarial and diffusion baselines. Our approach establishes a new paradigm for flexible, interpretable, and scalable modeling of spatio-temporal change in high-dimensional medical image time-series.

AI.tldr: SMART是一个从纵向MRI图像中学习灵活、可解释、可扩展的时空脑图谱的框架，用于预测阿尔茨海默病进展。该方法将全局疾病动力学与患者特定解剖表现解耦，通过区域特异性微分方程建模可解释的进展轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有时空图谱构建方法依赖黑盒生成模型，存在灵活性不足、可解释性差、难以扩展到高维数据等挑战。
AI.method: SMART通过区域特异性微分方程建模沿共享疾病时间线的全局进展轨迹，使用多尺度神经细胞自动机进行个性化映射，在五个纵向MRI数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在ADNI-1/GO/2、OASIS-3、AIBL数据集(超过1300名受试者)上，SMART产生了解剖学上有意义的疾病进展预测，实现了最先进的预测精度和改善的时间一致性。
AI.conclusion: SMART为高维医学图像时间序列中时空变化的灵活、可解释、可扩展建模建立了新范式。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging/neuroscience (brain atlas construction for Alzheimer's disease prediction from MRI scans), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics (diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion synthesis, skeleton-based animation). The methods (differential equations, neural cellular automata for disease modeling) are unrelated to the required methods (diffusion models for video generation, VLMs, visual guidance extraction, skeleton-based motion representations). There is no match in application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: SpectralDiT: Timestep-Conditioned Spectral Residual Correction for Flow-Matching DiTs
summary: We propose SpectralDiT, a lightweight modification to flow-matching Diffusion Transformers that adds timestep-conditioned spectral correction to the MLP residual branch. The module decomposes each residual update into low- and high-frequency components on the patch-token grid, then learns a zero-initialized additive gate so the model initially matches the baseline DiT. On CIFAR-10 pixel-space generation, SpectralDiT improves FID from 20.78 to 19.71 at patch size 1 and reduces the radial Fourier spectrum gap. Furthermore, we scale our method to latent diffusion on ImageNet-100. With 0.6% additional theoretical FLOPs and 1.36% additional parameters, SpectralDiT improves latent flow-matching, achieving an 8.7% relative FID reduction under classifier-free guidance (CFG 2.0). All reported results are averaged over five seeds. Ablations and gate visualizations on CIFAR-10 reveal stable block-specific spectral correction patterns.

AI.tldr: SpectralDiT是一种针对流匹配扩散变换器的轻量级修改,通过在MLP残差分支中添加时间步调度的频谱校正来提升生成质量。该方法将残差更新分解为低频和高频分量,并使用零初始化加法门,使模型初始状态与基线DiT匹配。实验表明,该方法在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-100上均能提升FID指标,且仅增加极少的计算和参数量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在高分辨率图像生成领域取得显著进展,但现有方法在处理不同频率特征时缺乏针对性优化。文章指出基线DiT在处理低频和高频信息时可能存在效率问题,希望通过频谱分解来增强模型对不同频率成分的处理能力,从而提升生成质量并缩小径向傅里叶频谱差距。
AI.method: SpectralDiT在流匹配扩散变换器的MLP残差分支中添加时间步调度的频谱校正模块。具体包括:1)将残差更新在patch-token网格上分解为低频和高频分量;2)学习一个零初始化的加法门,使模型训练初期行为与基线DiT一致;3)该模块仅增加0.6%的理论FLOPs和1.36%的参数。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10像素空间生成中,SpectralDiT将FID从20.78提升到19.71(patch大小为1),并缩小了径向傅里叶频谱差距。在ImageNet-100潜在扩散中,使用分类器无关引导(CFG 2.0)实现了8.7%的相对FID降低。所有结果均为五个随机种子的平均值。
AI.conclusion: SpectralDiT通过轻量级的频谱校正机制有效提升了流匹配扩散变换器的生成质量,且保持与基线模型的兼容性。该方法在极低的计算和参数开销下实现了显著的性能提升,为扩散模型的改进提供了一种简单而有效的方向。消融实验和门可视化显示了该方法在不同块上具有稳定的频谱校正模式。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about diffusion models for 2D IMAGE generation (CIFAR-10, ImageNet), while the research profile is about VIDEO-BASED 3D MOTION GENERATION with temporal consistency and skeleton-based representations. Even though both use diffusion models, image generation (2D static images) is fundamentally different from video-generated motion priors and 3D animation synthesis. The paper addresses image quality in pixel/latent space, not motion realism, temporal consistency, or semantic gaps between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation.

title: URDF Synthesis from RGB-D Sequences via Differentiable Joint Inference and Energy-Consistent Verification
summary: Reconstructing simulation-ready digital twins of articulated objects from sensor observations remains constrained by two persistent gaps: (i) part-level geometric reconstruction is decoupled from kinematic-parameter estimation, and (ii) the recovered models often violate basic dynamic invariants such as energy conservation, leading to drift when the URDF is replayed in physics simulators. We present KinemaForge, a constraint-driven pipeline that jointly infers part-level shape, joint topology, and joint parameters from short RGB-D sequences and validates the result against an energy-consistent verifier built on differentiable rigid-body dynamics. The pipeline introduces three components: a kinematic constraint graph that encodes joint-part incidences as soft edges; a differentiable screw-axis solver that backpropagates from rendered observations through Featherstone's articulated-body algorithm to joint parameters; and an energy residual loss that penalises non-physical free responses of the reconstructed model. Across five PartNet-Mobility categories and an internal RGB-D benchmark, KinemaForge reduces the average joint-axis error from 4.52 degrees to 2.83 degrees (-37.4%) over the strongest geometric baseline (PARIS) and from 5.30 degrees to 2.83 degrees (-46.6%) over the interaction-based Ditto baseline, lowers long-horizon simulation drift by 64% (vs. PARIS) over 50 s rollouts, and yields URDFs whose closed-loop manipulation success rate improves by 14.6 percentage points over Ditto in our preliminary evaluation. Code and reconstruction data will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: KinemaForge是一个约束驱动的管道,从RGB-D序列中联合推断关节对象的部件级形状、关节拓扑和关节参数,并通过可微分的刚体动力学验证器验证结果是否符合能量守恒约束,从而生成可在物理模拟器中准确重放的数字孪生模型。
AI.motivation: 解决两个持续存在的差距:(1)部件级几何重建与运动参数估计解耦;(2)恢复的模型经常违反能量守恒等基本动态不变量,导致在URDF重放时产生漂移。
AI.method: 提出三个核心组件:1)运动约束图,将关节-部件关联编码为软边;2)可微分的螺轴求解器,通过Featherstone关节体算法反向传播到关节参数;3)能量残差损失,惩罚非物理的自由响应。管道从短RGB-D序列中联合推断部件级形状、关节拓扑和关节参数,并通过基于可微刚体动力学的能量一致性验证器验证。
AI.result: 在五个PartNet-Mobility类别和内部RGB-D基准上:关节轴平均误差从4.52度降至2.83度(比PARIS降低37.4%),从5.30度降至2.83度(比Ditto降低46.6%);50秒 rollout的长期模拟漂移降低64%(比PARIS);URDF封闭环操作成功率提高14.6个百分点(比Ditto)。
AI.conclusion: KinemaForge成功地将几何重建与运动参数估计联合优化,并通过能量守恒约束确保重建模型在物理模拟器中的动态准确性,为可仿真数字孪生的构建提供了新的方法。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses URDF synthesis for articulated/kinematic objects from RGB-D sequences, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on video-generated human motion synthesis. While both deal with 3D motion, the application domains are completely different: (1) the paper targets robotic/mechanical object motion with rigid body dynamics, not human motion generation; (2) it uses differentiable physics-based inference, not diffusion-based video generation models; (3) the input is RGB-D for object reconstruction, not 2D video for motion priors. The pain points are unrelated - this paper solves physics verification for digital twins, not temporal consistency or semantic gaps in human motion synthesis.

title: SAMA: Semantic Anchor-aligned Augmentation for Unified Low-Resource Multimodal Information Extraction
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary: Multimodal Information Extraction (MIE)-covering tasks such as Multimodal Named Entity Recognition (MNER), Relation Extraction (MRE), and Event Extraction (MEE)-is essential for understanding multimedia content but remains constrained by severe data scarcity. Although data augmentation is a promising remedy, existing approaches are impeded by coarse cross-modal alignment and fragmented, task-specific designs that fail to exploit shared semantic knowledge. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Semantic Anchor-aligned Multimodal Augmentation (SAMA), a unified framework for generating high-fidelity, task-aware synthetic data. SAMA constructs structured semantic anchors from ground-truth labels to guide a Collaborative Multi-Experts Multimodal Large Language Model (CME-MLLM), which integrates a Universal Adapter for shared semantics with Task-Specific Adapters to produce diverse yet constraint-compliant textual samples. For image synthesis, SAMA employs an Anchor-Preserving Diffusion mechanism that uses anchor-weighted prompts and latent conditioning to maintain critical semantic anchors while diversifying visual contexts. To eliminate the need for manual verification, SAMA further introduces a Dual-Constraint Filtering module that selects synthetic samples based on both cross-modal consistency and anchor fidelity. Extensive experiments across benchmark datasets for MNER, MRE, and MEE demonstrate that SAMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art augmentation baselines under both fully supervised and low-resource settings, underscoring its versatility, robustness, and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAMA框架,一种统一的多模态数据增强方法,用于缓解多模态信息提取任务中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态信息提取任务(如MNER、MRE、MEE)严重受限于数据稀缺问题,现有数据增强方法受限于粗粒度跨模态对齐和碎片化的任务特定设计,未能利用共享语义知识。
AI.method: SAMA框架包含三个核心组件:1)构建结构化语义锚引导CME-MLLM;2)使用锚保留扩散机制进行图像合成;3)引入双约束过滤模块消除人工验证需求。
AI.result: 在MNER、MRE和MEE任务的基准数据集上,全监督和低资源设置下,SAMA均一致优于最先进的增强基线。
AI.conclusion: SAMA展示了在多模态数据增强任务中的通用性、鲁棒性和有效性,为多模态信息提取任务提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses multimodal information extraction (MNER, MRE, MEE) - an NLP task focused on extracting structured information from text-image pairs. The research profile is about Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation, video animation synthesis, and skeleton-based motion modeling. While both papers use diffusion models, SAMA uses diffusion for image synthesis augmentation in NLP contexts, not for video generation or 3D motion synthesis. The application domains are entirely unrelated.

title: ProductConsistency: Improving Product Identity Preservation in Instruction-Based Image Editing via SFT and RL
summary:
Recent advances in instruction-based image editing have enabled models to perform complex visual edits from natural language instructions. However, in product-centric scenarios where preserving product features, branding, and textual elements are critical, current open and closed source models often struggle to maintain this fine-grained object identity. This issue is further compounded by the lack of datasets for instruction-based product image editing with text fidelity constraints, leaving it largely treated as an implicit capability of instruction-based image editing models.
  In this work, we introduce the ProductConsistency dataset which is designed to improve product-centric image editing. Our approach includes a supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset of 87k samples for product editing, a reinforcement learning (RL) dataset with 869 unique product images, and a new benchmark dataset, the ProductConsistency Benchmark, to allow rigorous and standardized evaluation of editing models. To guide RL training, we propose a Cyclic Consistency reward that enforces semantic preservation of product identity by using caption similarity between the original product description and captions generated from the edited image. We fine-tune both Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 and Flux.1-Kontext-dev using our dataset and demonstrate consistent improvements over baseline models in OCR and Perceptual metrics, and MLLM-based evaluations as well, indicating stronger product consistency, text rendering, and overall visual quality; with the Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 model achieving a 5x reduction in the character error rate. The code and pipeline is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ProductConsistency-6FCC/README.md

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ProductConsistency数据集和基准测试，用于提升产品中心图像编辑中保持产品特征、品牌和文字元素的能力，包含87k监督微调样本和869张强化学习图像，并设计了Cyclic Consistency奖励机制。
AI.motivation: 当前指令-based图像编辑模型在产品中心场景中难以保持细粒度对象身份（产品特征、品牌、文字元素），且缺乏专门的数据集和评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了ProductConsistency数据集（含87k SFT样本和869张RL图像）及ProductConsistency Benchmark基准；提出Cyclic Consistency奖励机制（通过比较原产品描述与编辑图像生成caption的相似度来强制保持产品身份语义）；对Qwen-Image-Edit-2511和Flux.1-Kontext-dev进行监督微调和强化学习训练。
AI.result: 在OCR和Perceptual指标及MLLM评估上均取得一致提升；Qwen-Image-Edit-2511模型实现字符错误率降低5倍。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和训练方法能有效提升模型的产品一致性、文字渲染和整体视觉质量，为指令-based产品图像编辑提供了标准化的训练和评估框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about 2D product image editing, while the research profile is about 3D motion generation in computer graphics. The application domains are entirely different: image editing vs video-generated motion priors, skeleton-based motion representation, and temporal 3D animation synthesis. Although both use diffusion models, the paper addresses product identity preservation in static images, not motion generation, visual guidance feature extraction for 3D motion, or temporal consistency in animated sequences.

title: SCR-Guided Difficulty-Aware Optimization for Infrared Small Target Detection
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshops (PBVS). Published version: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2026W/PBVS/html/Sevim_SCR-Guided_Difficulty-Aware_Optimization_for_Infrared_Small_Target_Detection_CVPRW_2026_paper.html
summary: Infrared small target detection remains challenging due to severe background clutter, low contrast, and weak spatial responses where geometric overlap alone is insufficient to characterize detection quality. In this work, we propose REEM (Reweighted Explicit-visibility Enhanced Modulation), a lightweight SCR-guided difficulty-aware optimization framework that incorporates Signal-to-Clutter Ratio (SCR) as a physically meaningful visibility prior during training. Instead of modifying the network architecture or directly optimizing SCR, REEM computes a ground-truth local SCR from the input image and applies a differentiable modulation to the soft-IoU learning signal, emphasizing low-visibility targets while preserving stable optimization and identical inference behavior. REEM is integrated into a U-Net-based MSHNet without introducing additional parameters, architectural modifications, or inference-time overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over the baseline, achieving higher IoU and detection probability (Pd) together with substantially reduced false alarms (FA), particularly under challenging low-visibility conditions. These results suggest that SCR-guided difficulty-aware optimization provides an effective and physically grounded complement to conventional overlap-based objectives for infrared small target detection. The code is available at https://github. com/yall-in-one/Reemm.

AI.tldr: 红外小目标检测面临严重背景干扰、低对比度和弱空间响应的挑战。提出REEM框架，通过将局部信号杂波比(SCR)作为物理可见性先验引入训练过程，使用可微分调制增强低可见性目标的软IoU学习信号，实现难度感知的优化。该方法集成到U-Net-based MSHNet中，不引入额外参数或推理时间开销。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依靠几何重叠（如IoU）来评估检测质量，对于低可见性目标效果不佳。现有方法未充分考虑目标的可见性困难程度，需要引入物理上有意义的先验来指导训练。
AI.method: REEM框架的核心是：1)从输入图像计算局部SCR作为可见性先验；2)使用可微分调制函数修改软IoU学习信号，自动强调低可见性目标的损失权重；3)将REEM集成到U-Net-based MSHNet中，不修改架构，不增加参数和推理时间。
AI.result: 相比基线模型，REEM在IoU和检测概率(Pd)上有一致提升，特别是在低可见性条件下显著降低虚警(FA)。实验验证了SCR引导的难度感知优化对红外小目标检测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SCR引导的难度感知优化为红外小目标检测提供了有效且物理上合理的补充，比传统仅基于重叠的目标函数更好，尤其适用于低可见性场景。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about infrared small TARGET DETECTION (computer vision for analyzing/detecting objects in infrared images), not Computer Graphics (synthesizing motion/animations). The application domain is completely different: the profile wants video-generated motion priors and 3D animation synthesis, while this paper addresses detecting small objects in infrared static images. Although both use U-Net architectures, the task, data modality (infrared images vs video), and goal (detection vs motion generation) are entirely unrelated. This is a computer vision detection task, not a graphics/motion generation task.

title: Learned Radius Estimation for UDF-Based Point Cloud Reconstruction
summary: Surface reconstruction from point clouds is important for consumer-grade 3D capture, including AR/VR and indoor scanning. Local-patch Unsigned Distance Field (UDF) methods are lightweight and generalizable, but their accuracy depends on the support radius, traditionally fixed or selected by a one-dimensional curvature heuristic that cannot capture heterogeneous local geometry. We propose a learned per-query radius selector that predicts a continuous support radius and plugs into a frozen LoSF-UDF backbone. The selector is trained using off-grid target radii obtained by parabolic interpolation of cached UDF error curves. Experiments show improved fine-scale reconstruction accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的连续支持半径选择器，用于点云表面重建的局部_patch无符号距离场(UDF)方法，可自适应预测半径并集成到冻结的LoSF-UDF骨干网络中。
AI.motivation: 现有局部_patch UDF方法依赖固定或基于一维曲率的启发式半径选择，无法捕捉复杂异构局部几何结构，影响细尺度重建精度。
AI.method: 设计可学习的每查询半径预测器，通过抛物线插值缓存UDF误差曲线获取离网格目标半径进行训练，预测连续支持半径并接入冻结的LoSF-UDF骨干网络。
AI.result: 实验表明细尺度重建精度得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现自适应半径选择，验证了连续半径预测在复杂几何重建中的有效性，为消费级3D捕获提供更精确的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about point cloud surface reconstruction using UDF (Unsigned Distance Field) methods, which is a fundamentally different application domain from the research profile focused on video-to-3D-motion generation. The pain points in the profile involve video-generated motion priors, visual guidance feature extraction from 2D video, temporal consistency in synthesized animations - all related to generating 3D character motion from video. The paper addresses improving reconstruction accuracy in point cloud geometry processing. Methods are also completely different: diffusion-based video generation and VLM quality assessment vs. learnable radius prediction for UDF. While both are technically computer graphics, they address completely different problems (motion generation vs. geometry reconstruction) with no overlap.

title: OneCanvas: 3D Scene Understanding via Panoramic Reprojection
summary: Existing approaches to 3D scene understanding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) either rely on complex, model-specific geometry encoders or large training budgets in pursuit of spatial reasoning. Instead, OneCanvas aggregates patch features from all views onto a single equirectangular panoramic canvas. Namely, each patch is unprojected to a 3D world coordinate using its depth and camera pose, then placed on the canvas at the continuous longitude and latitude of that point as seen from the canvas origin, with no rasterization or aggregation across overlapping views. A 3D position embedding of the patch's metric coordinates is added to its feature, restoring the depth lost when collapsing the world position to an angular canvas coordinate. Patches from all frames thus share one spatial coordinate system with no fusion or major architectural modifications of the backbone. The pretrained VLM consumes this representation as if it were an ordinary image. Because the canvas can be centered on any pose of interest, the same representation directly supports situated reasoning from a specific viewpoint, a common requirement in robotics and embodied AI. Thanks to this representation, we can also introduce a spatial pretraining curriculum: by procedurally placing patch features of objects, drawn from real images, at chosen 3D world positions on an otherwise empty canvas, we generate on-the-fly supervision spanning a broad range of spatial reasoning tasks, with answer distributions controlled to reduce spatial reasoning shortcuts. OneCanvas achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on SQA3D and VSI-Bench, and generalizes to out-of-distribution data on SPBench, using an order of magnitude less training compute than the strongest competing methods.

AI.tldr: OneCanvas是一种新型的3D场景理解方法，将多视图patch特征聚合到单个等距长方投影全景画布上，无需复杂的几何编码器或大规模训练即可实现精确的空间推理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法要么依赖复杂的模型特定几何编码器，要么需要大量训练预算来追求空间推理，缺乏一种简单而有效的空间推理方法。
AI.method: OneCanvas将所有视图的patch特征解投影到3D世界坐标，放置在连续经纬度位置，添加3D位置嵌入恢复深度信息。通过程序化放置物体patch特征生成空间推理预训练课程。
AI.result: 在SQA3D和VSI-Bench上达到最先进的准确性，在SPBench上泛化到分布外数据，使用比最强竞争方法少一个数量级的训练计算。
AI.conclusion: OneCanvas通过单一全景画布表示实现了高效的空间推理，为机器人和具身AI中的情境推理提供了直接支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D scene understanding via panoramic reprojection (spatial reasoning from multi-view images), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on video-generated motion priors and 3D motion generation. The application domain is scene understanding/visual QA (SQA3D, VSI-Bench benchmarks), not video-to-motion synthesis or temporal motion generation. Methods are also different - patch feature reprojection vs diffusion-based motion models. This is a Computer Vision paper, not a Computer Graphics motion generation paper.

title: HandwritingAgent: Language-Driven Handwriting Synthesis in Scalable Vector Space
summary: Teaching machines to emulate natural handwriting styles remains an open challenge, as it requires synthesizing stroke sequences that dynamically vary in shape, texture, pressure and script - not only across individuals, but also within a single person's handwriting. Attempts at this challenge have largely explored deep learning methods in both online and offline settings. However, these approaches are often constrained by style-specific architectural choices, heavy reliance on large datasets, high compute costs, and a lack of flexible control over writing styles through natural language. To this end, we introduce HandwritingAgent, a language-driven agent that can synthesize natural handwriting sequences directly in Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) format with no need for style-specific training. The agent leverages a large reasoning model to geometrically analyse and autoregressively generate target handwritten glyphs as stroke sequences in a discrete grid canvas environment. Generation is conditioned on texts provided in either conversational or non-conversational mode, along with a reference handwriting-style image. Experiments on diverse handwriting tasks spanning imitation, recognition, multi-lingual handwriting synthesis, and generation of complex handwritten maths and science expressions indicate substantial improvement in performance, with HandwritingAgent matching or surpassing state-of-the-art generative handwriting models, while providing a more efficient, controllable, and generalizable synthesis method.

AI.tldr: HandwritingAgent是一个无需针对特定风格训练的语言驱动智能体，可直接在SVG格式下合成自然手写笔迹序列。该方法利用大语言模型在离散网格画布环境中进行几何分析和自回归生成。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在手写合成方面存在局限性：需要针对特定风格的架构设计、依赖大规模数据集、计算成本高，且难以通过自然语言灵活控制书写风格。
AI.method: HandwritingAgent采用大推理模型进行几何分析，在离散网格画布环境中自回归生成目标手写字形作为笔迹序列。生成过程可基于对话式或非对话式文本，以及参考手写风格图像进行条件化。
AI.result: 在多样化的手写任务（包括模仿、识别、多语言手写合成、复杂数学科学表达式生成）上取得显著性能提升，HandwritingAgent达到或超越现有最先进的手写生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种更高效、可控且泛化能力更强的手写合成方式，无需针对特定风格进行训练即可实现自然手写序列的合成。

relevance_reason: This paper is about handwriting synthesis in SVG vector space using language models, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on video-generated 3D motion priors and human motion generation. The research profile deals with diffusion-based video-to-motion generation, temporal consistency in 3D skeletal animations, and visual guidance feature extraction from video. Handwriting synthesis (2D character/stroke generation) is fundamentally different from 3D motion generation - one produces 2D vector graphics of text, the other produces skeletal motion sequences for animations. Additionally, the methods differ completely (LLM-based autoregressive generation vs diffusion models for motion). The pain points are also unrelated - this paper addresses limitations in style control and dataset dependence for handwriting, not video-to-motion quality or temporal consistency issues.

title: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Text-Rich Images from GPT-Image-2
summary: Text-rich images often contain privacy-sensitive, transactional, or decision-relevant information. As recent multimodal image generation models become increasingly capable of synthesizing realistic textual content and structured visual designs, detecting AI-generated text-rich images has become an important challenge for digital trust and content authenticity. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on object-centric images and provide limited coverage of scenarios where textual semantics and layout organization are central. In this paper, we introduce a multi-domain benchmark for detecting text-rich images generated by OpenAI's GPT Image 2. The benchmark contains 8,602 images across six representative categories: commercial posters, infographics, academic posters, receipts, tables, and UI screenshots. Using this benchmark, we evaluate five representative AI-generated image detectors in a zero-shot setting and analyze their overall, category-wise, and post-processing robustness. Our results show that detector performance is highly domain-dependent: methods that perform well in some categories often fail on others, and even the strongest conventional detector exhibits severe sensitivity to JPEG compression. We further conduct an exploratory evaluation with a multimodal vision-language model, revealing both its promise and its limitations on structured formats. These findings highlight the need for text- and layout-aware detection methods for modern AI-generated images. Our dataset is released at XXX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对OpenAI GPT Image 2生成的多领域文本丰富图像检测基准，包含8602张图像，涵盖商业海报、信息图表、学术海报、收据、表格和UI截图六类。评估了五种AI生成图像检测器，发现性能高度依赖领域，且JPEG压缩会显著影响检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要关注目标图像，缺乏对文本语义和布局组织为核心的文本丰富图像的覆盖。随着多模态图像生成模型能力的增强，检测AI生成的文本丰富图像对于数字信任和内容真实性至关重要。
AI.method: 构建包含六类共8602张图像的基准数据集；在零样本设置下评估五种代表性AI生成图像检测器；分析类别-wise和后处理鲁棒性；使用多模态视觉语言模型进行探索性评估。
AI.result: 检测器性能高度领域依赖：在某些类别表现好的方法在另一些类别可能失效；即使最强的传统检测器对JPEG压缩极其敏感；视觉语言模型在结构化格式上既有潜力也有局限。
AI.conclusion: 需要开发针对现代AI生成图像的文本和布局感知检测方法，以应对不同领域的多样化挑战。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile focuses on 3D MOTION GENERATION from video (temporal motion, skeleton-based representation, 3D animation synthesis), while paper addresses 2D IMAGE DETECTION (detecting AI-generated static text-rich images). The pain points are unrelated: profile needs video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, and 3D motion supervision - paper deals with image forensics and JPEG compression robustness. Even though both mention VLM, they use it for completely different applications (image detection vs motion quality assessment). This is a 2D computer vision task, not Computer Graphics motion generation.

title: Fuzzy-Geometric Branch-Point Modeling for Structure-Aware Augmentation of Handwritten Chinese Characters
summary: Data scarcity and structural distortion significantly limit handwriting recognition in high-security authentication. Existing augmentation methods often cause topological and morphological damage, particularly when processing complex Chinese characters where stroke intersections, ligatures, and sharp turns render traditional branch-point detection unreliable. To address this, this paper proposes a fuzzy geometry-driven structure-aware (FGSA) augmentation framework. We model branch points as fuzzy sets within the skeleton space, constructing a continuous branch-point membership field by integrating topological neighborhood evidence with direction field divergence. This membership field is adaptively optimized via an unsupervised surrogate objective, enabling robust stroke decoupling without manual annotation. Finally, kinematically-aligned samples are synthesized through parameterized cubic Bézier reconstruction and multi-strategy perturbations, ensuring a balance between structural fidelity and sample diversity. Moreover, we establish LZUSig, a large-scale, highly challenging dataset specifically dedicated to fine-grained structural degradation in Chinese handwritten signatures. Extensive experiments on CASIA-HWDB1.1, ChiSig, and LZUSig demonstrate that FGSA significantly reduces the word-level error rate ($Δ$WER), achieving optimal recognition gains over the compared baselines. More importantly, it strikes a robust trade-off among task gain, structural fidelity, and discriminative feature preservation, offering a highly controllable solution for handwriting augmentation.

AI.tldr: 针对手写识别中数据稀缺和结构失真问题，提出模糊几何驱动的结构感知(FGSA)增强框架，通过模糊分支点 membership 场实现无监督笔划解耦，结合Bézier曲线重建合成样本，并在新建的LZUSig数据集上显著降低词错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法在处理复杂汉字时易造成拓扑结构损伤，尤其是笔画交叉、连笔和急弯处，传统分支点检测不可靠，导致识别精度下降。
AI.method: 将分支点建模为模糊集合，构建结合拓扑邻域证据和方向场散度的连续分支点membership场；通过无监督代理目标自适应优化；使用参数化三次Bézier曲线重建和多策略扰动合成 kinematically-aligned 样本。
AI.result: 在CASIA-HWDB1.1、ChiSig和LZUSig数据集上显著降低词错误率(ΔWER)，在任务增益、结构保真度和判别性特征保留之间达到良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: FGSA框架为手写数据增强提供了高度可控的解决方案，尤其适用于中文手写签名的细粒度结构退化场景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about handwritten Chinese character recognition/augmentation, which is a completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors, 3D motion synthesis from video, and temporal animation generation. This paper deals with static 2D character images and data augmentation for OCR, not motion generation or temporal animation. Even though both are in Computer Graphics broadly, the application domains are entirely different - character recognition vs. video-to-motion synthesis. The pain points and methods are unrelated.

title: Where Will They Go? Modelling Multimodal Pedestrian Manoeuvres from Ego-centric Videos
comment: Accepted at The IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2026
summary: Pedestrian trajectory prediction from an ego-centric camera is challenging since it depends on complex interactions with vehicles and scene context, as well as the intention of the pedestrian. By modelling correlation and intent from the historical and future trajectories of the pedestrian, it will usually result in a multimodal (i.e. multiple modes) distribution. Existing stochastic predictors often sample multiple futures from a single unimodal distribution, which can yield sub-optimal 'mixed-mode' trajectories that lie between distinct motion patterns and become implausible in real scenes. In this paper, we propose MMPM, a mode-aware framework that separately models future trajectory distributions into semantically meaningful modes based on the pedestrian's crossing behavior. MMPM consists of two modules: behavior-aware Pedestrian Interaction Module (PIM) that jointly captures pedestrian-vehicle and pedestrian-environment interactions by introducing gaze, head and hand gesture, and a CVAE-based Mode-aware Trajectory Predictor (MTP) module to model the future trajectory distributions on two modes, crossing and non-crossing the road, separately. A query-based decoder further enforces mode consistency during decoding. Experiments on PIE and JAAD datasets show that our method surpasses state-of-the-art baselines. Our proposed MTP is model-agnostic, which can be integrated into existing frameworks such as BiTrap-NP and SGNet-ED to further improve future trajectory prediction performance. We additionally introduce a data-driven validation protocol that matches predictions to spatio-temporally consistent ground-truth trajectories, demonstrating improved frame-wise displacement errors over previous work.

AI.tldr: 从自我中心视角进行行人轨迹预测的框架MMPM，通过将未来轨迹分布分离为语义上有意义的模式（过马路和非过马路）来改进预测。
AI.motivation: 现有随机预测器从单峰分布中采样多个未来，导致混合模式轨迹处于不同运动模式之间，在实际场景中变得不合理。
AI.method: 提出MMPM框架包含两个模块：1) 行为感知的行人交互模块(PIM)通过引入眼神、头部和手部姿势来共同捕捉行人与车辆和环境的交互；2) 基于CVAE的模式感知轨迹预测器(MTP)分别对过马路和非过马路两种模式的未来轨迹分布进行建模。查询解码器进一步强制模式一致性。
AI.result: 在PIE和JAAD数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于最先进的基线方法。MTP是模型无关的，可以集成到现有框架中进一步提高轨迹预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过模式感知方法有效解决了轨迹预测的多模态问题，提高了预测的合理性和准确性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about pedestrian trajectory prediction for autonomous driving (ego-centric vehicle perception), which is in the robotics/intelligent transportation domain - NOT Computer Graphics. Despite dealing with "motion/trajectories," the application domain is entirely different: autonomous vehicle safety vs. video-generated 3D animation synthesis. The methods (CVAE-based trajectory prediction) are also different from the research profile's methods (diffusion-based video generation, VLM quality assessment, skeleton-based 3D motion). The paper doesn't address any of the pain points related to video-generated motion priors, visual guidance features, quality supervision, or semantic 2D-to-3D gaps in computer graphics.

title: DreamReg: Belief-Driven World Model for 2D-3D Ultrasound Registration
summary: Ultrasound (US) is widely used for surgical navigation, yet real-time registration between intraoperative 2D slices and preoperative 3D volumes remains challenging due to partial observability, speckle noise, and the action-dependent US acquisition. Existing methods are one-shot or short-horizon, making it hard for them to gather evidence over time or capture how surgeons adjust probe motion based on on-screen feedback. We propose DreamReg, a belief-driven world-model framework that formulates 2D-3D registration as belief updating over rigid transformations. DreamReg maintains a latent belief state that summarizes past observations and poses information, and continuously refines the transformation through learned dynamics as new slices arrive. During training, DreamReg is exposed to probe-motion trajectories that mimic clinical scanning behavior and learns to update its belief by conditioning pose refinement on the current US observation. During inference, DreamReg refines registration via internal imagination: it rolls out the learned world model to simulate candidate probe motions and their predicted observations, and integrates these imagined outcomes to converge to an accurate rigid transformation. Experiments on CAMUS and u-RegPro datasets demonstrate improved robustness and competitive registration accuracy for real-time guidance compared with state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: DreamReg是一种基于信念驱动的世界模型框架，用于手术导航中的2D-3D超声配准。该方法通过维护潜在信念状态来总结过去的观察和姿态信息，并随着新切片的到来通过学习到的动态持续细化变换。在训练过程中，DreamReg暴露于模仿临床扫描行为的探头运动轨迹，并学习通过基于当前超声观察来细化姿态更新其信念。在推理过程中，DreamReg通过内部想象来细化配准：它展开学习到的世界模型来模拟候选探头运动及其预测观察，并将这些想象的结果整合起来以收敛到准确的刚性变换。
AI.motivation: 超声在手术导航中广泛应用，但术中2D切片与术前3D体积之间的实时配准仍具挑战性，原因包括部分可观测性、散斑噪声以及依赖动作的超声采集。现有的方法是一次性或短视野的，难以随时间收集证据，也难以捕捉外科医生如何根据屏幕反馈调整探头运动。
AI.method: DreamReg维护一个潜在信念状态来总结过去的观察和姿态信息，并随着新切片的到来通过学习到的动态持续细化变换。在训练过程中，DreamReg暴露于模仿临床扫描行为的探头运动轨迹，并学习通过基于当前超声观察来细化姿态更新其信念。在推理过程中，DreamReg通过内部想象来细化配准：它展开学习到的世界模型来模拟候选探头运动及其预测观察，并将这些想象的结果整合起来以收敛到准确的刚性变换。
AI.result: 在CAMUS和u-RegPro数据集上的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，DreamReg具有更好的鲁棒性和具有竞争力的配准精度，适用于实时导航。
AI.conclusion: DreamReg提供了一种新的信念驱动方法来解决2D-3D配准的挑战，可处理部分可观测性、散斑噪声和依赖动作的超声采集等问题，具有更好的鲁棒性和具有竞争力的精度。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D-3D ultrasound registration for surgical navigation, which is in the medical imaging domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focusing on video-generated motion priors, diffusion-based video generation, and 3D motion synthesis. title: Rethinking Air-Ground Collaboration: A Progressive Cross-Task Benchmark and Socialized Learning Framework
summary: Air-ground collaborative perception is crucial for robust visual understanding in real-world dynamic environments. However, existing studies typically formulate collaboration as single-task cross-view fusion, overlooking the functional dependencies among localization, target association, and fine-grained parsing. In addition, the heterogeneous nature of aerial and ground views introduces substantial geometric, scale, and occlusion discrepancies, making uniform feature sharing vulnerable to negative transfer. To tackle these issues, we model air-ground perception as a progressive cross-task collaboration task and construct the Air-Ground Progressive Collaboration (AGPC) benchmark, a spatio-temporally aligned benchmark comprising more than 745K raw video frames. Built upon this benchmark, we propose Socialized Co-Perception (SCP), a coarse-to-fine framework that organizes collaboration progressively from aerial global localization to ground target association and identity-aware parsing. Its core module, the Dual-Layer Router (DLR), decouples input-side multi-scale expert selection from output-side task-conditioned modulation, enabling selective cross-view and cross-task interaction while suppressing harmful interference. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of SCP. It achieves a 3.73\% coevolutionary gain and a 7.86\% improvement in average downstream performance. These results show that task-conditioned collaboration is more effective than uniform fusion for heterogeneous air-ground perception. The code is available at https://github.com/g1136639260-spec/AGSCP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Air-Ground Progressive Collaboration (AGPC)基准和Socialized Co-Perception (SCP)框架，解决空地协同感知中的任务依赖和视图异构性问题，通过Dual-Layer Router模块实现选择性跨视图跨任务交互。
AI.motivation: 现有空地协同感知研究存在两个关键问题：1)将协作简化为单任务跨视图融合，忽视了定位、目标关联和细粒度解析之间的功能依赖；2)航空与地面视图的异构性导致几何、尺度和遮挡差异，统一特征共享易产生负迁移。
AI.method: 构建了包含74.5万帧原始视频的AGPC时空对齐基准；提出粗到细的SCP框架，组织从航空全局定位到地面目标关联再到身份感知解析的渐进式协作；核心模块Dual-Layer Router解耦输入侧多尺度专家选择和输出侧任务条件调制，实现选择性跨视图跨任务交互同时抑制有害干扰。
AI.result: SCP框架取得3.73%的协同进化增益和7.86%的下游任务平均性能提升，验证了任务条件协作优于异构空地感知的统一融合。
AI.conclusion: 将空地感知建模为渐进式跨任务协作是有效的，任务条件调制协作比统一融合更适合处理航空与地面视图的异构性问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving perception (air-ground sensor fusion for vehicle navigation), not Computer Graphics. The application domain is completely different - it deals with multi-view perception for autonomous vehicles rather than 3D motion generation, video animation synthesis, or skeleton-based motion modeling. While both fields use neural networks, the goals are entirely different: perception vs. motion synthesis. This does not address any of the research profile's pain points about video-generated motion priors, 2D-to-3D motion representation, or temporal animation consistency.

title: From Bounding Boxes to Visual Reasoning: An On-Policy Data Annotation Tool for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are rapidly advancing toward sophisticated grounded structured visual reasoning. Training models for such advanced capabilities demands a new genre of data that seamlessly unifies spatial coordinates, open-vocabulary descriptions, structured attributes, and topological relationships into a singular representation. However, existing data annotation tools fundamentally fail to meet these intricate demands, suffering from three systematic bottlenecks: limited expressiveness, severe annotation-training decoupling, and poor data reusability. To bridge this infrastructure gap, we introduce an open-source annotation tool, ScreenAnnotator. First, we define a unified annotation atom schema that binds spatial, semantic, and structural primitives into a single unit. Second, we implement an on-policy annotation loop embedded with a Bayesian Annotation Verifier (BAV). Finally, we design a template-driven multi-task data synthesis process dynamically transforms static atoms into diverse multi-dimensional reasoning tasks, eliminating redundant re-annotation. The on-policy loop drives the annotation accept rate to nearly 100% on flowcharts and 77% on GUI screenshots, while steadily reducing per-image annotation time as labeled data accumulate. In the flowchart scenario, fine-tuning a VLM yields 76.1% average accuracy, which is a 35.1% point absolute gain. Our code is available at: https://github.com/WnQinm/Annotator.

AI.tldr: 提出开源标注工具ScreenAnnotator，解决视觉语言模型训练中空间坐标、开放词汇描述、结构属性和拓扑关系统一标注的系统性瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有数据标注工具存在三大系统性瓶颈：表达有限、标注与训练严重脱节、数据可重用性差，无法满足视觉语言模型对复杂结构化视觉推理的训练需求。
AI.method: 定义统一标注原子模式绑定空间、语义和结构原语；实现嵌入贝叶斯标注验证器的策略式标注循环；设计模板驱动的多任务数据合成流程，将静态原子转换为多样化多维推理任务。
AI.result: 流程图标注接受率接近100%，GUI截图达77%，随标注数据积累标注时间递减；微调VLM在流程图场景获76.1%平均准确率，绝对提升35.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ScreenAnnotator有效解决了标注基础设施缺口，通过统一标注模式和策略式循环显著提升标注质量与效率，为视觉语言模型的复杂推理训练提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about a data annotation tool (ScreenAnnotator) for Vision-Language Models, focusing on visual reasoning and dataset creation for VLM training. While it mentions VLM, the application domain is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics (video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, temporal motion modeling, skeleton-based animation). The paper addresses computer vision dataset annotation bottlenecks, not motion synthesis or animation generation. It uses completely different methods (annotation tools, Bayesian validators) unrelated to diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion models, or skeleton-based temporal modeling. This is a computer vision/dataset creation paper that does not intersect with the computer graphics motion generation domain.

title: Quantification of Uncertainty with Adversarial Models in Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Reliable pixel-level uncertainty quantification holds the potential to transform clinical workflows by enabling high-fidelity longitudinal monitoring and distinguishing true pathological changes from artifacts. Ideally, these models provide the stability required for critical treatment planning and surgical intervention. However, standard deep learning models often suffer from miscalibration, yielding overconfident predictions that mask underlying vulnerabilities at subtle pathological boundaries. To address this, we propose QUAM-SM, a post-hoc framework using targeted adversarial search to identify "adversarially fragile" pixels. By actively seeking perturbations that expose predictive instability, our method highlights regions where decisions are most vulnerable to being flipped. Importantly, the framework disentangles epistemic uncertainty from aleatoric uncertainty. Experiments on two public datasets with multiple expert annotations demonstrate that QUAM-SM outperforms both standard and recent uncertainty estimation approaches in terms of reliability and boundary sensitivity. Code is available at https://github.com/HanaJebril/quam_sm

AI.tldr: 本文提出QUAM-SM，一个用于医学图像中像素级不确定性量化的后处理框架。该框架通过对抗性搜索识别"对抗性脆弱"像素，区分认知不确定性和偶然不确定性，旨在解决深度学习模型在医学图像分析中的过度自信预测问题。
AI.motivation: 在临床应用中，可靠的像素级不确定性量化对于纵向监测、区分病理变化与伪影至关重要。标准深度学习模型常存在校准不当的问题，产生过度自信的预测，掩盖细微病理边界处的潜在脆弱性，这可能影响治疗规划和手术干预的决策。
AI.method: QUAM-SM采用后处理框架，使用有针对性的对抗性搜索来识别"对抗性脆弱"像素。通过主动寻找暴露预测不稳定性的扰动，该方法高亮显示最容易发生预测翻转的区域，并从认知不确定性中分离出偶然不确定性。
AI.result: 在两个具有多位专家标注的公共数据集上的实验表明，QUAM-SM在可靠性和边界敏感性方面均优于标准方法和近期的不确定性估计方法。
AI.conclusion: QUAM-SM能够为关键的治疗规划和手术干预提供所需的稳定性，有效识别决策最易受影响的区域，为临床工作流程的转型提供了潜力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is in the medical imaging domain (medical image segmentation), not computer graphics. Even though it uses adversarial concepts, the method (adversarial search for uncertainty estimation) is unrelated to diffusion-based video generation, VLM for quality assessment, or skeleton-based motion representation needed in the research profile.

title: Learning to Distort: Weakly-Supervised Image Quality Transfer for Prostate DWI Correction
summary: Single-shot echo-planar prostate diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) is frequently complicated by geometric distortions, which impact the ability to derive reliable diagnoses from such images. Developing automated correction methods is challenged by the absence of paired distorted and undistorted clinical scans. In this paper, we first propose a novel weakly-supervised image quality transfer (IQT) framework from undistorted to distorted images that utilizes image quality assessment (IQA) signals to supervise the transfer process. Unlike traditional methods that require expensive, voxel-wise paired data or resort to developing unpaired algorithms, our approach utilizes image-level quality labels (here, distorted vs. undistorted) to establish latent quality prototypes within a pre-trained feature space. Recognizing that simulating realistic distortions is more reliable than direct unpaired correction, we describe a weakly-supervised prototype flow matching algorithm to explicitly regularize generative trajectories towards distorted prototypes, producing realistic susceptibility artifacts that mimic clinical degradations. By synthesizing these realistic pairs, we enable a second IQT model to be trained in the forward direction for distortion correction. Experimental results demonstrate that our generated images successfully mimic the diagnostic interference of real-world artifacts, which leads to more capable distortion correction IQT models. In addition to qualitative comparisons, we also conduct exhaustive quantitative evaluations that compare our approach with existing unpaired approaches (e.g., CycleGAN, UNIT-DDPM, and OT-FM) - as either forward or reverse alternatives - by assessing clinical downstream task performance in PI-RADS and Gleason score classification, using both in-distribution and external data sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督图像质量迁移(IQT)框架，用于校正单次激发回波平面前列腺扩散加权成像(DWI)中的几何畸变。
AI.motivation: 前列腺DWI常受几何畸变影响，缺乏成对的失真和未失真临床扫描作为训练数据，导致自动校正方法开发困难。
AI.method: 1)提出弱监督IQT框架，利用图像质量评估(IQA)信号作为监督，无需成对数据；2)开发弱监督原型流匹配算法，合成逼真的失真伪影；3)利用合成数据训练第二个IQT模型进行失真校正。
AI.result: 生成的图像成功模拟真实临床伪影的诊断干扰，产生了更有效的失真校正IQT模型。在PI-RADS和Gleason评分分类的下游临床任务中，性能优于现有非配对方法(CycleGAN、UNIT-DDPM、OT-FM)。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过原型流匹配合成训练数据，有效解决了非配对图像校正的训练难题，为前列腺DWI的临床畸变校正提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging (prostate DWI correction), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation and video synthesis. Although both use diffusion methods, the paper applies diffusion to medical image quality transfer, not to video generation or 3D motion synthesis. Medical image processing is fundamentally different from computer graphics animation generation - they address completely different problems, use different data representations, and target different downstream applications.

title: Bridging Single Distortion Artifacts and Mmultifactorial Clinical Quality: Few-shot Biparametric MRI Quality Assessment via Distortion-trained Prototypical Networks
summary: Clinical prostate multi-parametric MRI relies heavily on high-quality diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), yet reading DWI is frequently compromised by geometric distortion, often caused by rectal air. Assessing quality via the PI-QUAL scoring system is an emerging clinical standard, but it is subjective, time-consuming and suffers from a class imbalance where low-quality cases are diverse and relatively scarce. Using the PRIME clinical trial as an example, there are $6\%$ images with PI-QUAL scores lower than 4, $87\%$ of DWI issues are due to distortion. Many of the other clinical quality issues are under-represented. To address this common dual-scarcity of annotated clinical data, we propose a few-shot biparametric prototypical network for automated image quality assessment (IQA). Our framework utilizes a dual-branch 3D ResNet to fuse T2-weighted and DWI features, providing anatomical context to distinguish true morphology from distortion. To handle real-world heterogeneity, we introduce feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM) and a gradient reversal layer (GRL) to align feature distributions conditioned on varying b-values while suppressing acquisition-related biases. We demonstrate that a model meta-trained solely on comparatively objective, readily obtainable distortion labels can effectively adapt to predicting complex, multi-factorial clinical quality scores such as PI-QUAL using only five representative samples. Experimental results on two datasets show that our method significantly outperforms few-shot learning baselines for this challenging IQA task, offering a practically feasible and data-efficient solution for standardizing prostate MRI quality control in clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种少样本双参数原型网络，用于前列腺多参数MRI的自动图像质量评估(IQA)，旨在解决临床中标注数据稀缺和质量评分主观性的问题。
AI.motivation: 前列腺MRI的扩散加权成像(DWI)常受几何失真影响，当前PI-QUAL评分系统主观、耗时且存在类别不平衡问题。PRIME临床试验显示6%图像PI-QUAL评分低于4，87%的DWI问题源于失真。标注临床数据的双重稀缺性限制了深度学习模型的应用。
AI.method: 提出少样本双参数原型网络：1)双分支3D ResNet融合T2加权像和DWI特征，提供解剖学上下文以区分真实形态与失真；2)特征级线性调制(FiLM)和梯度反转层(GRL)对齐不同b值条件下的特征分布，抑制获取相关偏差；3)仅使用5个代表性样本即可适应预测PI-QUAL评分。
