AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于少样本学习基线，为这一具有挑战性的IQA任务提供了切实可行且数据高效的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可通过少量样本有效适应复杂的多因素临床质量评分，为前列腺MRI质量控制的临床工作流标准化提供了实用可行的方法。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about medical image quality assessment for prostate MRI scans (clinical medical AI), not computer graphics or video-generated motion synthesis. While it mentions "diffusion-weighted imaging" (DWI), this is a medical imaging modality, not diffusion models for generation. The methods (few-shot prototypical networks, 3D ResNet) are for classifying MRI quality in clinical settings, unrelated to 3D motion generation, skeleton-based motion representation, or temporal animation synthesis. No relevance to the research profile's pain points about video-to-motion conversion, visual guidance features for animation, or temporal consistency in synthesized 3D animations.

title: Test-Time Adaptation in Optical Coherence Tomography Using Trajectory-Aligned Time-Independent Flow
summary: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is essential in ophthalmology, but inconsistent image quality especially in low-cost devices hinders automated analysis. To address this, we introduce a flow-matching-based test-time adaptation method that generates high-quality surrogate images from noisy inputs. Typically, domain gaps between test and training data cause pixel distribution mismatches during the denoising process. We overcome this by matching the test image's histogram to synthetic reference trajectories, successfully aligning the input with expected distributions. Additionally, we remove the network's time conditioning to account for slight deviations in real-world noise distributions. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in segmenting critical biomarkers for two stages of Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD). Code is available: https://github.com/Veit21/tta-flow.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于流匹配（flow-matching）的测试时适应方法，用于从低质量OCT图像生成高质量替代图像，以支持AMD分期的生物标志物分割。
AI.motivation: 低成本设备上的OCT图像质量不一致，阻碍了自动化分析；同时，测试数据与训练数据之间的领域差异导致去噪过程中像素分布不匹配。
AI.method: 1) 使用流匹配生成高质量替代图像；2) 将测试图像直方图与合成参考轨迹匹配以对齐分布；3) 移除网络的时间调节以适应真实世界噪声偏差。
AI.result: 在两个年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）分期的关键生物标志物分割上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了领域分布不匹配问题，显著提升了低质量OCT图像的可用性，为AMD的自动化诊断提供了有效技术支撑。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about medical imaging (OCT for AMD biomarker segmentation), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically focused on 3D motion generation, video-generated motion priors, and temporal animation synthesis. Although both use flow-matching/diffusion methods, the medical imaging domain is entirely unrelated to computer graphics motion generation. This is like comparing diffusion models for image generation vs human motion generation - the application domain is the critical distinction.

title: Performance Gap Analysis between Latin and Arabic Scripts HTR
comment: this paper accepted at TIPS workshop ICPR 2026
summary: Recent studies have shown that handwritten text recognition (HTR) systems perform worse on Arabic-script datasets than on Latin-script data. However, the reasons for this gap are still not well understood due to the lack of controlled comparisons. In this work, we present a comprehensive study of Arabic and Latin scripts HTR using a unified CRNN model for line-level HTR across nine datasets (including KHATT (Arabic), Muharaf (Arabic), NUST-UHWR (Urdu), PHTD (Persian), IAM (English), READ-2016 (German), and others) and di ferent training sizes (K in {100, 500, 1000, 2000, ..., Kfull}). Our results show the performance gap remains: it is large in low-resource settings, decreases with more data, but remains even at full scale, with a consistent difference of 5-7 CER points. We show that annotation quality matters, as many datasets contain labeling errors. Cleaning reduces error rates and narrows the gap, but does not eliminate it. In addition, we find that a fixed number of training samples provides less effective coverage in Arabic due to higher visual variability, requiring more data to learn similar representations. We compare recognition across datasets in terms of the number of text lines and the number of characters, showing an equivalence trade-off. We compare character frequency distributions across scripts and show that Arabic is significantly more heavy-tailed than Latin. Our error analysis reveals that around 30 percent of substitution errors in Arabic datasets (e.g., KHATT) are caused by confusion between visually similar characters, compared to about 15 percent in Latin-script datasets such as IAM.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过统一的CRNN模型对阿拉伯语和拉丁语手写文本识别进行综合对比分析，揭示了阿拉伯语识别性能始终低于拉丁语约5-7个CER百分点，且在低资源场景下差距更大。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏控制性对比研究，阿拉伯语手写识别性能落后于拉丁语的根本原因尚不明确，亟需系统性的对比分析来理解这一差距的来源。
AI.method: 使用统一的CRNN模型在9个数据集（阿拉伯语KHATT、Muharaf、乌尔都语NUST-UHWR、波斯语PHTD、英语IAM、德语READ-2016等）上进行线级手写识别，测试不同训练样本量（100至完整数据集）的性能表现，并分析标注质量、字符频率分布和错误类型。
AI.result: 性能差距随数据量增加而缩小，但在完整数据下仍保持5-7个CER百分点；标注错误普遍存在，清理后可缩小差距；阿拉伯语因视觉变异性更高需要更多训练样本；阿拉伯语字符频率呈重尾分布；约30%的阿拉伯语替换错误源于相似字符混淆，拉丁语仅约15%。
AI.conclusion: 阿拉伯语手写识别的性能差距源于多重因素，包括标注质量、字符视觉相似性高导致的混淆以及字符分布的重尾特性，仅通过增加数据无法完全弥合这一差距。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper is about Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) for OCR/document analysis, which is an entirely different field from Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, skeleton-based motion representation, and temporal motion modeling for computer graphics/animation. This paper addresses handwritten text recognition (Arabic vs Latin scripts) using CRNN for scanned documents - not related to video generation, motion synthesis, or computer graphics at all.

title: LARE: Low-Attention Region Encoding for Text-Image Retrieval
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Efficient Multimodal Question Answering (EMM-QA). Code: https://github.com/AbdulmalikDS/LARE ; Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/AbdulmalekDS/Dense-Set
summary: Image retrieval in crowded scenes is particularly challenging due to the salience bias of conventional visual encoders, which tend to focus on dominant objects while neglecting low-attention regions that are often crucial for fine-grained retrieval. We propose LARE (Low-Attention Region Encoding), a framework that explicitly models these overlooked regions. LARE adopts a dual-encoding strategy that encodes low-attention regions of an image and the full image in parallel, leading to more diverse and informative image embeddings. To evaluate image retrieval performance in challenging crowded scenes, we introduce Dense-Set, a challenging subset derived from COCO and Flickr30K. In this subset, images are re-captioned to provide richer descriptions of low-attention or previously overlooked regions. This dataset highlights the limitations of existing retrieval models and enables a more rigorous evaluation under densely crowded scene conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework improves retrieval performance by preserving subtle, non-dominant visual cues within the shared latent space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LARE框架，通过双编码策略显式建模低注意力区域，以解决拥挤场景中图像检索的传统视觉编码器偏差问题，并构建了Dense-Set数据集进行评估。
AI.motivation: 拥挤场景中的图像检索面临显著挑战，传统视觉编码器存在显着性偏差，倾向于关注主导对象而忽略低注意力区域，但这些区域对于细粒度检索往往至关重要。
AI.method: LARE采用双编码策略，并行编码图像的低注意力区域和完整图像，生成更多样化和信息丰富的图像嵌入。同时构建了Dense-Set数据集，从COCO和Flickr30K中提取并重新标注以提供更丰富的低注意力区域描述。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的框架通过在共享潜在空间中保留细微的非主导视觉线索，提高了检索性能。
AI.conclusion: LARE框架能够有效解决拥挤场景中的图像检索问题，为细粒度视觉检索提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about text-image retrieval in crowded scenes, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation and video-based motion synthesis. While both involve visual encoding, the application domains are entirely different: LARE deals with image retrieval tasks, not motion generation, animation synthesis, or temporal modeling. The paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned (video-generated motion priors, 3D motion representation, temporal consistency in animations). The methods and goals are fundamentally incompatible - this is a computer vision retrieval paper, not a computer graphics/motion generation paper.

title: DINO-Med3D: Bridging Dimension and Domain Gaps in Volumetric Segmentation via Progressive Adaptation
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2026. The camera-ready version and link will be made publicly available upon publication
summary: Although DINOv3 has demonstrated remarkable semantic discrimination in natural imagery, its direct application to volumetric medical segmentation is hindered by inherent dimension and domain disparities. To resolve these issues, we propose DINO-Med3D, a two-stage progressive framework that repurpose the pre-trained DINOv3 encoder for 3D medical tasks. In the first stage, we mitigate the dimension gap by introducing a multi-slice embedding module that incorporates pseudo-3D context, while simultaneously employing a segmentation proxy task to adapt representations learned from natural scenes to the medical domain. Subsequently, we further enhance volumetric understanding by adding lightweight 3D adapters into the frozen backbone to enforce global inter-slice continuity. Finally, to compensate for the spatial information loss inherent in the embedding process, we design a parallel detail recovery stream to explicitly preserve high-frequency boundary cues. Extensive experiments on five public datasets demonstrate that our approach successfully adapts DINOv3 to the medical domain and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: DINO-Med3D是一个两阶段渐进框架,用于将预训练的DINOv3模型从2D自然图像适配到3D医学分割任务。
AI.motivation: DINOv3在自然图像上表现出色,但由于维度差异(2D vs 3D)和领域差异(自然图像 vs 医学图像),无法直接应用于 volumetric 医学分割。
AI.method: 提出两阶段渐进框架:1)多切片嵌入模块+分割代理任务缩小维度和领域差距;2)轻量级3D适配器增强切片间连续性;3)并行细节恢复流保留高频边界信息。
AI.result: 在5个公共数据集上显著优于当前最先进方法,成功将DINOv3适配到医学领域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了维度差距和领域迁移问题,为医学影像分割提供了新的预训练范式。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about 3D medical volumetric segmentation, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics for video-generated motion priors and 3D animation synthesis. Although both deal with 2D-to-3D adaptation conceptually, the domain (medical imaging vs computer graphics/motion generation), goal (segmentation vs motion synthesis), and target (medical CT/MRI vs human motion) are entirely different. The methods also differ: DINOv3 adaptation for medical imaging vs diffusion-based video generation for motion priors.

title: Automatic ply-specific analyses of CFRP micrographs using shortest-path-based ply distinction
summary: We present an automated approach to distinguish between ply instances in semantic segmentation masks of high-resolution carbon-fiber reinforced polymer micrographs. Interpreting the segmentation mask as a graph with pixels as vertices, enables us to use a shortest-path algorithm yielding the ply-separating paths. Thereby, we bridge the gap between semantic segmentation and ply instance segmentation using global information. We successfully apply our approach on high-resolution micrographs featuring a broad range of characteristics like artificially added gaps in single or multiple plies, different stacking sequences and ply traversing cracks. Assigning each fiber pixel to a ply based on the calculated paths, allows for a comprehensive, quantitative ply analysis with respect to its microstructural properties like the local fiber volume fraction as well as locally resolved ply and interleaf layer thickness. These insights help to reveal manufacturing-induced inhomogeneities, draw conclusions on manufacturing parameters and link mechanical properties to underlying microstructural imperfections.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自动化的方法来区分碳纤维增强聚合物（Carbon-Fiber Reinforced Polymer, CFRP）高分辨率显微图像中语义分割mask的不同层（ply）实例。
AI.motivation: 语义分割可以识别纤维像素，但无法区分不同层；现有方法缺乏从语义分割到层实例分割的桥梁，需要利用全局信息实现层实例分割。
AI.method: 将语义分割mask视为图（以像素为顶点），使用最短路径算法生成层分离路径（ply-separating paths），将每根纤维像素分配给对应层。
AI.result: 成功应用于具有不同特征的高分辨率显微图像，包括单层/多层人为添加的间隙、不同的堆叠序列和层穿透裂纹；可进行局部纤维体积分数、层厚度的定量分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可揭示制造引起的微观结构不均匀性，建立制造参数与力学性能之间的联系，为CFRP材料的质量分析提供有效工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about materials science (CFRP micrograph analysis for composite materials), not Computer Graphics. While it uses a shortest-path algorithm, the application domain is completely different - analyzing carbon fiber reinforced polymer layers in micrographs, not video generation, motion synthesis, or 3D animation. This is a materials engineering/composites analysis task that has no relevance to diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion generation, or any computer graphics applications.

title: BindEdit: Taming Attention Leakage for Precise Multi-Object Image Editing
summary: Real image editing enables precise manipulation of visual content, yet existing methods often fail in complex multi-object scenarios, causing semantic blending, object duplication, or incomplete edits. We attribute these failures to attention leakage, where signals across spatial regions and text tokens become entangled during the denoising process. Specifically, we identify two distinct forms of leakage: Edit-Token Leakage, where ambiguous token-region alignment leads to object blending, and Source Dominance Leakage, where tokens of unchanged source objects overwhelm the attention intended for target entities. To resolve these leakages, we propose \textbf{BindEdit}, which enforces attention-level constraints within a single diffusion trajectory. To suppress Edit-Token Leakage, BindEdit jointly regularizes cross- and self-attention so that each target token group is bound to its corresponding spatial region while maintaining instance-level separation. To suppress Source Dominance Leakage, a cross-attention re-balancing mechanism amplifies target token influence and attenuates residual source semantics within editable regions. Moreover, a region fidelity term ensures that each target concept is expressed coherently across the entire editing mask. Additionally, we propose a comprehensive multi-object benchmark encompassing diverse object counts and categories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BindEdit consistently outperforms existing methods within a single diffusion trajectory, maintaining robust performance across both single- and multi-object editing scenarios.

AI.tldr: BindEdit是一种用于真实图像编辑的方法，通过在单一扩散轨迹中实施注意力级约束来解决多目标编辑中的注意力泄漏问题，包括编辑-token泄漏和源主导泄漏。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂多目标场景中常出现语义混合、目标重复或编辑不完整等问题，这些失败归因于注意力泄漏——去噪过程中空间区域和文本token信号相互纠缠。
AI.method: 提出BindEdit方法：1)联合正则化交叉和自注意力以抑制编辑-token泄漏；2)交叉注意力再平衡机制放大目标token影响；3)区域保真度项确保目标概念在编辑掩码内一致表达。同时构建综合多目标基准测试。
AI.result: BindEdit在单目标和多目标编辑场景中均一致优于现有方法，在单一扩散轨迹内保持稳健性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力级约束有效解决了多目标图像编辑中的注意力泄漏问题，显著提升了编辑质量。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 2D image editing using diffusion models, while the research profile is about video-generated 3D motion/animation synthesis with skeleton-based representations. These are completely different application domains - one edits 2D images, the other generates 3D human motion from video. Although both use diffusion models, the method domain is entirely different. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (motion priors, visual guidance features for 3D motion, temporal consistency in 3D animations). This is a case where the method (diffusion) exists in both but the application domain is completely unrelated.

title: Physics-IQ Verified
summary: Video generative models ( VGMs) have become a new frontier that can be used not just for video generation but for a multitude of downstream tasks, including world modeling. To advance these tasks, a good video model must understand the physical reality of the world. Evaluating this understanding is an emerging field and has led to the Physics-IQ benchmark, which quantifies this explicitly by comparing model-generated videos to real-world videos of physical experiments. In this work, we present a systematic audit of the Physics-IQ benchmark, expose shortcomings and propose three solutions that sharpen how we can measure physical understanding of VGMs. Specifically, we improve prompt and ground-truth quality to reduce the influence of confounding factors and further introduce a sample-level scoring system that weights each sample and metric equally. Our resulting benchmark, Physics-IQ Verified, refines 57.6\% of all samples and improves over 34.8\% of prompts. In a comparison study using six image-to-video generative models, we observe moderate but meaningful ranking changes (Kendall's $τ= 0.46$). We hope Physics-IQ Verified advances the community by providing a more reliable signal toward physically accurate VGMs. The code for the benchmark can be accessed at https://github.com/google-deepmind/physics-iq-benchmark

AI.tldr: 论文提出了Physics-IQ Verified基准，用于评估视频生成模型(VGM)对物理世界的理解能力，改进了原有Physics-IQ基准的样本质量和评分系统。
AI.motivation: 现有Physics-IQ基准存在缺陷，可能无法准确衡量视频生成模型的物理理解能力，需要系统性审计和改进。
AI.method: 对Physics-IQ基准进行系统性审计，提出三个解决方案：1)改进提示词质量 2)改进真值视频质量以减少混淆因素 3)引入样本级评分系统以等权重量化每个样本和指标。
AI.result: Physics-IQ Verified改进了57.6%的样本和34.8%的提示词，使用6个图像转视频模型进行对比研究，观察到中等但有意义的排名变化(Kendall's τ= 0.46)。
AI.conclusion: Physics-IQ Verified基准能够提供更可靠的信号，帮助社区推进物理准确视频生成模型的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video generation model evaluation (benchmarking), which is a different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation for computer graphics. While both involve video, the profile specifically deals with extracting visual guidance features from 2D video to generate 3D skeletal motion, not generating 2D videos that understand physics. The paper's pain points (evaluating physical understanding of VGM) don't align with the profile's pain points (3D motion representation, temporal consistency, semantic gap between 2D features and 3D motion). Using similar "diffusion-based video generation" methods but in completely different application domains (2D video generation vs 3D motion generation) makes this only superficially related.

title: SP-TransientBench: A Real-Captured Single Photon Perception Benchmark
summary: Single-photon LiDAR (SPL) based on single-photon avalanche diode (SPAD) sensing enables time-resolved photon measurements with extreme sensitivity, offering unique potential for active 3D perception in photon-starved scenarios.However, real-world single photon perception remains fundamentally challenging due to unique measurement noise and complex multi-return transient phenomena, which jointly complicate geometric reconstruction and semantic scene understanding. Despite growing interest in SPAD-based sensing, existing studies are largely limited to simulated data or small-scale controlled captures. As a result, systematic evaluation of real-world single photon perception across depth estimation, multi-view reconstruction, and 3D semantic understanding remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce SP-TransientBench (STB), a real-captured multi-task benchmark for single photon perception. SP-TransientBenc comprises 10 diverse scenes and 10,297 views captured using a solid-state single-photon LiDAR at $256\times192$ resolution. Each view provides full time-of-flight histograms with multi-return behavior,standardized metadata, and calibrated camera poses for multi-view evaluation. We further provide 13-class 3D semantic annotations for selected scenes. By providing dedicated data splits and evaluation protocols for each task, STB enables consistent and reproducible benchmarking of real-world single photon perception across multiple 3D vision problems. The dataset and code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 构建了SP-TransientBench，一个用于单光子感知的真实多任务基准数据集，包含10个场景、10297个视图和13类3D语义标注。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的单光子感知面临独特的测量噪声和复杂的多回波瞬态现象，导致几何重建和语义场景理解困难，而现有研究主要局限于模拟数据或小规模控制捕获，缺乏系统性的真实世界评估。
AI.method: 使用固态单光子LiDAR在256×192分辨率下捕获10个多样场景和10297个视图，每个视图提供完整的时间飞行直方图、多回波行为、标准化元数据和校准的相机姿态，并提供13类3D语义注释。
AI.result: STB提供了专门的数分割和评估协议，支持深度估计、多视图重建和3D语义理解等多任务评估，实现了对真实世界单光子感知的可重复基准测试。
AI.conclusion: SP-TransientBench填补了真实世界单光子感知benchmark的空白，为单光子3D视觉研究提供了标准化的数据和评估框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about single photon LiDAR perception for 3D reconstruction (perception/reconstruction domain), while the research profile is about diffusion-based video generation for 3D motion synthesis/animation (generation domain). They are in completely different application domains: LiDAR perception vs. motion generation. The methods are also entirely different - no diffusion models, video generation, or motion modeling involved.

title: Motion-Focused Latent Action Enables Cross-Embodiment VLA Training from Human EgoVideos
summary: Training generalist Vision-Language-Action(VLA) models typically requires massive, diverse robotic datasets with high-fidelity action annotations. While egocentric human manipulation videos are abundant and capture significant environmental diversity, the absence of action labels makes them difficult to use in conventional training paradigms. To address this, we propose a latent-action-based framework designed to extract general action priors from unlabeled human videos. The architecture features a Hybrid Disentangled VQ-VAE that decouples motion dynamics from environmental backgrounds through physical masks, enabling the construction of a cross-embodiment action codebook. By pre-training on human videos with the codebook, the VLM backbone learns deep representations of action intent. For adaptation to specific embodiments, we introduce an intent-perception decoupling strategy where the VLM predicts the action intent while a separate frozen visual encoder provides state-specific features to the action expert, thereby reducing action hallucinations. Results in simulation and real-world environments show that our method, pre-trained exclusively on unlabeled human videos, performs competitively with state-of-the-art VLA models trained on massive annotated datasets, requiring only 50 trajectories for downstream adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于潜动作的框架，从无标注的人类操作视频中提取通用动作先验知识，通过 Hybrid Disentangled VQ-VAE 解耦运动动力学与环境背景，构建跨化身动作码书，实现仅需50条轨迹即可完成下游适应的竞争性性能。
AI.motivation: 训练通用VLA模型通常需要大规模、多样化且带有高精度动作标注的机器人数据集，而带标注的机器人数据稀缺；虽然第一人称人类操作视频丰富且具有环境多样性，但缺乏动作标签导致难以用于传统训练范式。
AI.method: 1) Hybrid Disentangled VQ-VAE：通过物理掩码解耦运动与环境，实现跨化身动作码书构建；2) 预训练阶段：在人类视频上学习动作意图的深度表征；3) 意图-感知解耦：VLM预测动作意图+冻结视觉编码器提供状态特征，减少幻觉。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中，该方法仅使用无标注人类视频进行预训练，即可与使用大规模标注数据集训练的最先进VLA模型性能相当，下游适应仅需50条轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功证明了从无标注人类视频中学习通用动作先验的可行性，为解决机器人数据稀缺问题提供了新思路，具有重要的实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The paper is about ROBOTICS/VLA training (robot manipulation) not Computer Graphics/3D animation synthesis. While it uses VLM and video analysis, the goal is robotic control from human ego-videos, not video-generated motion priors or 3D animation synthesis. Robot motion generation is fundamentally different from human motion generation in computer graphics. The pain points are also different - this paper addresses robot learning rather than motion fidelity, temporal consistency, or semantic gap in 3D animation synthesis.

title: Mem-World: Memory-Augmented Action-Conditioned World Models for Persistent Robot Manipulation
summary: Action-conditioned world models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot learning, offering a scalable alternative to costly real-world experimentation by generating action-consistent video rollouts. However, persistent world modeling remains challenging in manipulation: frequent end-effector occlusions and rapid wrist-camera motion make the current observation insufficient for predicting future views, causing models to forget or hallucinate scene details seen in earlier frames. Existing memory retrieval strategies often fail to identify informative history in dynamic manipulation scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose Mem-World, a memory-augmented multi-view action-conditioned world model. At its core, we present W-VMem, a 4D wrist-view-centered surfel-indexed memory that anchors historical observations to temporally evolving surface elements. By explicitly modeling when and where scene elements are observed, W-VMem enables geometry-aware retrieval of relevant history frames conditioned on future actions. During generation, relevant history frames are selected via surfel-based rendering and scoring, providing informative and non-redundant context for prediction. Extensive experiments show that Mem-World generates persistent rollouts in complex manipulation scenarios, enables more reliable policy evaluation than Ctrl-World, improving the Pearson correlation with real-world performance by 14.5\%, and supports effective policy improvement through synthetic data generation, increasing success rates from 58\% to 72\% on long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: Mem-World是一种记忆增强的多视角动作条件世界模型，用于机器人操作任务。其核心是W-VMem，一种基于手腕视角的surfel索引记忆，通过将历史观测锚定到时间演变的表面元素上来实现几何感知的记忆检索。
AI.motivation: 当前世界模型在操作任务中面临挑战：频繁的末端执行器遮挡和快速的手腕相机运动导致观测不足，模型会遗忘或产生幻觉。现有记忆检索策略在动态操作场景中往往无法识别有意义的历史信息。
AI.method: 提出W-VMem（4D手腕视角中心surfel索引记忆），显式建模场景元素何时何地被观测，通过基于surfel的渲染和评分选择相关的历史帧，为预测提供信息丰富且无冗余的上下文。
AI.result: Mem-World在复杂操作场景中生成持久的视频rollout，相比Ctrl-World，与真实世界性能的皮尔逊相关性提高14.5%，在长时域任务中通过合成数据生成将成功率从58%提升至72%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了更可靠的政策评估，并通过合成数据生成支持有效的策略改进，为机器人操作中的世界建模提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ROBOT MANIPULATION using world models, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for video-generated 3D motion priors and character animation synthesis. The methods are also entirely different - this paper uses surfel-based memory and action-conditioned world models, not diffusion-based video generation, skeleton-based motion representation, or VLM quality assessment. While both deal with motion in some form, robot arm manipulation is fundamentally different from human motion generation/3D animation synthesis in computer graphics.

title: Visual-OPSD: Cross-Modal On-Policy Self-Distillation for Efficient Unified Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) interleave generated ''visual thoughts'' (VTs) with text reasoning to improve spatial tasks. This incurs roughly an order-of-magnitude inference cost from multi-step diffusion. We find this cost yields limited direct benefit. On ThinkMorph, removing or noising VTs barely changes accuracy across nine benchmarks. Once rendered, attention concentrates on the VT regardless of content. Yet a KL diagnostic shows that conditioning on a privileged VT trace shifts the model's completion distribution. This suggests the generation pathway encodes useful reasoning beyond the rendered pixels. Motivated by this gap, we propose Visual On-Policy Self-Distillation(Visual-OPSD). Teacher and student share identical weights but differ in context: the teacher sees privileged VTs while the student sees only the question. Token-level JSD distillation on on-policy student trajectories transfers the teacher's reasoning to a text-only student. Across nine benchmarks, Visual-OPSD improves over its generative teacher by $+3.40$pp with $14.3\times$ speedup (10.0s vs. 142.8s per sample) and outperforms same-scale VLMs by $+63.83$pp on VSP. A Gaussian-noise control ($+0.40$pp vs. $+10.28$pp for real VTs) and $58.4\%$ closure of the KL gap confirm that gains come from the semantic content of the generation pathway.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Visual-OPSD方法，通过自蒸馏将包含视觉思考的生成路径中的语义知识迁移到纯文本学生模型，在保持推理能力的同时实现14.3倍加速。
AI.motivation: 统一 multimodal models (UMMs)通过生成视觉思考(VTs)来提升空间任务推理，但推理成本高出一个数量级，且直接收益有限。作者试图探究生成路径中的语义知识是否可以在不增加推理成本的情况下被迁移到纯文本模型。
AI.method: 提出Visual On-Policy Self-Distillation (Visual-OPSD)方法：教师和学生模型共享权重，但教师能看到privileged VTs而学生只能看到问题。通过on-policy学生轨迹上的token-level JSD蒸馏将教师的推理能力迁移到纯文本学生模型。
AI.result: 在9个基准数据集上，Visual-OPSD相比生成式教师提升+3.40pp，实现14.3倍加速(10.0s vs 142.8s/样本)，在VSP上比同规模VLMs提升+63.83pp。Gaussian噪声控制实验(+0.40pp vs +10.28pp for real VTs)和58.4%的KL gap闭合证实收益来自生成路径的语义内容。
AI.conclusion: 视觉思考生成路径编码了超越渲染像素的有用推理知识。Visual-OPSD通过自蒸馏成功将这些知识迁移到纯文本学生模型，在大幅降低推理成本的同时提升性能，验证了知识迁移的有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal reasoning and knowledge distillation in Large Language Models/Visual Language Models - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The application domain is entirely different: it focuses on text-based reasoning tasks and efficiency in LLM inference, not video-generated motion priors, 3D animation synthesis, skeleton-based motion representation, or temporal consistency in synthesized animations. While both profiles mention VLMs, the paper uses VLM for reasoning tasks whereas the research profile needs VLM specifically for quality assessment in video/motion generation - these are fundamentally different applications.

title: Show, Don't Ask: Generative Visual Disambiguation for Composed Image Retrieval with Turn-Valid Coverage
summary: Composed image retrieval (CIR) uses a reference image and a text modification to search for a target image. However, such queries often describe several possible images rather than one exact target, making the user's intent ambiguous. Recent methods address this by using conformal prediction to estimate ambiguity and by asking users clarifying text questions. However, these methods have two limitations: their coverage guarantee only holds at the first interaction, and text questions are often insufficient for resolving fine-grained visual differences such as appearance, attributes, or viewpoint. We propose CLARA, a clarification framework that resolves ambiguity by showing users a small panel of visual alternatives. Instead of answering text questions, the user simply selects the prototype image closest to the intended target. This provides a direct visual signal and avoids relying on a model to predict the user's answer. To maintain valid conformal guarantees across multiple interaction rounds, CLARA reweights calibration using the likelihood ratio induced by the user's selection. The displayed prototypes are also constrained to represent the current candidate set and are snapped to real corpus images, ensuring that generated images cannot artificially improve coverage. Experiments on open-domain and fashion benchmarks show that CLARA matches single-turn state-of-the-art retrieval performance, maintains nominal coverage across interaction rounds, and finds the intended target in fewer rounds than strong text-question baselines. Its advantage is especially clear when ambiguity involves viewpoint or fine-grained attributes, where visual clarification is more effective than textual questioning.

AI.tldr: CLARA是一个解决组合图像检索(CIR)中用户意图歧义的框架，通过向用户展示视觉替代原型图像来获取澄清，而不是依赖文本问题。该方法使用重新加权校准来维持跨多轮交互的保形预测保证。
AI.motivation: 现有CIR方法存在两个局限：1) 保形预测的覆盖率保证仅在第一轮交互有效；2) 文本问题难以解决细粒度视觉差异（如外观、属性、视角）。这些限制导致用户意图仍然模糊，无法准确检索目标图像。
AI.method: CLARA框架：1) 显示包含视觉替代原型的小面板而非文本问题；2) 用户选择最接近目标图像的原型；3) 使用用户选择产生的似然比重新加权校准，维护多轮交互的保形保证；4) 原型被约束表示当前候选集并对齐到真实语料库图像。
AI.result: 实验表明：CLARA匹配单轮最先进的检索性能；在多轮交互中保持标称覆盖率；比强文本问题基线更少的轮次找到目标；当歧义涉及视角或细粒度属性时，视觉澄清优势尤其明显。
AI.conclusion: CLARA通过视觉澄清而非文本问题有效解决CIR中的用户意图歧义，为细粒度视觉差异提供更直接的信号，避免依赖模型预测用户回答，并维持有效的保形预测保证。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) - an image retrieval task in computer vision, completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The application domain mismatch is fundamental: the profile is about generating 3D animations from video (motion priors, temporal consistency, skeleton-based motion), while the paper is about retrieving static images using visual disambiguation. Although both involve "visual" elements, the core task, methods (diffusion for video motion vs. conformal prediction for image retrieval), and goals are entirely different. This is a case of different application domain entirely.

title: FlowObject: Flow Steering for Bridging Generative Priors and Reconstruction Fidelity
summary: Recovering complete 3D representations of objects from few casual image captures remains a significant challenge. Recent 3D generative models, particularly those based on Flow-Matching (FM), can synthesize high-quality textured assets; however, they often suffer from ''synthetic bias'' where learned priors override observational evidence, alongside a lack of alignment with the observed instance. Conversely, optimization-based methods like 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) provide high fidelity on visible surfaces but fail to reason about unobserved geometry. In this paper, we present FlowObject, a framework that reformulates sparse-view 3D reconstruction as a training-free, guided inverse problem. Our approach applies a dual-space guidance strategy to steer the Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) trajectory of a flow-matching model, enabling the completion of unseen regions through learned generative priors while enforcing strict consistency with real-world observations. By integrating a 3DGS refinement stage, FlowObject further bridges the gap between ''synthetic-looking'' generative outputs and photorealistic reconstructions. Comprehensive benchmarks on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that current state-of-the-art methods often struggle to achieve geometric completeness and observational consistency simultaneously, especially under severe occlusions. In contrast, our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art generative models and optimization-based frameworks in both geometric completeness and view-dependent appearance fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowObject框架，解决从稀疏视角图像恢复完整3D表示的难题。该方法结合 Flow-Matching 生成模型与 3D Gaussian Splatting 优化技术，通过双空间引导策略在无需训练的情况下重建遮挡区域的几何和纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两大局限：Flow-Matching等生成模型存在"合成偏差"，学习到的先验会覆盖真实观测证据；3DGS等优化方法虽然能高精度重建可见表面，但无法推理未观测区域的几何。在稀疏视角和严重遮挡场景下，现有方法难以同时实现几何完整性和观测一致性。
AI.method: 提出双空间引导策略，将稀疏视图3D重建重新表述为无需训练的引导逆问题。通过引导Flow-Matching模型的常微分方程(ODE)轨迹，使其在生成未见区域时同时保持与真实观测的几何和外观一致性。随后集成3DGS精炼阶段，消除生成结果的"合成感"，实现照片级真实感重建。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上进行全面基准测试，实验表明该方法在几何完整性和视图依赖外观保真度方面显著优于最先进的生成模型和优化框架。特别是在严重遮挡条件下，能同时保证观测一致性。
AI.conclusion: FlowObject成功实现了生成模型先验与观测证据的平衡，在稀疏视图3D重建任务中同时达到几何完整性、观测一致性和视觉真实感，为从少量 casual图像重建完整3D物体提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: While both papers are in Computer Graphics domain, this paper addresses 3D reconstruction from sparse views (static geometry), not video-generated motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on temporal motion generation from video with diffusion models, skeleton-based representations, and temporal consistency - while FlowObject deals with Flow-Matching for 3DGS reconstruction of static scenes. The application domain is fundamentally different: motion/animation generation vs. 3D geometry reconstruction. Only shares high-level similarity of using flow-matching (similar to diffusion) as a method.

title: Low-Rank Tensor Completion Based on Fractional Regularization with Ky Fan p-k Norm
summary: This paper addresses low-rank tensor completion (LRTC) by proposing a novel nonconvex surrogate, namely the ratio of the tensor nuclear norm to the tensor Ky Fan p-k norm (TNPK), to accurately approximate the tensor tubal rank. The TNPK possesses appealing properties, including scale invariance, parameter flexibility, and the existence of closed-form solutions under specific choices of p and k. With specific parameter settings of p and k, it reduces to the ratio of the tensor nuclear norm to the tensor Ky Fan k norm (TNK) or the ratio of the tensor nuclear norm to the tensor Frobenius norm (TNF). We construct a LRTC model and, under the tensor null space property (NSP), prove that low-rank tensors are local minimizers of the proposed model. Moreover, we derive the proximal operator of the Ky Fan p-k inverse-norm and further develop an efficient alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) algorithm with guaranteed subsequential convergence under mild conditions. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate the superior performance of our method against state-of-the-art competitors.

AI.tldr: 提出张量核范数与Ky Fan p-k范数比值(TNPK)作为新的非凸代理函数来解决低秩张量补全问题，并设计了高效的ADMM算法
AI.motivation: 低秩张量补全（LRTC）广泛应用但传统凸代理函数存在局限性，需要更准确的张量秩近似方法来提升恢复效果
AI.method: 提出TNPK非凸代理函数，具有尺度不变性、参数灵活性；在特定参数下可简化为TNK或TNF；构建LRTC模型并利用张量零空间性质证明低秩张量是局部最小解；推导近端算子并开发ADMM算法
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了方法相比现有先进方法的优越性能，证明了ADMM算法在温和条件下的次优收敛性
AI.conclusion: TNPK能够更准确地近似张量管秩，为低秩张量补全提供了有效的非凸正则化框架，具有重要的理论价值和实际应用前景

relevance_reason: This paper is about low-rank tensor completion (LRTC) using mathematical optimization methods (ADMM, Ky Fan p-k norm), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's Computer Graphics focus on diffusion-based video generation, 3D motion synthesis, and visual guidance features. The application domain is general mathematical optimization, not computer graphics or motion generation. While tensor completion could theoretically be used for video frame interpolation, this paper does not address any of the stated pain points: video-generated motion priors, visual feature extraction, quality supervision, semantic 2D-to-3D mapping, or temporal consistency in 3D animations. The methods are also completely different - traditional optimization vs. deep learning/diffusion models.

title: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models on Fine-Grained Image Tasks: From Evaluation to Diagnosis
summary: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities. While numerous benchmarks have evaluated LVLMs from holistic or task-specific perspectives, their capabilities on fine-grained image tasks-fundamental to computer vision-remain insufficiently understood. To address this gap, we introduce FG-BMK, a comprehensive fine-grained evaluation benchmark containing 1.01 million questions and 0.28 million images, covering diverse scenarios from common object-centric domains to specialized domains. FG-BMK jointly evaluates dialogue-level fine-grained semantic recognition and feature-level visual discriminability through human-oriented and machine-oriented paradigms, enabling diagnostic analysis of whether LVLM failures arise from insufficient visual representations, weak visual-to-semantic grounding, or limited fine-grained knowledge. Through extensive experiments on a diverse set of representative LVLMs/VLMs, we find that current LVLMs remain inadequate fine-grained recognizers, with failures arising from intertwined bottlenecks in visual representations, semantic grounding, modality alignment, and category-level knowledge. We further analyze training design factors for improving fine-grained capabilities and examine how visual and linguistic perturbations affect LVLM predictions. These findings provide diagnostic insights into the limitations of current LVLMs and offer guidance for future data construction and model design in developing more reliable LVLMs for fine-grained visual tasks. Our code is open-source and available at https://fg-bmk.github.io/.

AI.tldr: FG-BMK是一个用于评估大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)细粒度图像任务能力的新基准,包含101万道问题和28万张图片,覆盖从常见目标域到专业域的多种场景。该基准通过人机两种范式联合评估细粒度语义识别和视觉可辨别性,揭示了当前LVLMs在细粒度识别方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基准对LVLMs的细粒度图像任务能力评估不足,而细粒度任务是计算机视觉的基础。文章指出需要理解LVLMs在细粒度图像任务(如精细目标识别、特征区分等)上的表现,这些任务对于人类视觉感知和计算机视觉应用都至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了FG-BMK基准,包含101万道问题和28万张图片,涵盖通用目标域到专业域的多样化场景。该基准采用两种评估范式:(1)人机对话层面的细粒度语义识别;(2)特征层面的视觉可辨别性。通过诊断分析判断LVLM失败源于视觉表征不足、视觉-语义对齐薄弱还是细粒度知识缺乏。
AI.result: 实验表明当前LVLMs作为细粒度识别器仍不达标,失败源于多重交织的瓶颈:视觉表征、语义对齐、模态对齐和类别级知识。进一步分析了训练设计因素对细粒度能力的影响,以及视觉和语言扰动对预测的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为当前LVLMs的局限性提供了诊断性见解,为未来数据构建和模型设计提供了指导,有助于开发更可靠的细粒度视觉任务LVLMs。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) for fine-grained image recognition tasks (object classification, visual discrimination), which is in the general Computer Vision domain. While it mentions VLMs similar to the research profile, the APPLICATION DOMAIN is completely different - this paper is about image-level visual understanding, not 3D motion generation or computer graphics. The research profile needs VLMs for quality assessment in video-to-motion generation, while this paper uses VLMs for fine-grained image classification tasks. This is a case of using similar methods (VLMs) but in entirely different application domains.

title: DREAM: Extending Vision-Language Models with Dual-Objective Encoding for Cross-Modal Retrieval
summary: In today's media-driven world, the exponential growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and entertainment has made retrieving semantically relevant videos via natural language queries increasingly critical. Early video retrieval systems relied on handcrafted features or shallow cross-modal mappings, limiting their ability to capture complex semantics and temporal dynamics. While large-scale vision-language models have improved cross-modal alignment, challenges remain in modeling fine-grained temporal dependencies and nuanced linguistic structures. In this paper, we introduce DREAM: Dual-path Representation Enhancement and Alignment Model, a novel multimodal framework that addresses these limitations through enhanced visual and textual encoding. DREAM incorporates a hybrid language modeling strategy that combines masked and permuted language modeling objectives to capture both local and global linguistic semantics. On the visual side, we design a hierarchical vision encoder with cascaded group attention, which integrates spatial and temporal information through multi-stage token interaction and coarse-to-fine attention refinement. We validate DREAM through comprehensive evaluations on the widely-used MSRVTT, MSVD and LSMDC benchmark datasets, where it achieves new state-of-the-art R1 scores of 49.4%, 49.7% and 27.3%, respectively. Qualitative analyses further show the model's ability to maintain coherent attention across frames and align complex queries with dynamic video content. These findings underscore the effectiveness of hierarchical attention and dual-objective textual modeling in enabling robust, context-aware video retrieval, and pave the way for future research in advancing cross-modal representation learning.

AI.tldr: DREAM是一种新型多模态框架，通过双路径表示增强和对齐机制实现基于自然语言查询的视频检索。模型结合层次化视觉编码器和混合语言建模策略，在MSRVTT、MSVD和LSMDC三个基准数据集上分别达到49.4%、49.7%和27.3%的R1分数，创下新纪录。
AI.motivation: 随着视频内容在监控、教育和娱乐等领域的指数级增长，通过自然语言查询检索语义相关视频的需求日益迫切。早期视频检索系统依赖手工特征或浅层跨模态映射，难以捕捉复杂语义和时间动态；现有大规模视觉语言模型虽然在跨模态对齐方面有所改进，但在建模细粒度时间依赖和复杂语言结构方面仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出DREAM框架，包含两部分核心设计：1) 混合语言建模策略，结合掩码语言建模(MLM)和排列语言建模(PLM)目标，以捕捉局部和全局语言语义；2) 层次化视觉编码器，采用级联组注意力机制，通过多阶段令牌交互和粗到细的注意力细化来整合空间和时间信息。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT、MSVD和LSMDC三个广泛使用的视频检索基准数据集上进行综合评估，分别取得49.4%、49.7%和27.3%的R1分数，达到当前最先进水平。定性分析表明模型能够保持跨帧的一致性注意力，并将复杂查询与动态视频内容对齐。
AI.conclusion: 层次化注意力和双目标文本建模能够实现强健的上下文感知视频检索，为跨模态表示学习的未来研究奠定基础。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video-text retrieval (multimedia task), not Computer Graphics/3D motion generation. While it uses Vision-Language Models and hierarchical visual encoding, these methods serve a completely different application domain than the research profile's focus on diffusion-based video generation for 3D motion synthesis, skeleton-based motion representation, and visual guidance feature extraction for creating animated 3D content. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points related to motion priors, quality supervision for generated 3D animations, or semantic gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation.

title: Taming I2V models for Image HOI Editing: A Cognitive Benchmark and Agentic Self-Correcting Framework
summary: Current image editing methods excel at static attributes but fail at complex Human-Object Interactions (HOI), a critical challenge unaddressed by existing benchmarks that conflate HOI with static attributes, relying on global metrics incapable of simultaneously assessing dynamic interaction validity and entangled human-object pair preservation. Thus, we first introduce HOI-Edit, a comprehensive benchmark with three progressive cognitive levels, which features an automated metric HOI-Eval that reliably evaluates instance-level interaction by letting VLM Q&A after thinking with images containing grounded Human-Object pairs. Considering the task's essence of remodeling dynamic relationships, we benchmark Image-to-Video (I2V) models, finding them inherently suited for dynamic editing due to their temporal generation capabilities. Crucially, beyond superior performance, this capability provides a "replay of the failure process," offering unique diagnosability into why errors occur. We thus propose SCPE (Self-Correcting Process Editing), a novel, agentic self-correcting framework that constrains the generation of I2V models through iteratively refined prompts, enabling the generated videos to more accurately present the target HOI. Extracted frames from these videos are the final editing results. On HOI-Edit, SCPE achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art (SOTA) editing models like Nano Banana on interaction. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/HOI-Edit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HOI-Edit基准和SCPE框架，解决现有图像编辑方法无法处理复杂人物-物体交互(HOI)的问题，通过图像到视频模型的迭代提示约束实现自纠正编辑。
AI.motivation: 当前图像编辑方法擅长静态属性但无法处理复杂的人物-物体交互任务，现有基准将HOI与静态属性混为一谈，使用全局指标无法同时评估动态交互有效性和人物-物体对保真度。
AI.method: 提出HOI-Edit基准包含三个递进认知层级，引入HOI-Eval自动度量通过VLM问答评估实例级交互；采用图像到视频(I2V)模型进行动态编辑；提出SCPE自纠正框架通过迭代细化提示约束I2V模型生成。
AI.result: SCPE在HOI-Edit上达到与Nano Banana等SOTA编辑模型相当的交互性能，I2V模型的时序生成能力提供了"失败过程回放"的可诊断性。
AI.conclusion: I2V模型因其时序生成能力天然适合动态编辑任务，SCPE通过迭代提示约束实现更准确的目标HOI呈现，为复杂人物-物体交互编辑提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: While both use diffusion-based methods, this paper focuses on 2D Image-to-Video (I2V) editing for Human-Object Interaction, not 3D motion generation/synthesis. The research profile specifically needs skeleton-based 3D motion generation, temporal animation synthesis, and semantic mapping from 2D video to 3D motion representation. The paper addresses 2D image editing rather than the core computer graphics problems of extracting visual guidance features for 3D animation or maintaining temporal consistency in synthesized 3D animations. This is a different application domain entirely - using similar diffusion methods but for image editing rather than computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: PorTEXTO: A European Portuguese Benchmark for Visual Text Extraction
summary: European Portuguese (pt-PT) is largely absent from OCR benchmarks, which skew toward high-resource languages. The few benchmarks that cover pt-PT focus on historical artifacts and literature. This work addresses modern OCR applications, introducing PorTEXTO, the first benchmark for contemporary and culturally relevant pt-PT visual text extraction. To ascertain quality, we employ an annotation pipeline combining transcriptions from a frontier LVLM with exhaustive review by native speakers. We observe a sharp performance drop from synthetic to real world samples in most models, and find that, currently, specialized multilingual data is a better driver for pt-PT performance than model size or resolution budget, motivating the release of open pt-PT OCR resources.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了PorTEXTO，这是首个针对现代欧洲葡萄牙语(pt-PT)的视觉文本提取基准数据集，旨在填补pt-PT在OCR基准测试中的空白。
AI.motivation: 欧洲葡萄牙语在现有OCR基准测试中基本缺失，现有基准测试主要覆盖高资源语言或历史文献，缺乏针对现代应用场景的pt-PT OCR评估资源。
AI.method: 构建了PorTEXTO基准数据集，采用前沿LVLM生成转录结合母语者详细审核的标注流程，测试了多种模型在合成与真实样本上的性能表现。
AI.result: 大多数模型存在从合成样本到真实样本的显著性能下降，研究发现专门的 multilingual 数据比模型规模或分辨率更能驱动pt-PT性能的提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了开放pt-PT OCR资源的必要性，为未来pt-PT OCR系统发展提供了重要参考。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for European Portuguese text extraction, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation, video generation for motion priors, skeleton-based animation synthesis, and temporal motion modeling. The paper addresses OCR benchmarks, not motion generation, video generation, or 3D animation synthesis. Despite using LVLM (different from VLM for quality assessment), the application (text extraction) is entirely unrelated to the pain points of semantic gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation, temporal consistency in synthesized animations, or visual guidance feature extraction for motion generation.

title: DVANet: Degradation-aware Visual-prior Alignment Network for Image Restoration
comment: All-in-One Image Restoration; Deep Unfolding; Degradation Representation; Visual Prior
summary: All-in-One image restoration aims to develop a unified restoration framework for handling diverse degradation types. Existing end-to-end methods usually regard the restoration process as a black-box mapping, lacking an explicit optimization interpretation. Although deep unfolding provides an interpretable iterative modeling paradigm for image restoration, existing methods mostly rely on fixed degradation assumptions or predefined degradation information, making them difficult to adapt to unified restoration requirements under complex degradations and locally damaged content. This limitation restricts their performance in degradation suppression and structural detail recovery. To address these issues, this paper proposes DVANet, a deep unfolding network inspired by the half-quadratic splitting optimization algorithm, which formulates unified image restoration under complex degradations as a collaborative unfolding process between degradation-aware observation consistency and visual-prior-guided reconstruction. Specifically, in the degradation-aware observation consistency branch, a degradation representation module is employed to extract global degradation attributes and local degradation cues, and degradation-conditioned mapping is used to enhance the model's adaptability to different degradation types. In the visual-prior-guided reconstruction branch, DINOv3 is introduced to provide structural and semantic information as hierarchical visual priors, thereby complementing the missing structural information in damaged regions and improving detail recovery. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DVANet achieves superior or competitive performance on multi-scenario degradation and cross-domain image restoration tasks, showing favorable degradation adaptability and generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DVANet，一个基于深度展开的统一图像恢复框架，通过结合退化感知观测一致性和视觉先验引导重建来处理复杂退化类型。方法创新性地引入DINOv3作为层次化视觉先验，在统一的半二次分裂优化框架下实现对多种退化场景的适应性处理。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端方法将恢复过程视为黑盒映射，缺乏显式优化解释；而深度展开方法虽提供可解释的迭代建模范式，但多依赖固定退化假设，难以适应复杂退化下的统一恢复需求，尤其是在局部损坏内容的处理上存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出DVANet深度展开网络，基于半二次分裂优化算法，将统一图像恢复表述为退化感知观测一致性与视觉先验引导重建的协作展开过程。退化感知分支包含退化表示模块提取全局退化属性和局部退化线索，通过退化条件映射增强模型对不同退化类型的适应性；视觉先验分支引入DINOv3提供结构和语义信息作为层次化视觉先验，补充损坏区域的缺失结构信息。
AI.result: 在多场景退化和跨域图像恢复任务上进行了广泛实验，DVANet实现了优越或具有竞争力的性能，展现出良好的退化适应性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度展开框架与视觉先验的创新结合，DVANet有效解决了复杂退化环境下统一图像恢复的可解释性和适应性问题，为多类型退化图像恢复提供了新的研究思路。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile is about VIDEO-GENERATED MOTION PRIORS and 3D MOTION GENERATION in Computer Graphics (using diffusion models for human animation), while the paper is about 2D IMAGE RESTORATION. Although both use visual priors conceptually, the paper uses DINOv3 for restoring static 2D images, which is fundamentally different from extracting visual guidance features for motion generation. The methods, goals, and representations are completely unrelated - this paper addresses static image inpainting, not temporal motion synthesis or 3D animation.

title: AMALIA-VL: A Native European Portuguese Open-Source Vision and Language Model
summary: Large Vision and Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced rapidly, yet European Portuguese (pt-PT) remains systematically underserved by existing open-source multimodal models, which either conflate it with Brazilian Portuguese or severely under-represent it in their training data mixes. We introduce AMALIA-VL, the first open-source instruction-tuned LVLM built natively for pt-PT, pairing a high-resolution vision encoder with dynamic image tiling and a fully open pt-PT-optimized language model via a learned connector. We contribute with a purposefully designed three-stage training process - vision-language alignment, general visual instruction tuning, and preference optimization - together with a pt-PT-centric multimodal data mix combining curated and translated public datasets with novel datasets that address the near-total absence of European Portuguese multimodal resources. Our evaluation shows that AMALIA-VL establishes a strong baseline for open-source pt-PT LVLMs.We will release model weights, training data, and construction pipelines along with machine-translated pt-PT evaluation benchmarks to help democratize pt-PT LVLM development.

AI.tldr: AMALIA-VL是首个针对欧洲葡萄牙语(pt-PT)的开源指令微调大型视觉语言模型(LVLM)，通过高分辨率视觉编码器、动态图像切片和完全开放的pt-PT优化语言模型构建，采用三阶段训练流程和pt-PT中心的多模态数据混合，为欧洲葡萄牙语LVLM开发奠定坚实基础。
AI.motivation: 欧洲葡萄牙语(pt-PT)在现有开源多模态模型中持续被忽视，这些模型要么将其与巴西葡萄牙语混淆，要么在训练数据中严重低估欧洲葡萄牙语，导致缺乏针对欧洲葡萄牙语的开源多模态资源。
AI.method: 构建了高分辨率视觉编码器+动态图像切片+完全开放的pt-PT优化语言模型的三组件架构；采用三阶段训练流程——视觉-语言对齐、通用视觉指令微调和偏好优化；设计了以欧洲葡萄牙语为中心的多模态数据混合，结合 curation数据集、翻译公共数据集和针对欧洲葡萄牙语的新数据集。
AI.result: AMALIA-VL建立了欧洲葡萄牙语开源LVLM的强基线，模型权重、训练数据、构建流程和机器翻译的欧洲葡萄牙语评估基准将全部开源发布。
AI.conclusion: AMALIA-VL是首个为欧洲葡萄牙语原生构建的开源指令微调LVLM，其三阶段训练流程和pt-PT中心的数据混合为欧洲葡萄牙语多模态模型开发提供了可复现的基线和资源 democratization。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Vision and Language Models for European Portuguese language processing (NLP/multilingual AI), which has NO connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any of the specified methods (diffusion-based video generation, skeleton-based motion representation, temporal motion modeling). The application domains are entirely different - this is NLP/linguistics research, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Urdu Katib Handwritten Dataset: A Historical Document Dataset for Offline Urdu Handwritten Text Recognition with CRNN-Based Baseline Evaluation
summary: Automatic Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) is inherently a challenging task, and its complexity is further increased when dealing with cursive scripts. Although significant efforts have been made on various cursive scripts, research regarding Urdu Handwritten Text Recognition (UHTR) has been relatively limited. This lag of research is primarily due to the unique challenges posed by its script, and the scarcity and unavailability of benchmark datasets. Therefore, to advance research in UHTR, this study presents a specialized real dataset called the Urdu Katib Handwritten Dataset (UKHD). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first offline Urdu handwritten text lines dataset specifically curated from the materials written by Katibs in historical times. It encompasses a diverse range of flat nib writing variations in the Nastalique calligraphic style. Additionally, the effectiveness of different CRNN-based hybrid models has been evaluated to identify the optimal architecture for Urdu Katib Handwriting Recognition (UKHR). Among the analyzed models, the CNN-BGRU-CTC model showed more robust performance, with low Character Error Rate (CER) and Word Error Rate (WER). This research work aims to support and encourage the research community in developing a robust recognition system for preserving Urdu handwritten literature.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了首个乌尔都语离线手写文本行数据集UKHD，专门从历史Katibs手写材料中收集，采用Nastalique书法风格。同时评估了多种CRNN混合模型，其中CNN-BGRU-CTC模型在乌尔都语手写识别中表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 乌尔都语手写识别研究相对滞后，主要由于其脚本的特殊挑战和基准数据集的匮乏。该研究旨在促进UKHR系统开发，保护乌尔都语手写文献。
AI.method: 收集并标注了UKHD数据集；评估了基于CRNN的混合模型（CNN-BGRU-CTC等），使用CTC解码进行训练。
AI.result: CNN-BGRU-CTC模型表现更稳健，字符错误率(CER)和词错误率(WER)均较低。
AI.conclusion: UKHD是首个专门针对Katibs手写材料的乌尔都语离线数据集，为构建鲁棒的乌尔都语手写识别系统提供了重要基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about offline handwritten text recognition for Urdu documents using CRNN models (CNN-BGRU-CTC). It belongs to the document analysis/OCR field, not Computer Graphics. The application domain is completely different from video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, temporal animation synthesis, or any visual generation tasks in the research profile. The methods (CRNN for text recognition) are unrelated to diffusion-based video generation, VLM for quality assessment, skeleton-based motion representation, or temporal motion modeling. This paper addresses handwritten character recognition, not computer graphics or 3D animation generation.

title: Hand-4DGS: Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting for 4D Hand Reconstruction from Egocentric Videos
summary: Dynamic 3D hand reconstruction from egocentric videos is essential for next-generation computing platforms such as AR/VR and AI glasses. Despite its importance, most prior works focus either on multi-view 3D hand reconstruction or on 4D human body reconstruction. Egocentric 4D hand reconstruction remains challenging due to fast head motion, rapid hand dynamics, severe occlusions, and inherent ambiguity from single-view observations. To address these challenges, we introduce Hand-4DGS, the first feed-forward framework for reconstructing dynamic 4D hands directly from egocentric videos, enabling both fast (~60 FPS) inference and strong generalization. Our approach incorporates a mesh-guided representation for structural priors and temporal convolutions to model dynamic motion. We evaluate our framework on two challenging egocentric datasets, H2O and ARCTIC, and demonstrate significant improvements over baselines. Our method benefits from the generalization capability of feed-forward networks and effective 2D image supervision through Gaussian splatting, without requiring expensive 3D hand pose ground-truth annotations.

AI.tldr: 提出首个前馈框架Hand-4DGS，实现从 egocentric（自我中心）视频直接重建动态4D手部模型，在约60FPS推理速度下实现强泛化能力，无需昂贵3D手部姿态标注。
AI.motivation: 动态3D手部重建对AR/VR和AI眼镜等下一代计算平台至关重要，但egocentric 4D手部重建面临头部快速运动、手部动态变化、严重遮挡和单视角观察固有歧义等挑战，此前缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于mesh引导的表示方法提供结构先验，结合时序卷积建模动态运动；采用Gaussian splatting实现有效的2D图像监督，避免使用昂贵的3D手部姿态真值标注。
AI.result: 在H2O和ARCTIC两个具有挑战性的egocentric数据集上验证，相较于基线方法取得显著提升，实现约60FPS的快速推理和强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Hand-4DGS是首个前馈框架，能够从egocentric视频直接重建动态4D手部，平衡了推理速度、泛化能力和标注成本，为下一代AR/VR设备提供关键技术支撑。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 4D HAND RECONSTRUCTION from egocentric videos, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on VIDEO-GENERATED MOTION PRIORS for 3D motion synthesis. The key application mismatch: the profile seeks to GENERATE new motion from video (like Wanxiang/Seedance diffusion models), while this paper RECONSTRUCTS/FITS existing hand geometry to observed video data. Although both involve temporal modeling and 3D representations, they serve opposite goals - one creates novel motion, the other recovers pre-existing geometry. The method also differs: uses Gaussian splatting + mesh-guided representation (not diffusion models), and focuses on AR/VR hand tracking rather than motion generation for animations.

title: When AUC Misleads: Polarization-Aware Evaluation of Deepfake Detectors under Domain Shift
summary: Recent advances in generative AI, such as diffusion models and face-swapping tools, have enabled the creation of highly realistic deepfakes, leading to real-world harms including financial fraud and non-consensual explicit content. In response, deepfake detection has become an active research area, with recent methods increasingly focusing on improving generalization to unseen manipulations. This is typically evaluated using the Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) measured separately across multiple datasets. However, such an evaluation fails to reflect real-world scenarios where detectors face a mixture of data sources and varying artifact types. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel metric, Cross-dataset AUC (Cross-AUC) that averages per-domain AUCs with a measure of prediction polarization for taking into account the robustness to domain shift. The polarization extent is quantified by the Wasserstein Distance between class score distributions. Cross-AUC not only assesses the generalization capabilities of deepfake detectors under domain shifts more realistically, but it is also interpretable as it better explains the reason behind a drop in performance. Experiments performed on seven benchmark datasets demonstrate its practical relevance.

AI.tldr: 针对深伪检测提出了一种新的评估指标Cross-AUC，用于更好地评估检测器在领域偏移下的泛化能力，同时考虑预测极化程度。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法仅使用单一数据集的AUC，无法反映真实世界中检测器面对多种数据源和不同伪影类型的情况，忽略了领域偏移带来的性能下降。
AI.method: 提出Cross-AUC指标，通过对每个领域的AUC取平均值，并结合使用Wasserstein距离量化类别分数分布的预测极化程度来评估模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上的实验表明，Cross-AUC能更真实地评估深伪检测器的泛化能力，并且具有更好的可解释性，能解释性能下降的原因。
AI.conclusion: Cross-AUC是一个更现实、更可解释的评估指标，能够更好地评估深伪检测器在领域偏移下的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about deepfake detection (security/authentication domain) with a focus on evaluation metrics for classifiers under domain shift. While it mentions diffusion-generated content in the context of deepfakes, the application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on video-generated motion priors, 3D motion synthesis, skeleton-based motion representation, and temporal motion modeling - whereas this paper addresses detecting fake images/videos for authentication purposes. There is no match in application domain, methods (except loosely "diffusion" which is used differently here), or research goals. This is a computer vision/security paper, not a computer graphics/motion generation paper.

title: Moebius: 0.2B Lightweight Image Inpainting Framework with 10B-Level Performance
summary: While 10B-level industrial foundation models have pushed the boundaries of image inpainting, their prohibitive computational costs severely hinder practical deployment. Constructing a highly optimized task-specific specialist offers a promising solution; however, extreme structural compression inevitably triggers a severe representation bottleneck. To conquer this, we propose Moebius, a highly efficient lightweight inpainting framework. We systematically reconstruct the diffusion backbone by introducing the Local-$λ$ Mix Interaction ($LλMI$) block. Comprising Local-$λ$ and Interactive-$λ$ modules, it elegantly summarizes spatial contexts and global semantic priors into fixed-size linear matrices, preserving complex latent interactions while drastically shedding parameters. Furthermore, to unlock the full representational capacity of this highly compact architecture, we synergistically pair it with an adaptive multi-granularity distillation strategy. Operating strictly within the latent space to avoid expensive pixel-space decoding, this strategy dynamically balances multiple gradient-based losses to achieve high-fidelity alignment. Extensive experiments across natural and portrait benchmarks demonstrate that this optimal synergy enables Moebius to rival or even surpass the generation quality of the 10B-level industrial generalist FLUX.1-Fill-Dev. Remarkably, Moebius achieves this using less than 2\% of the parameters (0.22B vs. 11.9B) while delivering a $>15\times$ acceleration in total inference time, setting a new efficiency standard for high-fidelity inpainting. Project page at https://hustvl.github.io/Moebius.

AI.tldr: Moebius是一个高效轻量的图像修复框架，通过局部-λ混合交互块和自适应多粒度蒸馏策略，在仅使用0.22B参数（不足2%）的情况下，实现了与10B级工业模型FLUX.1-Fill-Dev相当甚至更优的修复质量，同时推理速度提升超过15倍。
AI.motivation: 10B级别的工业基础模型虽然推动了图像修复的发展，但其高昂的计算成本严重阻碍了实际部署；而极度的结构压缩又会导致严重的表示瓶颈。因此需要一种高效且保持高质量的轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 提出Local-λ Mix Interaction (LλMI)块，包含Local-λ和Interactive-λ模块，将空间上下文和全局语义先验总结为固定大小的线性矩阵，在大幅减少参数的同时保留复杂潜在交互；2. 采用自适应多粒度蒸馏策略，仅在潜在空间内操作以避免昂贵的像素空间解码，动态平衡多个基于梯度的损失以实现高保真对齐。
AI.result: 在自然图像和人像基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Moebius能够与10B级工业通用模型FLUX.1-Fill-Dev相媲美甚至超越其生成质量；使用0.22B参数（不足11.9B的2%），推理速度提升超过15倍。
AI.conclusion: Moebius开创了高效高保真图像修复的新标准，验证了通过精心设计的轻量级架构配合先进的蒸馏策略，可以在极低参数和计算成本下实现与大型模型相当的性能，为实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about IMAGE INPAINTING (filling missing regions in static 2D images), which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on VIDEO-GENERATED MOTION PRIORS, 3D MOTION GENERATION, and temporal animation synthesis. Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - image inpainting vs. video-to-motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to extracting visual guidance from video for 3D motion synthesis, maintaining temporal consistency in animations, or bridging the semantic gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation.

title: ROSA-TFormer: A Radar-Optical Sensor-Aware Temporal Transformer for Pinus sylvestris Plantation Classification in Northern Shaanxi Using GEE-Derived Sentinel-1/2 Time Series
summary: Accurate identification of Pinus sylvestris var. mongolica plantations is important for monitoring afforestation quality and ecological restoration in northern Shaanxi. This paper proposes ROSA-TFormer, a radar-optical sensor-aware temporal Transformer for P. sylvestris classification using Sentinel-1/2 time-series data generated on Google Earth Engine. The model integrates separate SAR and optical embedding branches, a sensor-aware gate, and temporal attention pooling to capture multi-source seasonal features. Experiments on monthly and half-month point-level datasets show that ROSA-TFormer achieves strong classification performance, with 99.67% overall accuracy, 99.56% macro F1, and 98.91% P. sylvestris F1 on the HalfMonth-dataBig dataset. Spatial block validation and ablation results further indicate the effectiveness of radar-optical temporal fusion and sensor-aware modeling. The results demonstrate the potential of ROSA-TFormer for point-level P. sylvestris plantation classification, while broader wall-to-wall validation remains necessary.

AI.tldr: ROSA-TFormer是一种雷达-光学传感器感知的时间Transformer模型，用于利用Sentinel-1/2时间序列数据在Google Earth Engine上对樟子松进行精确分类。
AI.motivation: 准确识别樟子松人工林对监测陕北地区造林质量和生态恢复具有重要意义。
AI.method: 该模型整合了独立的SAR和光学嵌入分支、传感器感知门控和时序注意力池化，以捕获多源季节性特征。实验在月度和半月点级数据集上进行。
AI.result: ROSA-TFormer在HalfMonth-dataBig数据集上达到99.67%的总体准确率、99.56%的宏F1分数和98.91%的樟子松F1分数。空间块验证和消融实验结果表明雷达-光学时序融合和传感器感知建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ROSA-TFormer在点级樟子松人工林分类中展现出良好的性能，但仍需进行更广泛的wall-to-wall验证。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about remote sensing and vegetation classification (using Sentinel-1/2 radar/optical satellite data for Pinus sylvestris plantation classification in forestry), which is entirely different from Computer Graphics. The application domain is forestry/environmental monitoring, not 3D motion generation, video-generated motion priors, or computer graphics animation. While it uses temporal modeling and transformers, these are used for satellite time-series analysis, not for video generation or 3D character animation synthesis.

title: GUMP-Net: An interpretable model-data-driven intelligent algorithm for multi-class pelvic segmentation
summary: Pelvic segmentation is one of the most important and fundamental research problems in precise and intelligent diagnosis and treatment, as well as surgical planning and navigation for pelvic fractures. By combining an improved geodesic active contour model with deep neural networks, we propose GUMP-Net, an interpretable model-data-driven intelligent algorithm for multi-class pelvic segmentation, in which three network modules are designed to constitute the overall segmentation framework together: the object detection module for automatic level set initialization, the edge detector module for learning an anatomy-aware edge detector function and the iteration module for deep level set evolution. Leveraging the advantages of level set representation and deep learning, GUMP-Net shows more accurate, robust and consistent segmentation performance, especially in small training data situation, compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments on pelvic datasets demonstrate the rationality and effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. Further experiments extended to ankle dataset indicate broader applications to other anatomies. The proposed algorithm not only provides an efficient segmentation method for complex fracture reduction, but also gives an interpretable geometric perspective for understanding deep learning segmentation.

AI.tldr: GUMP-Net是一种结合改进的测地活动轮廓模型与深度神经网络的可解释骨盆分割方法，通过目标检测、边缘检测和迭代三个网络模块实现多类别骨盆分割，在小样本训练数据下表现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 骨盆分割是精准诊断治疗及骨折手术规划导航的基础研究问题。现有方法在训练数据有限时分割精度不足，且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 提出GUMP-Net框架，包含三个模块：1)目标检测模块用于自动水平集初始化；2)边缘检测模块学习解剖感知的边缘检测函数；3)迭代模块实现深度水平集演化。融合测地活动轮廓模型与深度学习的优势。
AI.result: 在骨盆数据集上实验表明，该方法相比现有最优方法具有更高准确性、鲁棒性和一致性，尤其在小样本训练数据场景下表现优异。扩展到踝关节数据集验证了方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GUMP-Net为复杂骨折复位提供了高效分割方法，同时为深度学习分割提供了可解释的几何视角，具有广泛的临床应用前景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image segmentation (pelvic bone segmentation) for diagnosis and surgical planning. The application domain is completely different - it's medical imaging, not computer graphics/video generation/motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on diffusion-based video generation for 3D motion animation synthesis with temporal consistency, while this paper addresses medical segmentation using geodesic active contours and deep networks. These are entirely different fields with no meaningful overlap in application domain or research goals.

title: Transformer Geometry Observatory TGO-I: Spectral Geometry Observatory
summary: Despite the widespread adoption of Vision Transformers (ViTs) and their success across numerous computer vision applications, the fundamental understanding of their dimensional and representational geometry remains relatively underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce Transformer Geometry Observatory (TGO), a systematic framework of experiments and analysis pipelines designed to investigate the representational geometry and dynamics of Vision Transformers. TGO-I, the first installment of the framework, focuses on the spectral geometry of ViT representations. Using a ViT-Small/16 model trained on ImageNet-100, we analyze Effective Rank, Stable Rank, Participation Ratio, Spectral Entropy, Spectral Flatness, Spectral Anisotropy, covariance structure, eigenspectra, and singular value spectra throughout training. Our results reveal a consistent increase in dimensional utilization, accompanied by decreasing anisotropy, increasing spectral entropy, increasing participation ratio, and progressively flatter eigenspectra. Contrary to the common intuition that training should concentrate information into a small number of dominant directions, we observe a progressive redistribution of variance across representational dimensions. This phenomenon is particularly pronounced in the final CLS token representation, which exhibits the highest effective dimensionality and lowest anisotropy within the network.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TGO框架，系统研究Vision Transformers的表示几何特性，发现训练过程中维度利用率增加、各项异性减少、谱熵增加，CLS token具有最高有效维度。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在计算机视觉领域广泛应用，但对其维度表示几何的基础理解仍相对缺乏，需要系统性的实验和分析框架来揭示ViT表示的内在特性。
AI.method: 使用TGO-I框架，对ViT-Small/16模型（在ImageNet-100上训练）进行系统分析，测量有效秩、稳定秩、参与比、谱熵、谱平坦度、谱各项异性、协方差结构、特征谱和奇异值谱等指标。
AI.result: 训练过程中维度利用率持续增加，各项异性降低，谱熵增加，参与比增加，特征谱逐渐变平。信息并非集中到少数主导方向，而是逐步在表示维度间重新分布，CLS token具有最高有效维度和最低各项异性。
AI.conclusion: 与常规认知相反，ViT训练并非将信息压缩到少数主成分，而是实现方差的跨维度重分配，这一现象在最终CLS token中最显著。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant. It studies the representation geometry of Vision Transformers (ViTs) - a foundational machine learning/computer vision theory topic. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically video-generated motion priors, 3D motion generation, diffusion-based video generation, and temporal animation synthesis. There is no application domain match whatsoever - the paper doesn't address video generation, motion generation, or computer graphics. It uses spectral geometry analysis methods (effective rank, spectral entropy, anisotropy) which are entirely different from the required methods (diffusion models, VLMs, skeleton-based motion representation). This is a theoretical ML analysis paper unrelated to any of the stated pain points or methods.

title: CABLE: Cloud-Assisted Bandwidth-efficient LMM-based Encoding for V2X Systems
summary: Cloud-hosted large multimodal models (LMMs) can provide strong open-vocabulary perception for Vehicle-to-Everything systems, but naively transmitting full-resolution frames from edge to cloud causes severe communication overhead and high cloud-side prefill latency. We present CABLE, a cloud-assisted bandwidth-efficient LMM-based encoding framework for edge-cloud perception. CABLE propagates the previous cloud segmentation mask on the edge using ego-motion compensation, refines it with residual-motion cues, and consolidates disconnected regions via a corridor envelope to form a robust region of interest (ROI). Only ROI-masked images are uploaded, while the cloud segmentation output is fed back as the prior for the next frame, forming a mask-to-ROI-to-LMM feedback loop. Experiments on five datasets (nuScenes, WOD-ZB, Waymo, KITTI, and CADC) show consistent communication savings while largely preserving perception, achieving $73$--$87\%$ ROI pixel-coverage reduction with $5$--$8\times$ estimated LMM prefill speedup at a modest detection-quality trade-off relative to full-frame inference.

AI.tldr: CABLE是一个用于车联网(V2X)系统中边缘-云端感知的带宽高效LMM编码框架，通过ROI掩码传输和反馈机制显著降低通信开销和预填充延迟。
AI.motivation: 云托管的大语言多模态模型(LMM)虽能为V2X系统提供强大的开放词汇感知能力，但直接将全分辨率帧从边缘传输到云端会导致严重的通信开销和云端预填充延迟过高的问题。
AI.method: CABLE框架包含三个核心机制：1)利用自我运动补偿在边缘传播前一云的分割掩码；2)使用残差运动线索进行细化；3)通过走廊包络线整合断开区域形成鲁棒的兴趣区域(ROI)。仅上传ROI掩码图像，云分割输出作为下一帧的先验，形成mask-ROI-LMM反馈循环。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、WOD-ZB、Waymo、KITTI和CADC五个数据集上的实验表明，实现了73%-87%的ROI像素覆盖 reduction，5-8倍的LMM预填充加速，同时保持感知性能仅有轻微检测质量下降。
AI.conclusion: CABLE在显著降低通信开销的同时有效保持了感知性能，为边缘-云端协同感知提供了一种实用的带宽高效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) systems for autonomous driving perception, focusing on edge-cloud computing and bandwidth-efficient LMM encoding. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While the research profile focuses on diffusion-based video generation for 3D human motion synthesis with temporal consistency, this paper addresses autonomous vehicle perception and detection. There is no relevance to diffusion models for video generation, skeleton-based motion representation, or 3D animation synthesis in computer graphics.

title: A Unified Framework for Efficient Remote Sensing Visual Question Answering: Adapting Dual, Hybrid, and Encoder-Decoder Architectures
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, accepted and to be presented at 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026), scheduled for 9 to 14 August 2026 in Washington D.C
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) in the Remote Sensing (RS) domain presents unique challenges due to the high resolution, multi scale object distribution, and semantic complexity of aerial imagery. While general domain Foundation Models have achieved remarkable success, their direct application to RSVQA is hindered by massive domain shifts and the computationally prohibitive nature of full fine tuning. This study presents a comparative analysis of RS Adapter, a Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning (PEFT) strategy, applied across three distinct Vision Language Model (VLM) architectures: the Dual Encoder CLIP, the Encoder Decoder BLIP, and the Hybrid FLAVA. We introduce a unified architectural surgery pipeline that injects lightweight bottleneck adapters into the attention and MLP layers of frozen backbones, enabling rapid adaptation with less than 5 percent of trainable parameters. Experimental results on the high resolution RSVQA x dataset demonstrate that while all adapted models achieve convergence, the Hybrid FLAVA architecture offers a superior balance of multimodal reasoning and retrieval capabilities compared to its unimodal counterparts. Our findings establish a new baseline for resource efficient VQA in disaster assessment and urban monitoring.

AI.tldr: 研究提出RS Adapter参数高效微调策略，将轻量级瓶颈适配器注入三种视觉语言模型(CLIP、BLIP、FLAVA)的冻结骨干网络中，在RSVQAx数据集上实现仅用不到5%的可训练参数即达到收敛，其中Hybrid FLAVA架构表现最优。
AI.motivation: 遥感VQA面临高分辨率航拍图像的领域偏移问题和全参数微调的计算成本过高问题，需要一种参数高效且能快速适配的方法。
AI.method: 统一架构手术管道：将轻量级瓶颈适配器注入到冻结骨干的注意力和MLP层中，在RSVQAx高分辨率数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 所有适配模型均能实现收敛，Hybrid FLAVA在多模态推理和检索能力上表现优于单模态 counterparts，为资源高效VQA建立新基线。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效微调策略在遥感VQA任务中有效，Hybrid FLAVA架构更适合灾难评估和城市监测等应用场景。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Remote Sensing Visual Question Answering (RSVQA), which is in the domain of geospatial AI/satellite image analysis - completely different from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While both use Visual Language Models (VLMs), the application domains are entirely different: the paper focuses on answering questions about aerial/satellite imagery for remote sensing, not on video-generated motion priors, 3D animation synthesis, or skeleton-based motion generation. The pain points and methods (diffusion-based video generation, temporal motion modeling) in the research profile have no connection to this remote sensing VQA paper.

title: Confidence is Not Reliability: Rethinking MC Dropout in Brain Tumour Segmentation
summary: Glioma segmentation in multiparametric MRI is a critical component of treatment planning. A segmentation model that fails silently on treatment-critical sub-regions represents a patient safety risk that overlap-based metrics such as Dice scores cannot expose. We ask whether voxel-level uncertainty estimation via Monte Carlo (MC) Dropout can reliably identify segmentation errors in clinically critical sub-regions, and whether calibration failure modes are detectable from standard reporting metrics alone. In an empirical two-model case study on 126 BraTS21 patients, we evaluate a high-performance pretrained SegResNet and a locally trained UNet with residual units (UNet-Res). MC dropout preserved segmentation accuracy ($|Δ\text{Dice}|$ $<0.01$) while achieving strong uncertainty-error alignment (AUROC for entropy (H) $\approx$0.97), indicating uncertainty correctly ranks erroneous voxels above correct ones. Entropy-based patient stratification identified a high-uncertainty subgroup with substantially lower segmentation performance (median whole-tumour Dice $0.835$ vs. $0.925$), supporting uncertainty as a practical triage signal. However, global alignment can mask important region-specific differences. Despite similar AUROC, UNet-Res exhibited near-zero enhancing tumour entropy ($0.054$) and Expected Calibration Error (ECE) of $0.915$, with a Dice of only $0.714$, indicating severely miscalibrated confidence on the most clinically critical sub-region, a failure mode invisible to standard Dice and AUROC reporting. These findings demonstrate that strong uncertainty-error alignment is necessary but insufficient for clinical safety: sub-region-specific calibration assessment must accompany AUROC evaluation when selecting models for clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 研究MC Dropout能否通过不确定性估计识别脑胶质瘤分割中临床关键子区域的错误。在126例BraTS21患者中比较SegResNet和UNet-Res两种模型，发现强不确定性-错误对齐(AUROC≈0.97)虽必要，但子区域校准评估对临床部署不可或缺。
AI.motivation: 当前分割模型在治疗关键子区域上的静默失败构成患者安全风险，而传统Dice等重叠指标无法暴露这种错误。亟需验证不确定性估计是否能可靠识别临床关键子区域的分割错误。
AI.method: 在126例BraTS21患者上比较预训练高性能SegResNet与本地训练UNet-Res，采用MC Dropout进行体素级不确定性估计，通过熵H的AUROC评估不确定性-错误对齐能力，使用Expected Calibration Error (ECE)评估校准失败模式。
AI.result: MC Dropout保持分割精度(|ΔDice|<0.01)，熵基AUROC≈0.97表明不确定性正确排序错误体素。高不确定性亚组whole-tumour Dice中位数0.835 vs 0.925。但UNet-Res显示增强肿瘤熵≈0.054、ECE=0.915、Dice仅0.714，严重校准失败隐藏于标准指标下。
AI.conclusion: 强不确定性-错误对齐对临床安全必要但不足，子区域特异性校准评估必须伴随AUROC报告。建议临床部署前进行子区域校准评估，而非仅依赖全局指标。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about medical image segmentation (brain tumor segmentation using MRI scans - BraTS21 dataset) for clinical medical applications, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically diffusion-based video generation for 3D motion/animation synthesis.
